title: Gnars India Initiative: Building Bridges Through Skateboarding
content_summary: Executed · 0.62 ETH allocated | TL;DR:  Skateboarding in India has existed for over 20 years, but only recently has it begun to thrive. While cities lik...
content_markdown:
**TL;DR:** 

Skateboarding in India has existed for over 20 years, but only recently has it begun to thrive. While cities like Mumbai, Bangalore, and Delhi are recognized hotspots, countless lesser-known communities are emerging across the country. This project aims to document this movement and amplify India's presence in the global skateboarding narrative, something that has long been overlooked by international media and brands.

This is the first unified, aesthetically coherent initiative to document Indian skateboarding at scale. Through photography and live events, we’ll build a cultural archive while generating revenue for the Gnars DAO through NFTs and media distribution. This initial phase is just the beginning of a long-term, open-source documentation effort.

![Screenshot 2025-07-29 at 4.56.39 PM.png](https://ipfs.skatehive.app/ipfs/bafybeidp6rfhxyoqlib63xrsyragxzjlkoetv7u6mfhbhctjc3z24nszlm)

## Who is Fernando Ferreira?

![Image](https://ipfs.skatehive.app/ipfs/Qma7wp7pq8iQ4VFKVHkL2H9YHFjjkjgtHCqE145XdzeD3Y)

- [Farcaster Profile](https://farcaster.xyz/fernandoferreira)
- [7Capas Gnars Magazine - Photography Work with Styland](https://7ctv.wtf/styland/)
- [Profile Zora Co](https://zora.co/@fernandoferreira)
- [Fernando Ferreira Website](https://linktr.ee/fernandoferreiraphoto?utm_source=linktree_profile_share&ltsid=09333117-d0fd-4f9f-be10-5c5dd47f14d6)

## Summary

- Create a multi-city documentary of India’s growing skateboarding culture.
- Photograph key scenes and characters, capturing lifestyle and action.
- Host grassroots events in major skate hubs with best trick contests.
- Mint photos and exclusive footage as NFTs on [Zora](https://zora.co/@gnarscommunity), with all funds going to the **Gnars treasury**.
- Generate visibility, archive a historic moment, and onboard Indian skaters to the Gnars ecosystem.

![Day-7-Temple-2.jpg](https://ipfs.skatehive.app/ipfs/bafybeidgwnemqvaynejqethszxqifffspmxm53w2mzwwr5crykwtexcw2a)

*“Skateboarding in India is about more than tricks. It’s community, it’s struggle, it’s art.”*

## India & Skateboarding Today

Skateboarding in India is booming, driven by youth, social projects, and cultural exchange. Even in places without pavement, skaters find ways to ride. Mumbai alone has an estimated **30,000 skaters**. 

The culture is taking root in cities like Bangalore, Delhi, Jaipur, and beyond. DIY parks, public spaces, and online videos are shaping a new generation of Indian skateboarders.


![Image](https://ipfs.skatehive.app/ipfs/QmQUWCgJr7oX4wHkvWXQ1iLJ7iiNC3Zs3mF8XMPZQzq6t6)


## Project Overview

This project will celebrate and elevate Indian skateboarding through documentation and digital art. Our objectives:

- **Document**: the skate culture across different regions and its unique identities.  
- **Celebrate**: skaters, mentors, and scene-builders shaping the movement.  
- **Connect**: global skate communities with Indian riders through storytelling.  
- **Sustain**: fund this and future projects with NFT sales directed to the Gnars treasury.

![Image](https://ipfs.skatehive.app/ipfs/QmNX4puptvddP5Y89v6bs9mPvu5rq35vkPtaScVk3mxXvV)

In addition to being featured and printed in 7Capas magazine, this [picture (zora Mint)](https://zora.co/collect/base:0x1bab754608314b38ce963d9a41e2cbce6cd5aa55/12?referrer=0xddb4938755c243a4f60a2f2f8f95df4f894c58cc) was one of my first viral photos on Zora—made possible with the support of key builders and marking the beginning of my onchain work in collaboration with GnarsDAO. 


## NFT Strategy

- **Photo Editions**: Gnars NFTs + Podmedia content 
- **Video Moments**: Key clips from the journey.  
- **Special Drops**: 1/1s, skate art collabs, and behind-the-scenes content.  
- All proceeds go **directly to the DAO treasury**.  
- Promotion across Farcaster, Warpcast, and aligned platforms.

## Event Strategy

We’ll organize free, inclusive skate events in major Indian cities. 
A key format will be:

### Best Trick / Long Ollie Challenge

A nod to Indian skateboarding tradition. Events will be relaxed, open, and driven by community energy. Prizes will include Gnars gear, NFTs, and exposure.

- Final event in **Mumbai** with potential presence of Gnars DAO contributors.
- Every event will double as filming opportunity and celebration.

![Image](https://ipfs.skatehive.app/ipfs/QmfEincumW42TRAnH6KNcH1Pr3D2Yb3AT95kPQscdwUUj9)
*Skateboard culture documented by me over the years.*

## Format & Deliverables

- **Photography**: action + portrait + lifestyle.  
- **Social Media**: short interviews, reels, raw moments.  
- **Documentary Series**: summary of the journey.
- **Publication**: optional zine, book, or magazine.  
- **Exhibition**: traveling photo/video installation.

## Nounish Alignment

- **Public Good**: open documentation of a neglected skate culture.  
- **Extreme Culture**: highlighting skating in harsh and unconventional environments.  
- **Onchain-first**: revenue flows directly to the DAO treasury via NFTs.  
- **Permissionless Spirit**: skate everything, film everywhere, share it freely.

## Team & Roles

The project will be executed on the ground by Me (Fernando Ferreira, with support from Gnars builders providing voluntary digital assistance through regular meetings and strategic guidance.

- **Fernando Ferreira** — Product Execution, Director, filmmaker, and photographer.  
- **Vlad** — Coordination, general support, content strategy. 
- **Will / Zima** — DAO integration, governance liaison, cultural exchange.  
- **Gnars Builder** - Any member of the DAO who is willing to contribute to the development of this project.
- Additional collaborators will include local skaters, translators, and fixers.

## Timeline

| Phase            | Duration         |
|------------------|------------------|
| Pre-production   | 1–2 months       |
| Production       | 6–12 months      |
| Post-production  | 3 months         |

## Success Metrics

- Authentic documentation of the skate scene in different regions of India, highlighting their unique cultural characteristics.

- Curated production of photos and videos that reflect the lifestyle and creativity of local skateboarders.

- Organization of gatherings and activities in partnership with the local scene, strengthening connections and cultural exchange.

- Direct involvement of local skaters in the project, with a focus on their stories and personal journeys.

- Creation of NFTs and other digital assets that support the project's sustainability and contribute to the DAO treasury.

- Final publication of the material in accessible and lasting formats, such as a digital zine, online gallery, or exhibition.

## Conclusion

This is more than a skate trip, it's a cultural preservation mission and a powerful onboarding opportunity. By documenting the rise of skateboarding in India and connecting it to the global community, we create visibility, inspire the next wave of riders, and open the door to sustainable funding for public goods through NFTs.

Gnars has a chance to be remembered as the DAO that not only elevated a generation of Indian skateboarders, but also brought new builders and communities onchain. 

Thanks everyone! I hope you enjoyed the project. I'm open to any feedback on how to improve the execution and deliverables, feel free to share your thoughts!

## Budget Estimate

### Flights

| Route                   | Cost (₹)       | USD         |
|------------------------|----------------|-------------|
| Coimbatore ↔ Mumbai    | ₹8K–12K        | $95–135     |
| Coimbatore ↔ Delhi     | ₹10K–12K       | $120–140    |
| Coimbatore ↔ Hyderabad | ₹5.3K–6.5K     | $60–75      |
| Coimbatore ↔ Varanasi  | ₹11K–14K       | $135–160    |
| Coimbatore ↔ Dibrugarh | ₹27.8K–28K     | $300–380    |
| Coimbatore ↔ Shillong  | ₹18.8K–25K     | $284–300    |
| Coimbatore ↔ Pune      | ₹9.7K–10.5K    | $117–126    |
| Coimbatore ↔ Raipur    | ₹10K–12K       | $120–140    |

### Train Travel

| Route          | 2nd Class | 1st Class |
|----------------|-----------|-----------|
| Kochi          | ₹710      | ₹1,420    |
| Chennai        | ₹1,155    | ₹2,310    |
| Bengaluru      | ₹985      | ₹1,970    |
| Goa (Madgaon)  | ₹1,730    | ₹3,460    |

---

### Final Totals

- **Travel Costs**: ₹133,000  
- **Lodging**: ₹200,000  
- **Production**: ₹100,000  
- **Total**: **₹433,000 (~$5,200 USD)**

### Budget Proposal: Technical Summary

Requested total: $5,200 USD
**Payment split / Rationale:**
- 50% in ETH (≈ $2,600 USD, with ETH ≈ $4,200 USD)
- 50% in USDC ($2,600 USDC)

**Total: 0.619 ETH + 2,600 USDC ≈ $5,200 USD**

*This mixed structure ensures operational flexibility: ETH (is valued at an average of $4,200 USD to mitigate market fluctuations in this allocation) aligns with the crypto-native ecosystem and long-term treasury strategy, while USDC provides stability for fixed and off-chain costs such as logistics, equipment, and collaborators.*

title: Droposal - Surf is Up! Nogglesboard
content_summary: Executed | This Droposal aims to mint a video from a surf session in Playa Hermosa, Costa Rica, featuring surfer and artist zimardrp (aka me)...
content_markdown:
This Droposal aims to mint a video from a surf session in Playa Hermosa, Costa Rica, featuring surfer and artist zimardrp (aka me) testing the Sweet Amnesia 5'5 fish tail in a Nogglesboard shape, while wearing a collab shirt by ARDRP x Gnars with a pancake inspired design from that morning’s breakfast.

![Image](https://ipfs.skatehive.app/ipfs/QmRS3jsFUUL4ZmyY8Nu26oBeaf3YciqQYKNy6JghAUW6aq)

The session lasted about two hours during our surf trip. On the way up from Pavones to the north, the swell dropped a bit, giving me the chance to try out this Nogglesboard alongside local pro Carlos Muñoz and other surfers. The board proved to deliver high speed and smooth turns.

![Image](https://ipfs.skatehive.app/ipfs/QmVuxAoaDooKBzJJE97nDWJ9rPEW1NYGB5QECwv1cXNTds)


The video for this Droposal is a simplified cut of that surf session. However, the recorded material also includes additional footage that will be part of the upcoming Nogglesboard documentary, featuring artistic shots of the board, the session itself, and Tony Bear, an Australian shaper who has been living and shaping remotely in Costa Rica for over eight years.

![Image](https://ipfs.skatehive.app/ipfs/Qmc7ck7ZJsgk32fAUAn4usomhUhJwyLRfy1atp5zGaE7W5)

title: Gnars PodMedia Pulse

content_markdown:
![WhatsApp Image 2025-01-10 at 00.48.26.jpeg](https://images.hive.blog/DQmfFNztc1J4n2VfkKeHMVLUe6fjyxow6ao1z3WgMXsgwXw/Captura%20de%20Tela%202025-07-08%20a%CC%80s%2021.25.59.png)

## TL:DR

We propose the renewal of the Media Pod to sustain and expand its operations after 1 year and 2 months of continuous contribution. This new cycle focuses on maintaining an active Gnars presence across multiple social platforms, as well as the Gnars Community wallet, a key touchpoint for ecosystem interactions such as with Zora, Giveth, and DAO-integrated tools and mini-apps.

Our goal is to ensure consistent communication through regular posts, photos, videos, and in-depth content, including Gnarly News updates and special video drops while supporting the broader nounish culture and keeping the flame of the Gnars spirit alive.

As part of this next chapter, we will also organize two Gnars Contests: one artistic (URL), engaging creators and protocols, and one sport-focused (IRL), activating skaters, nounish spaces, and the community through crypto-backed prizes. This proposal secures the next 6 months of active engagement, strengthening the link between community, media, and governance, and setting the tone for an exciting start to the coming year. 

*Our last Media Pod proposal was funded at $8,550, but given the current need for greater treasury mindfulness, we’re requesting 5,730 this time — split between USDC and ETH. This will help sustain the Media Pod’s operations and keep the DAO’s creative engine running.*


## Updates / Track Record

### Driving Value Back to the DAO

Since launching the Gnars profile on Farcaster, we’ve been actively engaging through posts, likes, shares, and channel interactions. As a result, we received **30 USDC** in rewards from the Farcaster Ranking. These funds were used to support shredders and builders via tips on the Noice miniapp, creating value, boosting creativity, and spreading good vibes across the [community.](https://discord.com/channels/928811922244137020/1052361206331093104/1378003703272964186)

Posts like Gnarly News articles on Paragraph and [COINtent](https://zora.co/@gnarscommunity) drops on Zora are not just content, they’re sources of value creation. These initiatives generate onchain revenue that flows directly into the Gnars treasury, strengthen the community.

The Zora airdrop went live, and the account we created to curate gnarly/nounish content and support shredders was eligible, since we had already interacted with the protocol and collected a few pieces. The claim was executed early, directly via Baseblock using the proxy, before the chart started to dip, securing around **197 USDC**. With those funds, we swept the latest Droposals on gnars.com and then transferred the full amount in USDC to the Gnars treasury- [Hash](https://basescan.org/tx/0x389e2cf39ab8dc306d23968acc0af4dacd7bce89bd24599ad388e85fb9f6b776): 

The GnarsDAO profile on [Giveth](https://giveth.io/project/gnarsdao), which we created and have been managing over the past year, was recently selected to participate in one of Giveth’s funding rounds. Through this opportunity, we’ve raised a total of **US$424.35** in USDGLO, supported by 38 contributors and 100% of these funds have been directed straight to the Gnars treasury. These contributions not only reinforce our mission to push forward action sports culture within Web3 but also show how collective, transparent support can generate real onchain impact. Every donation helps keep our projects alive, evolving, and deeply connected to the community.

### Onchain Presence, Real-World Impact: Keep Gnars Moving

We’ve maintained a consistent presence across Farcaster, Instagram, and YouTube for over a year, using these platforms to actively engage with the community and document the ongoing evolution of GnarsDAO. Through regular interactions and posts, we aim to preserve and expand the value of both past and present initiatives by transforming them into media and communication assets.

Our content strategy includes targeted engagement with niche communities in skateboarding, surfing, and snow sports, as well as direct interaction with shredders, builders, and Nouns subDAOs. This ongoing work ensures that updates are communicated promptly and that the DAO remains connected across layers of the ecosystem.

![WhatsApp Image 2025-01-10 at 00.48.26.jpeg](https://images.hive.blog/DQmW6aWRw3qwDBAC682hWthGojpTfepM6x2xjyAVJjgdRSU/Captura%20de%20Tela%202025-07-14%20a%CC%80s%2018.24.25.png)

**Gnarly News 1:** [Shred Chronicles: The Return of Gnarly News](https://paragraph.com/@gnars/shred-chronicles-the-return-of-gnarly-news) 
**Gnarly News 2:** [Headless so you can shred more](https://paragraph.com/@gnars/gnarly-news-headless-so-you-can-shred-more) 
**Gnarly News 3:** [Gnarstyle, Benvenuto](h[ttps://](https://paragraph.com/@gnars/gnarstyle-benvenuto)) 
**Gnarly News 4:** [May the force be with you](https://paragraph.com/@gnars/may-the-force-be-with-you)
**Gnarly News 5:** [Less War, More Love](https://paragraph.com/@gnars/less-war-more-love) 
**Gnarly News 6:** [Into The Flow, beyond the break](https://paragraph.com/@gnars/into-the-flow-beyond-the-break) 

Through the [Gnarly News articles](https://paragraph.com/@gnars), we’ve been able to highlight important milestones within the DAO, aligning them with broader Nounish achievements and sharing essential context and history. This has proven the value of consistent storytelling, documenting our journey onchain through images, videos, GIFs, digital art, and gnarly energy. We see this work not only as a communication task but as a fundamental layer of **DAO memory**, impact, and **cultural presence**.

### Core Support: Media Pod’s Role in Brand, Onboarding, and Collaboration
The Media Pod plays a fundamental role in supporting the Gnars community — from onboarding and brand presence to artistic direction and engagement. It helps maintain key structural elements like logo usage, brand consistency, and organized asset storage through platforms like Drive and Terabox. The Pod is also actively involved in brainstorming sessions and cross-pod collaborations, such as the support provided to Rocketman during the development of Flows Gnars, including special video content, testing, and close work alongside the Tech Pod.

![WhatsApp Image 2025-01-10 at 00.48.26.jpeg](https://images.hive.blog/DQmcJCe7zADjW2VGQ9cMZ9otojhCnuGu9KPEjKTueWS2rzE/Captura%20de%20Tela%202025-07-14%20a%CC%80s%2017.52.40.png)

[Estabilish The Pod Media](https://www.gnars.com/dao/proposal/26) & [Gnars Pod Media 2.0](https://www.gnars.com/dao/proposal/59)


## Objectives / Strategy 

- **Community Engagement:** Strengthen the GnarsDAO brand through strategic media, storytelling, and interaction with our audience. Boost the main posts and achievements of athletes and the gnars community on IG, Farcaster and Gnarly News. Daily Work.

- **Gnarly News:** We propose continuing the blog-style communication initiative we launched last season (at least 1 per month). After publishing six posts, it became clear how much this approach helps professionalize our projects and highlight onchain information in a clear, accessible format. It has proven to be a positive tool for the DAO, serving as a direct update channel for the community, builders, enthusiasts, and everyone involved. This new phase would maintain the momentum by documenting key proposals, sports and artistic initiatives, and broader crypto moments, offering context and visibility to what’s happening within Gnars. Content will be published on platforms like Paragraph or Mirror and uploaded in Markdown format to Odysee, along with our special video content, further strengthening Gnars’ onchain presence.
We plan to continue using the Gnarly News page or the new Gnars Community profile for distribution across Farcaster, Discord, X, and more.

- **Social Media Management:** Provide consistent and engaging content across Instagram/Farcaster/Youtube, maintaining a daily posting schedule.

- **Video Content Creation:** Develop a steady stream of high quality videos showcasing our athletes, community events, and creative projects.

-  **Branding:** All content will follow GnarsDAO’s branding, ensuring consistency with the visual identity rooted in the Nouns ecosystem. This includes the use of Noggles, logos, icons, open-source fonts, and other creative assets, both onchain and offchain. By aligning with these standards, we reinforce the cultural presence of Gnars and Nouns across every touchpoint.

- **Growth and Interaction:** Grow followers and boost engagement through community-driven activities, creative collaborations, and interactive content. The strategy also includes fun and playful posts with meme value, tapping into the attention economy while keeping the profile active and culturally relevant. We aim to communicate across the full spectrum from the archaic humor of the early internet to today’s most innovative trends.

We’re entering a critical communication cycle during a crypto bull run, with a focus on keeping Gnars relevant and engaged through 2026. Our team will deliver a monthly content calendar featuring athlete highlights, Web3 updates, creative media, meme's, and community stories. We’ll produce consistent audiovisual content aligned with GnarsDAO’s branding, support the structure and production of two upcoming Gnars Contests, and deploy interactive posts to boost engagement. Performance will be monitored through analytics to optimize strategy and ensure Gnars remains active, visible, and valued across all channels.

## Actions
![instagram last 6 months](https://images.hive.blog/DQmXb6wEns9ykegXbF4131SrQZzT8fVaYmu2n1Z24BLjyNW/Captura_de_Tela_2025-07-22_as_16.14.50.png)  

Over the next six months, PodMedia will produce consistent content across Farcaster, YouTube, and Instagram highlighting athletes, events, creative projects, and key DAO milestones. We'll curate onchain creations (Droposals, NFTs) from the community through the Gnars Community profile, strengthening engagement and visibility.

We’ll organize and manage two Gnars Contests: one URL focused on artists and protocols, and one IRL involving skaters, nounish spaces, and crypto prizes both deeply connected to the DAO and documented across our channels.

**Gnars Contests 2025/02**

**1. Gnars x Boards.WTF – Art Contest**
A special Gnars art contest hosted via [Rounds.wtf]([https:/](https://rounds.wtf/)/), Nouns.gg or [SnapShot](https://snapshot.box/#/s:zimardrp.eth/proposal/0x79f018cc97edd777784292c3dfa65c543a34a117c0b3e7212a8e2737e7c3840d), inspired by the classic Prop House model.

The top 3 artworks will be rewarded, with the winning design printed on a new Gnars deck through [Boards.WTF](http://boards.wtf/), potentially sparking a custom race, a video edit, and more nounish culture building.

*Prize Pool: 500 USDC*

- 🥇 1st Place: $200 (Featured on Boards.WTF deck) + 1 Gnars NFT
- 🥈 2nd Place: $150 (Featured on Boards.WTF deck) + 1 Gnars NFT
- 🥉 3rd Place: $100 (Featured on Boards.WTF deck)
- 🏅 4th Place: $30
- 🏅 5th Place: $20

**2. Gnars “Cash for Tricks” – End of Year Skate Contest**
Inspired by the viral [Gnars contest of 2024](https://www.instagram.com/reel/C8pCW8jO8CN/?igsh=MWJ2eTh2Nmptczl2cw==), this round focuses on rad nounish video submissions. Participants will showcase tricks using elements like noggles, custom-built nounstacles, or any nounish gear. Judging includes trick quality and best gnarly editing. Shared across Warpcast + IG.

*Prize Pool: 280 USDC* 

- 🥇 1st Place: $100 + 1 Gnars NFT
- 🥈 2nd Place: $80 + 1 Gnars NFT
- 🥉 3rd Place: $50
- 🏅 4th Place: $30
- 🏅 5th Place: $20

Both contests aim to fuel the onchain sports/art culture and expand the GnarsDAO footprint in a fun and engaging way.

Alongside this, we’ll continue running Gnars News, publishing key updates and proposals in technical blog format and minting them as NFTs via platforms like Paragraph. With strong branding, daily effort, and strategic storytelling, we aim to grow the audience, drive interaction, and keep GnarsDAO active and thriving.

## Conclusion

We see this work as essential to keeping GnarsDAO at the forefront of the Sports and Art space especially after more than a year of dedicated media efforts, during a pivotal crypto bull run. As we close out 2025 and move into 2026, we anticipate a wave of gnarly and nounish accomplishments that deserve to be documented, celebrated, and recorded onchain, forever. Beyond that, this continued effort ensures Gnars maintains the credibility it deserves as one of the most unique DAOs on the blockchain, born from a groundbreaking proposal within NounsDAO. Gnars must stay active and expanding, carrying its vision forward. Thank you for your continued support. Let’s keep building, stay gnarly, and carry the Nounish spirit forward.

[That's Gnarly](https://thatsgnar.ly/thatsgnarly/drop) ⌐◨-◨

![FRtx6B_aIAEyCwo](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/HymkEF18ke.jpg)  

## Budget

- Management of IG, Farcaster, and YouTube, including branding, community engagement, content curation, art direction, and consistent daily/weekly posts. The goal is to keep communication with the community active and vibrant. We will also develop six editions of Gnarly News, one per month, highlighting key activities and milestones achieved by the community. Each edition will blend proposals, art, sports, and the broader Nouns ecosystem, offering a comprehensive overview of each month’s developments. Additionally, this scope includes creative and operational management of two Gnarly Contests: one focused on art and surfboard design (Boards.WTF), and the other on cash-for-tricks skate video submissions. This includes concept development, visual communication, contest logistics, prize coordination, and community promotion.**Total cost for 6 months Two Builders: $4,000.** [around 330 USDC/month per person]

- **$150** allocated to the Gnars Community treasury for minting Droposals, trending NFTs showcasing the achievements of the Gnars community as well as artworks from the Nouns community artists.

- In 2025, Gnars will host two exciting contests with a total prize pool of **780 USDC**. The first is the Gnars x Boards.WTF Art Contest, where artists can submit their best nounish artwork for a chance to win and have their design featured on a Gnars deck. The second is the Gnars “Cash for Tricks” Skate Contest, inspired by the viral 2024 edition, inviting skaters to submit their most creative tricks using nounish elements and gnarly editing. Both contests aim to celebrate and expand the culture through art, skateboarding, and community engagement.

- Poduction of short, high-impact videos to promote the Gnarly Contests, including animated call-to-action trailers, event teasers, and highlight edits. This also includes a special “Gnarly Take” video, capturing the energy and aesthetic of the brand to strengthen its narrative and visual identity across platforms.**$750**

- Terabox cloud for videos, approximately 4 dollars per month. catch for 8 months. approximately **$50**

That's exactly what this project is: DIY, community powered, fearles. we're asking for handouts - we're asking for tools to build somthing powerful. TL;DR
We are requesting from Gnars Dao to fund the creation of DIY parkour equipment for Katwe parkour culture in Uganda. With $1,200, we will build safe, mobile, and durable structures to empower youth, grow the local movement, and represent Gnars through bold creativity and action.


OUR BACKGROUND
Katwe parkour culture (KPC) is a community-led founded by Raki in kampala, Uganda. We use parkour to inspire, uplift, and give youth a positive outlet through movement. In areas like Katwe, there are no formal parkour spaces- yet young athletes train daily in rough conditions, proving their passion and resilence.





Our goal is to provide Safe and creative training setups built from local materials. By doing this ourselves (DIY-style),including the Gnars Dao logo, we reflect both philosophy and the spirit of community innovation.


The Problem We facing

No formal training spaces or safe equipment.
High risk of injury from undafe terrian.
Limited public awareness of parkour in Uganda.
high cost of imported gear.
What we propose,
we plan to build a DIYParkour equipments including;

Vault boxes
Adjustable swing bars
safety mats
balance beams
All equipment will be modular and mobile, built with professional capenters and welders, and transported to training grounds and outreach events.


this is a sample design of the parkour vault box in a form of gnarggle, where by so many parkour tricks and skills can be perfomed while also be representing Gnars and Lil Nouns,


Budget Breakdown

Items	cost(USD)
Timber, plywood, nails	$300
Steel bars + welding	$350
Paint, tools, and safty	$100
Carpentry and labor	$200
Local transport and storage	$100
Media production & storage	$150
Total	$1200 USD
We'll provide vedeo documentation, and full transparency report.

Outcome & Impact

Safe, creative training environment for 50+ athletes
Parkour growth in Uganda powered by Gnars Dao
Representation of Nouns and Gnars branding in all builds, Vaults and content
Content series documenting the DIY process
Why Gnars?

Gnars supports bold movement and building culture from ground up. That's exactly what this project is: DIY, community powered, fearles. we're asking for handouts - we're asking for tools to build somthing powerful.
Whith your help, this project will inspire new athletes, new creators, and new stories under the gnars banner - straight from the streets of Uganda.

Merch Design & Contribution to the Gnars Community

As part of our initiave to grow the culture of creativity and athletic expression in our community, we have developed unique merchandise designe that speak loudly to the ethos of Gnars and lil Nouns.


These designs capture the spirit freaks doing cool stuff -aligning with the values of freedom, fun, and fearles self expression.

We plan to produce and sell this merchandise locally and online, with a portion of the proceedes directly contributing back to the Gnars community under the #contribute ethos. This creates a circular ecosystem where the community not only benefits from Gnars support but also gives back in a meaningful way, amplifying the impact.

This merch serves three purposes:

Raise awareness of Gnars and Lil Nouns in Uganda and beyond.
Generate sustainable support for our parkour projects and events.
Give back to the Gnars treasury to support future proposals and builders.
Proof of Work

Instagram: @katwe_parkour_culture
Existing trainig videos
Commitment to documenting and sharing every stage of this project
 Final word

This $1200 could change how an entire community trains, grows, and sees itself. From unsafe ground to custom -built gear, we're ready to create. We just need a spark.
Let's build bold. Let's move loud. Let's go Gnars.

#### Gnars is BASED — Action Sports Onchain, Now in Blue

![Captura de Tela 2025-06-25 às 11.27.31](https://images.hive.blog/DQmd5LZ7JxtGYHvCLFPAGeabHQGiK8fmGGxCKZVXcRDAzxn/Captura%20de%20Tela%202025-07-14%20a%CC%80s%2012.12.35.png)

**This celebratory Droposal** marks a symbolic transformation within the GnarsDAO universe. Two of our long-time shredders and builders, Nogenta Yan and Ionir Mera, took to the streets to bring the noggles to life through the Nogglesrail, a public monument originally created by artist Pharra and installed at Praça XV, a historic cultural landmark in Brazil.

In this activation, the Nogglesrail undergoes a striking visual shift: its original colors give way to the signature blue of **Base Network**, captured through audiovisual content that bridges onchain culture and real-world action. The video documents this metamorphosis, turning a physical symbol into a digital narrative that reflects the evolution of our ecosystem.

This moment celebrates the **growing partnership between GnarsDAO and the Base ecosystem**, a connection fueled by shared values and mutual support. Through IRL sessions and URL collaborations, Base has helped onboard a new generation of shredders, while Gnars continues to build with artists, skaters, and creators aligned with the BASED vision.

There’s no better way to honor this convergence than through **onchain celebration**, minting a memory, carving a new line, and coloring the future. 💙

![Captura de Tela 2025-06-25 às 11.27.31](https://images.hive.blog/DQmf1VYCZ5zyjg4fbVF7sfeWB4ezoMPF8VA6a6Wu2G1FP1G/nogglesrail%20blue%201.png)

*Special Thanks:* 

- Filmmaker: [Yan Nogenta](https://farcaster.xyz/nogenta)
- Skateboarder: [Ionir Mera](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=QoEQRr8c_xo)
- Skate Hive Devs: [R4to](https://farcaster.xyz/r4topunk) & [Vlad](https://farcaster.xyz/skateboard)
- Pod Media General Support: [Zima](https://farcaster.xyz/zimardrp) & [Will](https://farcaster.xyz/willdias)
- Base Builder Supporter: [Jesse Pollak](https://farcaster.xyz/jesse.base.eth)
- Nogglesrail creator: [Pharra](https://www.gnars.com/droposal/0xf2f4465eae89b7032c4f8c9f1da02971d9f5bd4d) 
- I Love XV: [Space & culture](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=tTf2td9sDjI)
- Base Jump Migration: [Gami and team](https://farcaster.xyz/gami.eth)

**Let this be another chapter in the story of Action Sports Onchain, propelled by community, creativity, and culture. ⌐◨-◨**

This moment celebrates the **growing partnership between GnarsDAO and the Base ecosystem**, a connection fueled by shared values and mutual support. Through IRL sessions and URL collaborations, Base has helped onboard a new generation of shredders, while Gnars continues to build with artists, skaters, and creators aligned with the BASED vision.

There’s no better way to honor this convergence than through **onchain celebration**, minting a memory, carving a new line, and coloring the future. 💙

title: Noggle Rail - Itapetininga Skate Park ⌐◨-◨
content_summary:
Executed | Introduction:
Skateboarding in Itapetininga (Brazil) has a history marked by resilience, unity, and transformation. For many years...
content_markdown:
**Introduction**:
Skateboarding in Itapetininga (Brazil) has a history marked by resilience, unity, and transformation. For many years, the city’s skatepark was a neglected space, with poor infrastructure and often associated with social issues. Despite that, it became the site of one of the most powerful grassroots movements for skateboarding in the interior of São Paulo state.

![WhatsApp Image 2024-11-04 at 22.52.00](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/rkuSEjUZxx.jpg)
**2000**
![WhatsApp Image 2024-11-04 at 22.56.28 (1)](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/rJDwEsI-xe.jpg)
**2011**

Through the union of local skaters and the work of the [Skate Transforma Vidas](https://www.instagram.com/skatetransformavidas?igsh=dWFmcnRwbm5ucnE3) project, the park has been gradually revitalized, with renovations carried out through volunteer labor and community efforts. Itapetininga began hosting events with athletes from various states and became home to nationally recognized skaters like [Isabelly Ávila](https://www.instagram.com/isabellyskate09?igsh=OTgzc2tqMGtidjlq) (Brazilian national team) and [Zion Furegato](https://www.instagram.com/zionskateboarding?igsh=MXVqams3dzFkM2hlNA==) (junior national team), both of whom live and train in the city.

Today, the park is a local and regional symbol of how skateboarding can be a tool for inclusion, development, and social change. The ongoing renovation, carried out through a partnership between the community and the local Sports Department, marks a new chapter in this space’s legacy.

![WhatsApp Image 2024-11-04 at 22.56.29](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/HyY7SjU-gx.jpg)
**2013**
![WhatsApp Image 2024-11-04 at 22.56.28](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/HyK7BoLblx.jpg)
**2015**

**Objective:**
This proposal aims to install a new feature at the park: the Noggle Rail. Inspired by the Gnars symbol, this custom-designed metal rail will serve both a technical and symbolic purpose—representing the presence and support of Web3 culture in a grassroots and active urban space. It will enhance the skatepark’s identity and provide new opportunities for progression.


![IMG_0238](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/HJ2RqGvxyg.jpg)

[![WhatsApp Image 2024-10-23 at 22.18.21](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/HyU5e7vxke.jpg)](https://maps.app.goo.gl/QWa5Ndbt4usWu4oaA)

![WhatsApp Image 2024-11-04 at 21.02.24](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/SJR0xJDZ1g.jpg)[Google Map](https://maps.app.goo.gl/BPpAJkyntMF2Lqaj8?g_st=com.google.maps.preview.copy)

**Justification:**
The Noggle Rail will be installed at a strategic point in the skatepark and used by beginner and professional skaters alike. The Itapetininga skatepark is visited daily by dozens of skaters and has already produced standout talents like Isabelly Ávila and Zion Furegato, who live and train in the city. The presence of the Noggle Rail will be extensively documented in audiovisual content, marking a new milestone for the park and its visibility.

![unnamed (2)](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/HygdDoUZgg.jpg)
![WhatsApp Image 2024-11-04 at 23.11.54](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/Hyg3Ps8-xl.jpg)
![WhatsApp Image 2024-11-04 at 23.11.54 (1)](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/r1rawjU-xl.jpg)

**Media Exposure:**
The Noggle Rail will be inaugurated with a Best Trick event, bringing together the local community, invited athletes, and the general public.

Media coverage will include:

	•	Professional video and photo documentation
	•	Posts on the social media accounts of athletes, organizers, and supporters
	•	Distribution on Gnars Web2 and Web3 platforms
	•	Promotion on Garcia Rodrigues’ personal channels and the official accounts of Skate Transforma Vidas

This action will expand the park’s visibility and strengthen international recognition of the impactful work being done in Itapetininga.

![WhatsApp Image 2024-08-13 at 00.49.56 (1)](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/S1zAcjUbxe.jpg)
**2011**

![WhatsApp Image 2024-08-13 at 00.49.58](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/H1iPsiUbgx.jpg)
**2013**

![WhatsApp Image 2024-08-13 at 00.49.59](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/rJQpjoLZgl.jpg)
**2017**

![unnamed (3)](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/SyDxniU-ee.jpg)
**2022**

![WhatsApp Image 2025-05-17 at 21.43.39](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/BJGups8Wex.jpg)
![WhatsApp Image 2025-05-17 at 21.43.39 (1)](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/ByGt6j8Zgx.jpg)
**2025** Our reality today — we are going to transform it. ⌐◨-◨

**Technical Details of the Installation:**

	•	Location: Public skatepark in Itapetininga, São Paulo, Brazil
	•	Feature: Noggle Rail – Custom-designed metal rail
	•	Material: Welded steel with protective paint finish
	•	Estimated installation time: 5 business days
	•	Total cost: 1,700 USD, covering materials, labor, full execution, 
    and professional photo and video coverage during the fabrication and installation process, 
    as well as at the park inauguration 
    (Best Trick event) 
    
**Final Considerations:**
The installation of the Noggle Rail will be both symbolic and functional for the Itapetininga skatepark. More than a new obstacle, it will be a permanent representation of the collaboration between grassroots skateboarding, urban culture, and the Web3 community.

As a professional skateboarder and president of the Skate Transforma Vidas project, I see in this proposal a meaningful opportunity for Gnars to become part of this story. Our connection began with [Proposal 37](https://nouns.build/dao/base/0x880fb3cf5c6cc2d7dfc13a993e839a9411200c17/vote/37), when we traveled to Uganda delivering essential donations that supported five local communities. That mission opened the door to an ongoing connection between Brazil and Uganda through skateboarding.

![WhatsApp Image 2024-10-23 at 21.13.00](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/rynNWzweyl.jpg)

Now it’s time to begin this work in Itapetininga, and further strengthen this bond. Once again, we are contributing significantly to the renovation through volunteer work and donated materials. The Noggle Rail will stand as a symbol of this shared creation, partnership, and long-term purpose.

![WhatsApp Image 2024-11-04 at 23.14.54](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/B1_flZvZyx.jpg)

**[Garcia´s Stuff](https://www.instagram.com/garciaskateboards?igsh=a2x0YTgxNG5oZjU4)**

*Social Media*

content_summary: Executed | TL;DR  This Droposal (a proposal to mint Gnars media as canonical DAO NFTs) tells the story of Noggelstacles around the world, cen...
content_markdown:
![Captura de Tela 2025-06-03 às 12.45.27](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/H1SkFqhMxe.png)


## TL;DR 

This Droposal (a proposal to mint Gnars media as canonical DAO NFTs) tells the story of Noggelstacles around the world, centering on the creation of the new Noggles Delta sculpture by Pharra XV in Rio de Janeiro.

> 80% of all mints are split with the Gnars community. 

![Image](https://ipfs.skatehive.app/ipfs/QmVCxQeYamF7pQhzKkB7vzc4gVWzoAw2oPKVPe6iX8wLQH)

## About

This film documents the making of Noggles Delta, a new sculpture installed in downtown Rio de Janeiro. It captures the entire production process while offering a brief history of Nogglestacles—from the original Noggles Rail to Gnars' involvement in ILoveXV 2022, and the spread of these nounish obstacles across the globe.

Directed by Yan Felipe, the documentary follows artist PHARRA XV over several months, chronicling the design and creation of this latest Nogglestacle. It also uncovers the roots of the movement in Rio, showing how it helped transform the city into a global node of nounish culture.

Watch, support, and share this story—an evolving chapter in the Gnars universe, grounded in the streets of Rio and shaped by the local subculture.

title: Gnars Flows
content_summary:
Executed · 1.00 ETH allocated | rocketman and riderway propose to build out and launch Gnars Flows. Tl;Dr 
Fund athletes and active contributors 
Experi...
content_markdown:
[rocketman](https://warpcast.com/rocketman) and [riderway](https://warpcast.com/riderway.eth) propose to build out and launch Gnars Flows.

![Captura de Tela 2025-05-14 às 14.25.49](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/ryeVf8f-xg.png)

## Tl;Dr 

- Fund athletes and active contributors 
- Experiment and showcase for 4 months 
- Goal to get more sponsorships for Gnars as a whole 
- Create a new revstreams from sponsored members and groups
- Custom branded Gnars pages on Flows.wtf


## Curatorship + Voting

- Simplified version of TCR system for approving applications

![image](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/SyDloSMZee.png)

> Extra: Display Team in Gnars.com

- Voting with Gnars tokens to help decide Flow splits.

    
## Revenue 
    
We are working with Vrbs to incubate revenue generating projects. We want to figure out how to help grantees drive revenue and grow the pie for everyone.

Practically, this means building out a revnet integration, team management, and revenue integrations eg: Slice/Shopify/Droposals into Flows to start.

We plan to make these features available at no cost to Gnars grantees, to help them earn revenue for Gnars. 

We also plan to split 20% of the Gnars Flows revnet (that issues the TCR token) with the Gnars DAO treasury. As the Gnars flows gain more sponsorship, more folks will curate, and the treasury will earn more. 

Our first idea is to help tag posts that are mints/purchase opportunities via the API, so they can be shown easily on the gnars.com homepage. We commit to working closely with Gnars to figure out how to maximize revenue back to the treasury.

## Sucess Case 
We are targeting two different revenue possibilities.
### Base
1. Base Sponsors Gnars content via Flows
2. Base Branding in Flows and Gnars Page 
3. Creators wear and use Base branding in videos and photos creations
4. Creators creates content to generate revenue for then, for the dao, for the flow and for the sponsor if sponsor opt in for revenue split 

> Base is running their own Flow soon. I plan to pitch them to fund a Gnars flow after their Flow has been running for a month or two. 

### Shredders
1. A shredder or group of shredders eg: KSI signs up for the accelerator features
2. They start hiring a team across Gnars with their initial salary
3. Launch a revnet w/split to Gnars treasury
4. Start selling merch / mints and drive revenue into revnet
5. Attract more buyers + grow their impact and the Gnars treasury



## Extra

- Gnars website is going to Showcase shared revenue creations

![Image](https://images.hive.blog/DQmf3LztPjRJPNc2rhhJf8Tzjpv8m8rJW8nEfqkmY9mGGNe/Captura%20de%20Tela%202025-05-14%20a%CC%80s%2018.27.38.png)

## Request

We want to fund $1k USDC per month, for 4 months, to two flows.

| Shredders  | Storytelling | 
| --------   | --------  | 
|  $1k USDC /mo |  $1k USDC /mo|


> 10% of each Flow will go to curatorship

**Shredders Mission**
Elevate shredders who embody the Nounish ethos, improve local scenes as real-world heroes, and fly the Gnars flag into new parks, waves, and streets.

EXAMPLE requirements: (To be finished with community)

- Post at least 4 new sessions/engagements per month
- Generate quality video sellable video/image products.


**Storytelling Mission**

Capture, remix and broadcast Gnars stories that spark excitement, onboard newcomers and grow awareness for the brand, generate quality video sellable video products.

EXAMPLE requirements: (To be finished with community)

- Produce two high-quality pieces of Gnars content monthly
    - Videos/virals: Content with split
    - Articles/written content: 1000+ words
    - Other media: Comparable scope
    - Article in [Gnars Community](https://paragraph.com/@gnarsdao) (paragraphy)


## Development Work involved
- Support Gnars token voting on the frontend
- Build out flows.wtf/gnars subpage 
- Deploy contracts w/Gnars token voting support and add to indexer 
- Flags in API + infra for flagging drops/mints to start to build revshare 
- Revenue generation features + work

**Development Cost:** 1 ETH3

title: ONBOARDING VITOR RIBEIRO INTO GNARS COMMUNITY
content_summary: Executed | Vitor Ribeiro Onboarding Proposal  Who am I? My name is Vitor Ribeiro, I'm 24 years old, a skateboarder based in Macaé, Rio de Jan...
content_markdown:
# Vitor Ribeiro Onboarding Proposal 

## Who am I?

My name is Vitor Ribeiro, I'm 24 years old, a skateboarder based in Macaé, Rio de Janeiro, Brazil.
I've been skating for over 10 years. I started when I was around 12 or 13, inspired by my neighbor who was a professional skateboarder(Leandro Macaé). I bought my first board from him, and since then, I never stopped. Skateboarding became my passion of life and how I see the world.
![Image](https://ipfs.skatehive.app/ipfs/Qme5PtR7KjjdY3TKzvQgn8JhmniooGQ8gu53kXJhiqKGdB)

I’m part of Barracão Skateshop, where I’m not just a rider, but also involved creatively and actively with Humberto — helping build and strengthen our crew and our local scene. I’m also part of Nogenta Skateboard, a crew from Rio de Janeiro that connects skateboarding with art, politics, and culture, always bringing a raw and honest language straight from the streets.

I’m one of the people behind DIY Macaé, a collective where we build our own spots and skateparks with our own hands. With little to no public support, we took matters into our own hands — and that made my connection with skateboarding even stronger.
![Image](https://ipfs.skatehive.app/ipfs/QmWLMQtboaHE8qJuM4avWgL5GGxprmcAFfxdS2gSk9ccYV)

Right now, I’m focused on progressing as a skater and also working behind the camera — filming and editing as a videomaker and editor, documenting the scene and telling the real stories from our streets. I’m always looking for ways to support the community, inspire the younger generation, and keep the skateboarding alive in my city.

Some of the highlights of my journey so far include being featured in the Cold 50/50 book — one of Brazil’s most respected skate publications — and now being in the final stages of releasing Dissidente, a full-length video project we've been working on for the past three years with a lot of heart and dedication.
![Image](https://ipfs.skatehive.app/ipfs/QmebASrfSu8DDzyaTAv9rmhRSnZn6rW53wgaiEDjpxxWW8)

I want to join Gnars because I believe in the power of a web3 community connected through skateboarding and culture. I can contribute content, not only showcasing my own skating but also sharing the daily life and energy of Barracão, Nogenta, and our collective efforts here in Macaé. With the community’s support, we could finally bring to life some social projects we’ve been dreaming of, but haven’t been able to execute due to lack of time and resources. Being part of Gnars means growing together, representing my city in the web3 skate scene, and keeping our street culture alive and thriving.
![Image](https://ipfs.skatehive.app/ipfs/QmNVK4cUH2mKVYAZAyWHtJ7FxZnbUFVewSAsougvQQjWf5)

### TL;DR
This proposal aims to integrate Raki with a Gnars NFT to participate in **Gnars DAO** governance.

### Intro
I’m Raki the visionary founder of Katwe Parkour Culture, born in the heart of Katwe slums.
![Raki Raff](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/ByC3XVmklx.jpg)
Through dedication, resilience, and raw passion, I managed to qualify through hardworking and for the love of the sport and represent Uganda in world parkour champs in Japan. My journey from the streets to the international spotlight is a testament to the power of movement, discipline, and community. Now am focused on inspiring the next generation, using parkour as a tool to uplift, unite, and transform lives across Uganda and beyond.
### Katwe Parkour Culture 
Katwe Parkour Culture it’s an  initiative founded by Raki in the heart of Katwe, Kampala, Uganda. This movement leverages the dynamic discipline of parkour to inspire, empower, and uplift youth in underserved communities.
![KPC](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/Hykm-4mkxe.jpg)


**Mission and Vision**

 Katwe Parkour Culture seeks to transform lives through movement. By introducing parkour—a discipline that emphasizes agility, creativity, and resilience, The vision is to cultivate a vibrant, self-sustaining community where youth can channel their energy into positive growth, develop life skills, and reimagine their environment as a space for opportunity rather than limitation.

**Community Impact**

Katwe, known for its vibrant informal economy and rich cultural history, faces challenges such as poverty, limited access to education, and youth unemployment. Initiatives like Katwe Parkour Culture play a crucial role in addressing these issues by offering alternative pathways for youth engagement and development.

---

### Why Parkour?

- **Cultural Synergy**: Parkour shares deep roots with skateboarding - DIY spirit, street culture, and defiance of mainstream norms.
- **Content-Rich**: Parkour athletes are prolific video creators—perfect for decentralized content platforms like SkateHive and Farcaster/flows.
- **Underrepresented**: Unlike skating and snowboarding, parkour lacks a strong Web3 presence, asking for a #🔒 parkour space/chat on the Gnars server. This is a first-mover opportunity.

### How did Raki know about Gnars 
Raki gets to know about Gnars through Isaac and Ephraim from skateboarding outreaches they were happening in different parts of the country and youth centers, We have been friends for a couple of years. They were drawn to Gnars mission of onboarding the next million shredders onchain and supporting action sports and fostering a global network of athletes.

Gnars DAO being a premier web3 action sports community, has attracted us to further connect with various Parkour athletes from around the world such as from Brazil, Asia.I feel stong joining this network and represent the shredder experience while utilizing this new blockchain technology.

title: THE GLOBAL PREMIERE OF UGANDA CONNECTION DOCUMENTARY
content_summary: Executed | TL;DR This proposal outlines a visionary plan to premiere the UGANDA CONNECTION documentary across Uganda's dynamic skateboarding ...
content_markdown:
## TL;DR

This proposal outlines a visionary plan to premiere the UGANDA CONNECTION documentary across Uganda's dynamic skateboarding landscape. Filmed by[ Renan Carvalho](https://www.instagram.com/renanmatic?igsh=OGM1d2x5MjZ4cjJ5) "Dino" alongside  Pro skateboarder [Garcia Rodriguez](https://www.instagram.com/garciaskateboards?igsh=MTI0eXBmcWNsZWx1MA==) , both driven by their passion and inspiration from [KSI](https://www.instagram.com/kampalaskateboardinitiative?igsh=MTl2ZTcwM3E5d2g2ag==) and sponsored by Gnars! the documentary follows their inspiring journey as they deliver donations to leading skate organizations. These include the Kampala Skateboard Initiative, Uganda Skateboard Union, Uganda Skateboard Society, Uganda Skateboard Community, Climate Skaters Kiteezi, Gulu Skateboard Community and various youth centers. Each premiere event will not only celebrate the artistry and transformative power of skateboarding but also serve as a unifying platform for communities to share in this extraordinary narrative.

Leveraging the influential network of Gnars DAO, this initiative bridges international skate cultures by connecting the vibrant energy of Brazil with the resilient spirit of Uganda. With Gnars' support, the documentary promises to ignite a dynamic cultural exchange, empowering local skate scenes and sparking social change. Sponsors like Gnars have a unique opportunity to invest in a project that transcends film—uniting communities, amplifying voices, and showcasing the global impact of skateboarding.
![Powered by Gnars](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/SJb5A2V01e.jpg)

## HISTORY
**History & Background**

Hello, I'm [Isaac Huston](https://www.instagram.com/isaacjojinah?igsh=MWZxZmQzNHhuNmYwdw%3D%3D&utm_source=qr), a dedicated skateboarder and proud member of the Gnars community. Together with my friend [Ephraim](https://www.instagram.com/ephraimsylar?igsh=MWVkYWNscTd3anZ4MQ==), We had the unique opportunity to journey with the Agents from Brazil during the entire production of *Uganda Connection*. From day one until the final moments, our mission was not only to deliver essential donations to five different skate organizations in Uganda but also to immerse ourselves in the local culture and build meaningful relationships.

Working closely with the local teams, we helped foster movements that went beyond skateboarding. This experience was incredibly enriching—we learned a great deal about the community, overcame challenges on ground together, and celebrated the unifying power of skateboarding. Our role in this mission was both inspiring and educational, reaffirming our commitment to support and elevate the skate scene, not just in Uganda but across borders.
![IMG-20241002-WA0026](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/ry-VhSTa1e.jpg)
## GOALS
- **Cultural Connection:** Bridge the gap between Brazil and Uganda by showcasing the transformative power of skateboarding through the *Uganda Connection* documentary.With this we are able to screen more  Introduction videos about GNARS DAO and NOUNS to the skate scenes here giving more meaning to local shredders about web3.0 world.
- **Community Empowerment:** Support and strengthen local skate groups and youths at hand by giving them tools and space for creative expression and cultural exchange. 
- **Enhanced Engagement:** Create immersive and memorable screening experiences with high-quality projection equipment, ensuring every event is impactful.Since some organisations have no access to screening we aim to reach on all skate scenes grounds and screen the UGANDA CONNECTION DOC . Sitting with different skate scenes in Uganda on a screen sharing with them the Gnars DAO community and the Journey of the Gnars Agents from Brazil to Uganda. 
- **Amplify Gnars' Ideology:** Leverage this mission to amplify Gnars' core values and foster an impactful connection between the vibrant identities of both Gnars and Nouns. This initiative not only elevates the local skate culture but also reinforces Gnars’ commitment to global community building and cultural exchange.
- **Future Collaborations:** Lay the groundwork for lasting partnerships and collaborative projects, furthering the global network dedicated to supporting the growth and evolution of skateboarding as a cultural movement.
![skatevibe](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/B1AiTm4Rye.jpg)
By supporting this mission, Gnars will not only drive a powerful cultural initiative but also benefit from enhanced brand alignment with community empowerment and local understanding of WHAT Gnars DAO stands for, innovation, and international unity.
![Gnars ft nouns](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/rJvjC8ppke.jpg)
## WHAT ARE WE ASKING FOR?
We are asking for 1350 USDC in funding to bring this transformative experience to life. These funds will be used to secure a high-quality projector and portable projector screen—ensuring that every screening of UGANDA CONNECTION is visually immersive. Additionally, the contribution will cover welfare provisions during documentary viewings, providing a safe and comfortable experience for all attendees understanding the GNARS COMMUNITY. Finally, the funding will facilitate reliable transportation to reach all targeted skate organizations and youth centers throughout Uganda. Your support is pivotal in amplifying the documentary's message, creating a meaningful cultural exchange, and nurturing the global skateboarding community.
![projector](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/S1s1YbXR1g.jpg)

## BUDGET


|               ITEM                |  QUANTITY   |   COST (USDC)   |
|:---------------------------------:|:-----------:|:--------:|
| Projector (Epson Home Cinema 880) | 1 projector | 600
Projector Screen (Elite Screens Tripod Series 100-Inch Projector Screen) | 1 screen  | 169
Welfare (Pizza and sodas / Popcorn)-Food | 500 Kgs | 214
Trasport (3 Gnars Agents - Bus and Uber) | 3 film Screeners & Skaters. | 217
Petrol Generator rental in cities | 5 locations | 150
**Total** | | **1350**

## TL;DR

This proposal aims to integrate Kanz Ibrahim and Ryan Shema into the Gnars DAO community by gifting each a Gnars NFT

## Intro 

### Kanz Ibrahim

Hello, my name is Kanz Ibrahim, and I am one of the founders of Ride BMX Uganda. I have been riding BMX for several years, learning and teaching others, which has significantly contributed to the sport’s growth in Uganda. Through my journey, I have encouraged many young people to join BMX, fostering social change and cultural growth in our local scene. Additionally, I have been involved in acquiring BMX gear and sharing resources to support the community, making new friends along the way.

## BMX Uganda Organization

BMX Uganda is a non-profit organization founded by Kanz and Ryan, dedicated to promoting BMX riding and empowering Ugandan youth, starting from age five and above. The organization provides workshops, events, and training sessions to nurture talent, encourage personal growth, and support community development.

Beyond BMX, BMX Uganda actively engages in social causes, such as the “Ride Against Malaria” initiative, in collaboration with NBS Television, the Rotary Club of Kisaasi-Kyanja, and Fun Cycling Uganda. Through these efforts, BMX Uganda has demonstrated a commitment to using sports as a vehicle for positive change.

The organization actively shares its activities on Instagram, showcasing young riders, community events, and the positive impact of BMX on Ugandan youth.


## Photos and Videos 
![Image](https://ipfs.skatehive.app/ipfs/QmTSsnVWkh9UARozFfYTgLTcY9G9CEHbLCaCbCmCC1fhaV)


![Image](https://ipfs.skatehive.app/ipfs/QmbyPT55B2pwFrEGupNkY9hNm2ASkEP5Xpu3MAypNGfhEk)


Am Shema Ryan, a dynamic individual who seamlessly blends  passion for BMX riding with expertise as a software engineer. With over three years of active participation in the BMX community, i have honed skills at the street mastering tricks and pushing my limits. Off the ramps, i channel the same dedication and precision into coding and developing innovative software solutions.


![Image](https://ipfs.skatehive.app/ipfs/QmQsKyFFsLBLsdF7cBGePLdQypCWFNfGBy15yqxFp2h2wW)



## How did Kanz and Ryan knew about Gnars 

 Kanz and Ryan learned about Gnars through Ephraim and Isaac from the Kampala Skate Initiative. They were drawn to Gnars’ mission of supporting action sports and fostering a global network of athletes and enthusiasts. The ability to connect with like-minded individuals worldwide and access new opportunities through Gnars excites them, and they are eager to contribute to the community.

## **WHO**  
I’m Monik Santos, a professional surfer, athlete, and volunteer at TPM, currently ranked **#6** in Brazil’s national elite circuit. I’ve won major titles, including **Brazilian Champion** and victories in the **WSL World Circuit**. Despite these achievements, I still don’t have a primary sponsor, and my monthly income from supporters is only **$170**.  

During my first **six months with Gnars**, I had incredible experiences that allowed me to **compete in global events and achieve significant results**. A particularly special moment was being invited to **A GREAT DAY IN THE STOKE**, an exclusive competition for Black women surfers from around the world, where I **took first place**.  

![Captura de Tela 2025-02-06 às 18.55.03](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/HJN8l3MKJx.png)  

###### **A GREAT DAY IN THE STOKE CHAMP 2024**  

Additionally, I designed **hats and stickers** to promote the community, created [**Instagram content**](https://www.instagram.com/moniksantosx/) to bring more people into Gnars, and actively participated in **Warpcast, Flows, and Discord**, engaging with members and learning more about the culture.  

![monik](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/ryuOVD0ckl.png)  

---

## **WHAT**  
I want to continue this partnership while bringing in new ideas and projects:  

- **NFT Collection**: Creating exclusive NFTs that represent my journey and the Gnars culture, giving back part of the sponsorship to the community.  
- **Learning & Engagement**: Deepening my involvement in Gnars and exploring ways to strengthen the community and expand our movement.  
   - I was thrilled to be approved as [an athlete on Flows](https://flows.wtf/item/0x4f859476df484f3825a7439bc088db54f23894211d9ed72eb44e3fd2dbd1d2f5) at the end of 2024.  

![Captura de Tela 2025-02-06 às 19.17.07](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/BJGOShGYkg.png)

![Monik_Dia02_TacaBrasil10000_Frances_Foto_Brocolisphoto__-28](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/rk1ZbhMtke.jpg)  

---

## **HOW**  
With **six more months of support**, I will be able to compete with **better structure, create high-quality content, and develop NFTs** to give back to the community. I am fully committed to growing with Gnars and proving that **collaboration and opportunities can inspire more kids to pursue a career in sports**.

title: Shredding into DeSci: GNARS X BluntDAO x DeSCI World
content_summary:

content_markdown:
****TLDR**:
GM Shredders! President of BluntDao Apollo here with an exciting new dive into Decentralized Science! We are proposing a partnership with GNARS DAO to fund three snowboarders or skiers at ETH Denver and nearby slopes for a Proof of Sesh DeSci activation. This initiative integrates cannabis culture, decentralized science, and action sports, with performance metrics tracked before and after cannabis consumption. By scaling to three participants, we remain within a $2,250 budget, including ski passes, rentals, custom GNARS-branded merchandise, and media production. All content will be aligned with GNARS branding and shared with the DAO to enhance visibility and engagement. We also request 28 GNARS NFT’s to give away (3 for the snowboard and skateboard contestants) 

![BluntDao
 Mount Kushmore](https://i.imgur.com/oUn2Ckd.png)

Proposal Details

Project Objectives:

Highlight GNARS DAO at ETH Denver and nearby slopes through a unique cannabis and action sports collaboration.  [Info On Cudis](cudis.xyz)

Track athlete performance metrics with donated Cudis rings, recording data on-chain via DeSciWorld for future reward opportunities. [DeSci World info](https://desci.world/)

![Cudis Rings](https://i.imgur.com/x6BkmTx.jpg)


Provide GNARS DAO with high-quality branded media content to strengthen its presence and foster community engagement.

Key Deliverables:

Media and Branding:
Develop high-quality videos and photos featuring GNARS athletes on the slopes and at ETH Denver, aligned with GNARS branding guidelines.

Provide all media assets to GNARS DAO for use across platforms, including social media and storytelling campaigns.
Boost GNARS athlete achievements and content on Instagram, fostering audience engagement and growth.

!![Description](https://i.imgur.com/moLjGew.jpg)

DeSci Data Collection:
Utilize donated Cudis rings to track heart rate, balance, coordination, and other metrics before and after cannabis consumption.

Store health data on-chain via DeSciWorld, allowing GNARS athletes to contribute to and earn from future research projects.

Community Engagement:

Highlight GNARS’ role in bridging Web3 and action sports through interactive storytelling, collaborations, and community-focused posts.

Custom GNARS-Branded Merchandise:
Create branded merchandise for participants and event attendees to enhance GNARS’ visibility and community presence.

Budget Breakdown (for 3 participants):
Ski Passes (1 Day at Keystone): $179 × 3 = $537
Ski/Snowboard Rentals (for 3 participants): $428.10 × 3/5 = $256.86
DJI Mini 3 Camera Drone Bundle: $740
Custom GNARS-Branded Merchandise: $450
Transportation to and from mountain (8 people): $150
Refreshments for athletes during shooting: $50
Miscellaneuos (taxes or fees):$50
Total: $2,233.86

Why GNARS Should Fund This Proposal:
Enhanced Branding and Media:
Deliver consistent, high-quality content showcasing GNARS’ presence and athletes, aligned with the DAO’s unique aesthetic.

Strengthen GNARS’ digital presence with impactful storytelling and media.

DeSci Integration for Athlete Rewards:

Use on-chain metrics to explore cannabis’ impact on athletic performance.
Establish a scalable model for GNARS athletes to earn rewards by sharing their health data for studies beyond cannabis.

Building on this Success: Builds on the successful GNARS Media Pod initiative, which has elevated GNARS’ visibility in Web3 and action sports through consistent, professional media.

Community Growth and Engagement:bCreate meaningful engagement with the Web3 and action sports communities at ETH Denver. Passing out Gnars throughout the week with links to new Gnars.pro + Gnars media outlets. 

Expand GNARS’ influence through collaborations, social media posts, and real-world activations.

Scalable and Impactful:

The project can be replicated in future events, amplifying GNARS’ presence and contributions to decentralized science and action sports. Including but not limited to surfinf competitions, skateboarding, parasailing, and more!

![Sample Image](https://i.imgur.com/oElVAuC.jpg)


Conclusion:
This proposal offers GNARS DAO a unique opportunity to expand its reach and impact through ETH Denver and the slopes. title: Dave Bachinsky » 1 Year Sponsorship Proposal
content_summary: Executed · 1.00 ETH allocated | I'm beyond grateful for the endless support through Gnars! You’re keeping the missions trekking! I wanted to share some ...
content_markdown:
I'm beyond grateful for the endless support through Gnars! You’re keeping the missions trekking! I wanted to share some highlights from 2024 and what’s in the pipeline for this year. 

The Gnars Mini Ramp best trick contest went off! Over 100+ Submissions from people all from around the world. Painting the OcRamps mini ramp with the Noggles ⌐◨-◨ was huge; totaling over 3,000,000 views and 30+ social media posts.

![image](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/62174bc38567d848c76a9b6c/679c3c30e47df5b2a26d8509_Trips%20copy.jpg)

**20th Video Part update:** 
My main focus for this summer was filming my 20th video part. I used some of the ETH for filming missions to Puerto Rico, New Mexico, Massachusetts, & Texas. Premiering this part on Go Skateboarding Day 2024 was way too quick to release in 6 months. This could possibly be my last full length so I want to make sure everything has a meaning and each trick is pushing the boundary of the technical side of skating. While filming for this video part, Dwindle Distribution went bust and shutdown multiple board brands like Enjoi, Madness, Monarch, Darkstar, and Almost. I skated for Darkstar skateboards for 8 years ❤️‍🔥 in the summer I received my last box of boards, but they were all blank. 

![image](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/62174bc38567d848c76a9b6c/679c3c2fc466e9c9e3567584_boards.jpeg)

I’ve been documenting every session that’s happened on each of these boards. Each board will have an NFC chip where you can tap to see the visual art piece done on that board or watch behind the scenes of every session. I wanted to give these blank skateboards another story beyond skating them. I reached out to 5 people that have inspired me, I can’t share the full list but I’m excited to share one of the first artist involved. [Watch here](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=UI5hYd6w4RY). Some might know Steve Saiz from the original Bones Brigade. He’s a huge inspiration on and off a board! (This is still a short film in the making, we still need to sit down and show what’s been done on the board). 

The goal for this video part is to bring 3 things together — February 2026 is the 20 year anniversary of my kickflip down the El Toro 20. We will be hosting a premiere for this 20th video part, showcasing artists board collaborations and artifacts that have been saved over these last 20 videos parts.

![image](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/62174bc38567d848c76a9b6c/679c3c2f30413d12205a7898_Fs.jpg)

**2025 Overview:**
I’m so stoked to announce I signed a 2 year deal with SBA ([Skateboarding Association](https://www.instagram.com/skateboardassociation)), the first of its kind contest series supported through CAA Sports Marketing and backed by multiple NBA players. Fox Sports just covered their introduction, it’s a worldwide contest series with 48 skaters with 7–11 events scheduled to start June 21st. Most of these early events will be in USA based but hopefully will get some international trips in London, Brazil or Tokyo.

For those that don't know who I am :)  > [Here’s an PDF](https://pitch.com/v/db-mp86ya) with insights on myself and what I’m creating 



**January to May:** 
-   Fuel TV NextGen TV Show
-   OcRamps Sand Dunes Mini Ramp
-   Draft picks for SBA

 **June to December:** 
-   SBA Contests Start
-   iDabble Roll Forever video
-   OcRamps Mini Ramp Location
-   Preparing for 2026 releases
-   Possibly Woodward West

![image](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/62174bc38567d848c76a9b6c/679c43d58ef0b17923926a72_Next%20Gen.jpg)
---

My last proposal was for 6 months and that ended 9 months ago. Over the last year here is some behind the scenes insights to what I have contributed to represent Gnars. The biggest push was painting the glasses ⌐◨-◨ on Oc Ramps mini ramp which has brought over 3,099,200k views. Our four collaborated Instagram post have totaled over 434,350 views, these stats are not including 15+ Instagram stories or Facebook numbers. I’ve always promoted Gnars brand at multiple events - Jackalope contests, Prince of Puerto Rico contest, and recent interviews & live spaces -- [(2024 Propdates) ](https://www.gnars.pro/dao/proposal/5?t=propdates)

[UFO CLUB - Nick Hollins ](https://pods.media/ufo/rolling-forever-with-skateboarding-and-art-dave-bachinsky)

[Bob Burnquist Dreamland Edit](https://defiance.media/video/dreamland/)

[Flex & Quirkies live space ](https://x.com/flex_web3/status/1750218145342607666?s=46&t=blO15D4zegkQgMgiMtrP2w)

**I’m proposing a 1-year continuation of my sponsorship with Gnars:** 
Two of the main reasons for this proposal are for traveling to film for this 20th video part and replacing my outdated drone to be shooting 4k - 120FPS to slow-mo these technical shots and a phone camera upgrade. I’d love to be putting these to use with time lapses and behind the scenes on our Oc Ramps trip in February where we’re building a mini ramp out in the desert sand dunes. We’re focusing on epic locations similar to [The Formula](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=fX2yFlr82cE&t=48s) and bringing together multiple edits for this on going series. 

**Proposal Deliverables:**

-  Representing Gnars in 7-11 contests worldwide series, interviews & live spaces.

-  Gnars supporting one of the artists in the blank board documentary series, showcasing a Gnars logo in the film. — This will bring exposure to Gnars from a web3 artist utilizing their technique on skateboards. It also supports a Portland, Oregon mission to film for this video part, that I’ll be tagging Gnars on all social stories from the trip. 


-  Painting glasses ⌐◨-◨  on a new mini ramp - I'll be filming 6 tricks never done before on the ramp along with edits from these filming trips to mint to raise money for the treasury.

- 5 video collaboration post with Gnars through all socials — Instagram / FB / X / Warpcast .

- Each filming trip for 20th part GnarsDAO will be promoted on social

- Hosting 3 - Best tricks for cash on the mini ramp -  across all socials

- ⌐◨-◨ on my board and headlined in all all social handles - 386,856 Total Followers

**➰ CARRYING OVER TO 2025 PROPOSAL** 

➰Anyone part of Gnars that vote “for” this proposal will with be able to claim a free visual art piece, from the 20th part.

➰MAYBE Visiting a Woodward camp this summer as a guest pro. I’ll be giving out ⌐◨-◨ stickers to everyone.

➰Gnars will be part of the first on-cyber gallery digital skate video premiere — In the gallery it will display an introduction to GnarsDao.


I am proposing $7,500 — split into 3 proportions from each chain (1 ETH // $1000 SENDIT // $3,200 USDC) through Gnars for a 1-year sponsorship to cover the majority of the costs to travel to film for this video part along with camera upgrades. 

- $1500 - 20% taxed
- $1000 - Hosting three worldwide Mini Ramp Best Trick Contest 
- $1400 - DJI - Air3 & mic mini 
- $1100 Phone camera upgrade 
- $1,700 - ARTIST BOARD SERIES - 2 Flights to Oregon - Pay Filmer / Editor - Hotel // 5 days to film for video part
- $800- 20th part filming missions: Las Vegas / San Francisco Thrasher Trip. Life expenses, painting supplies, supporting filmers. 

![image](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/62174bc38567d848c76a9b6c/679c462c7b261bac11ff7669_IMB_rELiKX.GIF)

Stoked to catch up on ideas with y’all and keep the mission going!!

## TL;DR

**Mauacba** is more than just a bar—it’s a gathering spot for those who live and breathe skateboarding. Sponsored by **Monster Energy**, Mauacba has become a hub not only for socializing but also for hosting events that celebrate skate culture. It’s the place where professional skaters, amateurs, and fans come together to share experiences, watch incredible tricks, and embrace the lifestyle that skateboarding represents.

![Mauacba area Skateavel](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/r1_mkBTVkl.png)

## Introduction

Over time, Mauacba’s mini ramp—one of the venue’s main attractions—has worn down due to heavy use and exposure to the elements. Now, it’s time for a major upgrade! The ramp will be completely rebuilt through a project sponsored by Gnars, bringing in a new, modern structure ready to host amazing tricks and unforgettable moments. 

Mini Ramp expenses already include renovation and art by [@NounsGraffiti](https://x.com/Nounsgraffiti?t=6hDhMt4eYMKCqECW1fu01Q&s=09)
![image](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/S1cYre2Nkl.png)

### Mini Ramp art

![image](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/SkEGTBSv1e.png)



To kick off this new chapter, **Mauacba** will host a special launch event focused on the partnership with Gnars. The event promises to energize the skate scene with competitions like the “Premiere Nava Videopart” and “Best Trick,” along with music and the unbeatable vibe that only skateboarding can deliver. 

![Design sem nome(14)(2)](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/HyWKIghEkg.png)

 ### Gnars Clothes:

 We are Building some Collection with Camo Pants and T- shirts. 
Each purchase is a way to strengthen the **Gnars** movement and contribute to the skateboarding scene.

 ### Mauricio Nava Videopart and new Pro Model:
 
 Mauricio Nava is a professional skateboarder with 26 years of experience, passionate about hitting the streets and filming his tricks, always presenting something new in skateboarding be it manuals, no complys, or never-before-seen tricks

![Image](https://ipfs.skatehive.app/ipfs/QmQxP8vouNJJEeKoJXRRKwpkL8cqU7A3gp7hQYmYnTSUER)

Throughout his career, he has released over 20 video parts for sponsored brands, crews, TV, independent videos, and even on Red Bull's channel .

[![Image](https://ipfs.skatehive.app/ipfs/QmQEKe3cuQQg4kY5qKAeGPtM8y1D6CsGfMVkfAxf5gzrJ9)
Red Bull Interview ](https://www.redbull.com/us-en/checkout-brazilian-skateboarder-mauricio-nava)

[![Image](https://ipfs.skatehive.app/ipfs/QmdtiT9vJuFva6F13PjECYUPoMpFcdNCtnMfYwgPXJL1gc)
Red bull video part 
](https://www.redbull.com/us-en/checkout-brazilian-skateboarder-mauricio-nava)

Recently, he has been filming with a vintage camera alongside his friend Anderson Mindu (Juarez skateboard), promising many innovations free and casual skateboarding through the streets of Rio de Janeiro.

**Pro model Decks*** 

*The pro model will be a collaborative artwork between **Nava and Gnars**, and it's also part of the professional skateboarding culture.

* **Part of the sales of the decks will be used to  purchase NFTs to contribute back to the Gnars treasury.**
* **The sales of the decks will be done at the professional skater's booth at the classic XV Square market. And of course, they'll be promoted online, including on Discord.**

- **Sales made through web 3.0 will have a 10% discount to encourage customers to create their wallet and enter the 3.0 universe.**


![Image](https://ipfs.skatehive.app/ipfs/QmWJFx9vuGgn6RQ2qWEoDUzfac49D7VoY3R2WNYPSY1s11)
