# Bernardo Nassar renewal propososal (Bodyboarder)

***TL;DR***

For first, i'd to be clear that i'm not participate in case of flows for all time of this proposal. And i'd really liked to wait for flows, but i made many sacrifices to honor the last proposal, even after hack,  and at now i'm in delicated situation.

Renewal proposal for one year: New project Gnars documentary series exploring the athletes history from DAO, your journeys and impact on the Web3 ecosystem. And my bodyboarding content production will be directed directly to Gnars' YouTube.

### **Benefits for the Community**  

**1. Exclusive Content Production**
Creation of authentic and targeted videos for the Gnars YouTube channel, strengthening the connection with the Web3 and sports communities while highlighting the athletes' journeys and completed projects.

**2. Live Streaming at Avalanche**
An epic day of big waves at Avalanche will be live-streamed on the Gnars Instagram, delivering exciting and unique content to engage the global community in real-time.

**3. Representative Uniforms**
The use of Gnars uniforms, both in and out of the water, reinforces the brand's presence and identity in the most impactful settings, increasing audience identification with the athletes and the community.
## About me 


![chasimdf](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/rkSNB8CP1g.jpg)


I'm Bernardo Nassar, I'm 34 years old, I'm an extreme wave bodyboarder, content producer. One of those responsible for putting the state of Espírito Santo on the radar of the most extreme waves in the world.

I've been part of the community since February 2023. My first proposal was approved seven months ago. Unfortunately, my wallet was hacked, and I lost 90% of the funds. Despite this setback, I delivered part of the proposal, producing **8 vlog-style videos** (averaging 10 minutes each), **one retrospective film of 2024**, and organizing **two premiere events** alongside **Luiz Hadad for his film, 'IndoGnars 2.'** I also received media coverage for my work.


## Content Creation

[**Script**](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1ebC844ulWmVVThF7p8xkqNUn5l5F8ql3dveYsnfJtoA/edit?usp=sharing)

In addition to the content focused on my work as a bodyboarder. I’m producing a **documentary series** for **"GnarsTube"**, with the **athletes of the Gnars DAO**, exploring their journeys and impact on the Web3 ecosystem. Starting in Espírito Santo with **Luiz, Zima, and myself**, we’ll dive into our daily lives in surfing, bodyboarding, and our connection to the DAO. Next, we head to Rio de Janeiro to share inspiring stories from **Nico, Sunny, Mari, Vlad, Beagle, Piu, DeathCat, Pharrá, Dino, and Surfguru**, set in locations that bring together sports, art, and technology. We’ll wrap up in São Paulo with **Will Dias and BlessSkateshop, connecting skateboarding, art, and the Web3 universe.**


#### ["Terra dos Slabs"](https://zora.co/collect/zora:0xc2308581c8fb044a1d7acdb79aa8a11e2ff6b5be/2) on ZORA. The movie that i produced for the events showing the 2024 season.

The content I've produced has been primarily hosted on the [NXF Slab channel](https://www.youtube.com/@nxfslab), which I manage. However, I intend to shift the focus to [**Gnars' YouTube channel**](https://www.youtube.com/results?search_query=gnars+dao) to consolidate Web2 content in one place, strengthening the idea of transforming the Gnars channel into a 'Web3 Sports TV' hub.


The following **two events were produced** by **@luizhadad** and me, funded by Luiz's IndoGnars 2 proposal. These events celebrated our content creation journey and the opportunities Web3 has provided for advancing our work. For these events, **I prepared the film 'Land of Slabs,'** a retrospective of 2024.

The Idea

The project aims to create a digital magazine illustrated by DCOT in PDF format, minted as an NFT. Its content will highlight each of the DHnouns created up to token #53, including educational information and showcasing events and individuals within the community. The magazine will be available in two languages: English and Spanish, and sold as an NFT for 6 months with the following profit distribution:

40% to DHnouns DAO: 0x302d1F018f385B812900919294a4e03d0e924162

50% to Gnars DAO: 0x72ad986ebac0246d2b3c565ab2a1ce3a14ce6f88

10% to the author: dcot-deployer.eth

A ZORA SPLIT CONTRACT WILL BE USED TO AUTOMATICALLY DISTRIBUTE TO ALL PARTIES THE RESPECTIVE PROFIT PERCENTAGES FROM THE SALE OF THE NFT MAGAZINE SUGGESTED PRICE IN ETH 0.0042 ETH BASE FOR EACH ONE

The objective is to generate a return on investment, strengthen the DHnouns community, and attract more people to the Gnars Web3 ecosystem. The magazine will offer educational and creative content, elevating the project's actions and impact by illustrating each video as a one-page story.

DH Nouns portal ecosistem

DHNOUNS.WTF

Project Objectives

Increase Awareness of DHnouns and Gnars DAO: Present an educational and visually appealing format to invite more people to explore the Web3 world.

Create unique and Valuable Content: Dedicate each page to a DHnoun, highlighting its story, significance, and contributions to the community.

Promote Economic Sustainability: Generate revenue through NFT sales to reinvest in community growth.

Strengthen the Community: Highlight events and achievements of members, encouraging greater participation and collaboration.

Expand the Online Community: Utilize the new informational and e-commerce portal DHNOUNS.WTF to showcase the magazine and foster engagement within the DHnouns digital universe.

Art concept, each page is inspired by each of the builders who has created a dhnouns we will see extreme stunts in public roads community events all illustrated in black and white dividing vertical pages using graphic history resources such as vignettes and boxes that split the page to tell a story or different perspectives of a relevant event something that captures the attention of the dhnouns created, here you can see all the dhnouns that have been created to date.

Execution Plan:

The images posted here are a reference to the graphic style with which the magazine will be illustrated by DCOT.

1. Planning Phase (1st Month):

Research the first 53 DHnouns tokens and collect key community events.

Design the magazine layout (index, sections, visual design).

Translate and adapt content for both Spanish and English versions, ensuring proper placement on each page.

2. Production Phase (Months 2 and 3):

Create custom illustrations for each DHnoun by DCOT.

Write educational content and feature key stories.

Design and layout the magazine in PDF format.

Conduct reviews and finalize adjustments.

3. Minting and Sales Phase:

Mint the magazine as an NFT on compatible platforms.

Launch marketing campaigns to promote it within Web3 and DAO communities.

Magazine Structure

Cover: Thematic illustration by DCOT.

Editorial: Introduction to the project and magazine purpose.

DHnouns Section: Pages dedicated to the first 53 tokens, featuring illustrations, descriptions, and relevant data.

Community Stories: Key events and achievements of notable members from Gnars and DHnouns.

## tl:dr.


We are asking for 4139 USDC for a 6 months Gnars Sponsorship to obtain Laptops, A filming Phone and welfare for web3 onboarding & training activities under Kampala Skateboarding Initiative.


## Kampala Skateboard Initiative (K.S.I)


[Kampala Skateboard Initiative](https://www.instagram.com/kampalaskateboardinitiative) is a Non profit organization founded by Omeri Elvis in 2022 aiming to develop skateboarding in Africa using the little we have to battle drugs and gang influence in Kampala, Uganda.


![Image](https://ipfs.skatehive.app/ipfs/QmT5knHuuz7MVAGKX3UwZbGb5344ZoyiMigF6pZcL5FVcM)


We do this through weekly training sessions with children from ages 5 to 18 years old, conducting skateboarding workshops on the Basics of skating, skate tricks, Discipline and the spirit of skating.


## What we want to do?


1. Teach Children (5-16yrs) the Basics of Skateboarding and use computers for their education.

2. Onboarding K.S.I youth athletes into web3 and crypto (17yrs - 30yrs) into Gnars DAO / Uganda Gnars semi-Defacto team

3. Training the team how to make videos, artwork and music production / media creation using tools like Pro tools, Premier pro, and adobe tools.. while minting this media onto web3 platforms like ZORA, Warpcast, Skatehive, Manifold.. etc to generate revenue for the initiative while sharing the story of skateboarding in Kampala, Uganda.

## Why should GnarsDAO fund this?

Having weekly trainings with the Children and youths Under our intiative has already setup a momentum in which we want to include the extra co-curricular trainings about blockchain technology and how to use computers a bit more.

![Image](https://ipfs.skatehive.app/ipfs/QmcspJSstco7CNUhsjQtCnort2Rr27kTyELz6MuTvMu7m6)

We shall not only be focusing on learning how to skateboard but also training children and youths more things that surround skateboarding. Such as video editing, music production, minting media and social media marketing coupled with financial literacy.

This Funding is to enable us kickstart our journey to self sustainability of the initiative by providing us with the necessary technology tools that will enable us build in the new web3 world alongside other local partners.


## Budget Breakdown


| Item | Quantity | Cost |

| -------- | -------- | -------- |

| Windows Laptops (For Web3 & software training) | 3 laptops | 1500 USDC |

| Iphone 14 Pro (For Filming)  | 1 phone | 989 USDC |

| K.S.I Administrative Costs (Legal fees & Insurance) | 6 Months | 500 USDC |

| Food & Transport (For the Children) | 6 months | 500 USDC |

|High Speed Fiber Internet| 1 Year (for livestreaming and broadcasts) | 650 USD

|**TOTAL:** ||4139 USD |  


- Laptops: 


- [HP X360 1040 G7 CORE i7 16GB RAM 512SSD STORAGE 10TH GENERATION LAPTOP](https://mobileshop.ug/product/66c3533ac9503a9fcf8e13a1)

- [EliteBook 8th Gen](https://mobileshop.ug/product/663b43907eb796061c75903b )

- Internet Plan: 

- [MTN internet provider](https://www.mtn.co.ug/wakanet-request-service/?package=FTTH_100_M&package_name=Up%20to%20100mbps&pck_pr=195,000&number=&validity=%201%20month&speed=Up%20to%20100mbps&offer=Fiber#wk_tab_renew_subscription) -> 54/Month


## Way forward

![KSI_7](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/BkiHoMrWJl.jpg)


We intend to use this 6 months sponsorship to introduce our skaters to the various ways they can shred to earn, and take skateboarding game to the next level as we build towards having professional skaters in Uganda.

## Onboarding for Issac, Ephraim and Blood Toffee for the Kampala Skateboard Initiative (K.S.I)
[Kampala Skateboard Initiative](https://www.instagram.com/kampalaskateboardinitiative) is a Non profit organization founded by Omeri Elvis in 2022 aiming to develop skateboarding in Africa using the little we have to battle drugs and gang influence in Kampala, Uganda.
![KSI_1](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/HysAv4Ky1e.jpg)

We do this through weekly training sessions with children from ages 5 to 18 years old, conducting skateboarding workshops on the Basics of skating, skate tricks, Discipline and the spirit of skating.

### Members of K.S.I
#### [Isaac "Houston" Oyo](https://www.instagram.com/isaacjojinah)
![KSI_2](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/HJRFdVt1kl.jpg)

I have been skating since i was 15 years old and greatly inspired by Nyjah Houston's skating style, i love to shred both streets and parks. 

#### [Ephraim Sylar](https://www.instagram.com/ephraimsylar)
![KSI_3](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/B1xnj4t1yx.jpg)

As a street style skater, i have been skating with Isaac for the past 5 years both on a mission to use the power of skateboarding to change our local community

## K.S.I Enters the Shredquarters
The Gnars mission of onboarding the next million shredders onchain was first introduced to us when Two skaters, Garcia and Rennan from Brazil came  to distribute skateboards and skating equipment to different organizations in Uganda
![KSI_5](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/H1tPTNYJkl.jpg)


[Garcia Rodrigues](https://www.instagram.com/garciaskateboards/) had initially reached out to us via our Instagram after watching clips of our training sessions with the Kids rolling boards in the Dirt. With a mission to build a skateable mini ramp so as to enable us have better training grounds and further build our goal towards an Indoor skatepark.

Gnars DAO being a premier web3 action sports community, has attracted us to further connect with various skaters from around the world such as from Brazil, America and possibly Asia. we feel strongly about Joining this team and represent the shredder experience while utilizing this new blockchain technology.

## What are we asking for?
Asking for 3 gnars Airdrop NFTs for the 3 web3 members of Kampala Skateboard Initiative which was donated twelve (12) skate equipment by Gnarcia and Dino Brazil team when they visited Uganda and this was the inaugural skate community that Garcia Rodrigues got connected to in the Skate capital of Africa

content_markdown:
This proposal is to send 0.2eth each (around $500 each) to Millz and Bagelface who both worked on the gnars migration to base and changes to the gnars.wtf frontend to accomodate.

The frontend isn't quite finished, but there's misalignment in the tech pod, specifically the party that controls the tech pod funds and that party should send the funds back to the Gnars treasury at this point in my opinion.

The fundamental misalignments tend to devolve conversations into personal attacks and circular conversations that are unproductive.

I am seeking to pay these 2 Gnars contributors this little token amount for the work they've done until now (as had been discussed, transaction setup, but then vetoed in the party). I personally feel like all contributors to this task have been underpaid, and devs are moving on which may indicate as such.

But we must move on, move forward, keep building, whoever the people involved are. And it's only fair to say thank you for the time you spent on gnars to these 2 in SOME way, even if it is a small amount.

The tech pod party cannot find consensus in paying out these small amounts, which indicates to me that the party model for pods may not be as effective as hoped initially. But it was a worthy experiment!

Thanks for your time and consideration.

content_markdown:
### TL:DR



This droposal mints the UGANDA CONNECTION video teaser through the Gnars wallet and transfers 1,000 USDC to enable Dino to complete the full-length film in time for next month's crucial events.

The film aims to further promote Gnars' principles to a community, amplifying our message and empowering those in Kampala who need tools to put their ideas into action. Let's strengthen the voices of our representatives in Kampala and make a lasting impact!

|![Image](https://ipfs.skatehive.app/ipfs/QmeNTmQ8f9nWMj2uHXD7NfKbGXCbUEQMPCpVjKA8sACsDu)|
|-|


## History

*  Hello, my name is Renan Carvalho, better known as “Dino”, I'm a filmmaker and skateboarder, and I'm part of the gnars community.
I was invited by podmedia to direct, film and edit a mini-documentary about our journey with skateboarding in Uganda and the feasibility of building a skate park in the country. 

* I spent 17 days in Uganda, dedicating 15 days to intense filming. During this time, we conducted interviews with leaders of six organizations, returning frequently to the same locations to capture the essence of each one. We also documented moments and landscapes that represent Uganda in an authentic way, always with a positive and independent perspective. In addition, we filmed tricks by local skateboarders and Brazilian skateboarder Garcia, who also went to Uganda to donate skateboarding materials to local communities. 
This opportunity came about because of the proposal

* Fund travel costs to deliver $6,000 in donated skateboarding materials to skateboarding collectives in Uganda, ensuring that no funds are spent on the donations.
* Context: [Proposal 37](https://nouns.build/dao/base/0x880fb3cf5c6cc2d7dfc13a993e839a9411200c17/vote/37)


|![Image](https://ipfs.skatehive.app/ipfs/QmRgHE6j6616noSiKxuw4oJcJP27QAmXsAzLhgv4XCtnhM)|
|-|


* The documentary reflects Gnars' core values, promoting cultural exchange and highlighting skateboarding as a powerful tool for social transformation. Uganda's skateboarders are already leading this change, and their stories have the power to inspire the world. This further strengthens the skateboarding scene in Africa, where the construction of a skate park is an urgent necessity.


## Goals
- The short film teaser will be released as an NFT on the Zora platform, with revenue split between Gnars and the creators. It will also be shared on the Gnars Warpcast and on YouTube, Instagram.


- Amplify Gnars' ideology, creating an impactful connection to the vibrant identities of both Gnars and Nouns. 

- The official launch will take place at DevCon in Thailand, marking the beginning of the film's journey.

* Following this, the short film will have special screenings in major urban centers such as São Paulo and Rio de Janeiro, connecting Brazilian audiences to the initiative. 

* In addition, there will be a screening in Kampala, Uganda, bringing together the local skateboarding community.
 

* These international screenings reinforce the project's global reach and its commitment to fostering skateboarding culture in different parts of the world.

|![Image](https://ipfs.skatehive.app/ipfs/QmbimwEwszbJDoaSvdKctYpFYvXhb8L1xMK8SWPJyD9tKM)|
|-|

## Strategy/actions: 


* Special invitation to everyone to get involved with storytelling on decentralized platforms, sharing ideas and connecting with many communities around the world. Let's amplify these stories together. Thank you in advance! 



- The screenings will also support our efforts by promoting the culture and the film through public engagement and discussions during the premieres.

- Let's share the teaser and increase its value with NFTs. By using blockchain, we can create unique digital assets that enhance engagement and offer true ownership.



|![Image](https://ipfs.skatehive.app/ipfs/QmRdi9qNqcMcNYmqyZbUvwVez24yho952uVtUfd5ZGPuYB)|
|-|

title: Onboarding Proposal Anderson do Santos
content_summary: Executed | hey, my name is Anderson do Santos, but I’m better known as "Mindú," a nickname that came from "amendoim" (peanut). I’ve been invo...
content_markdown:
hey, my name is Anderson do Santos, but I’m better known as "Mindú," a nickname that came from "amendoim" (peanut). I’ve been involved in skateboarding since 1990, when I first started skating on the streets of Duque de Caxias, a city in the Baixada Fluminense region of Rio de Janeiro. Skateboarding has always been more than just a sport for me; it’s a lifestyle, a form of expression, and a connection to my community.

![](https://ipfs.skatehive.app/ipfs/QmRfL4RBNAUjQm28bUiSatqaXPFP94zdKeSivsdDuwHMid)

In 1994, with a simple VHS camera and a VCR, I decided to start documenting the local skate scene. My goal was to capture the raw energy and unique styles of the skaters in Duque de Caxias, giving visibility to the local talent. These videos, which began as a way to share our skate culture, soon led to the creation of JUAREZ SKATEBOARD, a brand born out of a sense of unity and the “do it yourself” spirit that defines skateboarding.

![](https://ipfs.skatehive.app/ipfs/QmVATcNdHMvtwo98zweY4nCzkBpUYMBH6HdSxX4A4QG9Lq)

JUAREZ SKATEBOARD wasn’t just about selling products; it was about creating a movement, a crew of people passionate about skateboarding and street culture. For several years, we produced videos, zines, and clothing that reflected the essence of the local skate scene. However, after a while, life took me in different directions, and the brand went on hiatus.

![](https://ipfs.skatehive.app/ipfs/QmUGDmF7q9AVP6Lhfhb6hhY3DQkrt6oRD7st8PLF8fd56x)

In 2021, after the pandemic, I felt it was the right time to bring JUAREZ SKATEBOARD back. Skateboarding had grown, but I believed there was still space for a brand that represented authenticity, creativity, and the grassroots culture of the sport. With a renewed focus on creating skate films, zines, and streetwear, I relaunched the brand, keeping the same core values of supporting both amateur and professional skaters, while promoting creativity in every aspect of skate culture.

Today, JUAREZ SKATEBOARD remains a platform for creativity, individuality, and self-expression. Our brand continues to celebrate the resilience and energy of street skateboarding, and our goal is to inspire the next generation of skaters. Whether through our videos, our clothing, or our involvement in the local scene, JUAREZ SKATEBOARD is about more than just skateboarding—it’s about freedom, passion, and the community that this culture represents.

![](https://ipfs.skatehive.app/ipfs/QmWAouLckCaMYGJjnC9hBxd6sYYbViaV9V14hHQcacQNgA)

My experience as a skater in my youth and my passion for this sport led me to explore urban culture, capturing through my lens the energy of local and global skaters’ tricks in the streets of Rio de Janeiro. I believe that each video can convey the energy and emotion that skateboarding provides, as well as showcase the diversity and talent of the skaters in our region. I am always seeking new perspectives and experiences that can enrich my work, sharing the essence of this incredible sport with other skate enthusiasts.

![](https://ipfs.skatehive.app/ipfs/QmTq59mejqWRwFECBZbnv6LHyLAUXrLy9f1KApfK7FCx7A)

Develop and maintain a dynamic website that consolidates functionalities from platforms like [propdates.wtf](https://www.propdates.wtf/), [nouns.camp](https://www.nouns.camp/), and [thatsgnar.ly](https://thatsgnar.ly/), but tailored specifically for the Gnars community. This platform will unify governance, social engagement, and creative content in a single, accessible location.

## Introduction

The proposers aim to create a platform that provides new and experienced users with a complete Gnars experience. This site will streamline opportunities for bidding and minting, enhance DAO transparency and communication, and integrate platforms like Propdates and Paragraph/Farcaster to keep the community informed and engaged.

### [🔗 New Gnars Preview](https://gnars.r4topunk.xyz/)

![Image](https://ipfs.skatehive.app/ipfs/QmXr7ZZeQssM6V7LJpoPAYQQHkn5nAEcjXX56ay4V71L3u)

## Why Another Website?

While **nouns.wtf** serves the core needs of the Nouns community, it remains intentionally simple to support future forks. However, websites like **nouns.camp**, **nouns.gg**, **nouns.world**, and **propdates.wtf** have evolved beyond basic functionalities, forming an unbreakable ecosystem that caters to a broader audience. Our vision is to create a permissionless platform that complements the flagship **gnars.wtf** without restricting innovation. This new website will prioritize community-driven features and offer a flexible environment to test new ideas.



### 🏠 Homepage Design

![Image](https://ipfs.skatehive.app/ipfs/QmVYdMGrkoWxLJEwUvJbBawWNmQziEPE8XKDDiSrgcX96K)

The homepage will feature key revenue streams for Gnars: **Thatsgnarly NFTs** (with a 20% share allocated to the Gnars treasury) and the **Gnars Auction**. **Combining these revenue streams on a single page offers diversified contribution options for supporters with varied interests.**

- **Auction Section**: Encourages bidding on Gnars NFTs, potentially bundled with a commemorative Zora/Thatsgnarly NFT for added incentive.
- **Proposal Highlights**: Displays a preview of current proposals. If no active proposals exist, trending Propdates will be shown.
- **Community Updates**: Includes Propdates and newsletters to keep users informed.

## 🏛 Proposals Page

### - Enhanced proposal previews for better readability.

![Image](https://ipfs.skatehive.app/ipfs/Qmb74Nt44GjduRHjECCHe2jdJYLn6gudyvfqzjSpboh78V)

### - Simplified USDC transaction generation.
### - Intuitive transaction preview for ease of use.

![Image](https://ipfs.skatehive.app/ipfs/QmWTP4HpPfUYfwyacSPyN74ubpFQtrFqFQbyFqhwLxx1pE)

# + 

![Image](https://ipfs.skatehive.app/ipfs/QmYGA2D3fBBq9mzcE93d6ADDanC6rxbHUpFbbYYXp6gnPx)

## 🏤 Propdates Section

### - New DAO page for creating proposal updates
### - Better communication for the proposal progress
### - New way for proposal feedback
### - Likes function to measure the engagement of updates


## 💹 Treasury Detail Page [Reference](https://zapper.xyz/account/0x72ad986ebac0246d2b3c565ab2a1ce3a14ce6f88?tab=dashboard)

![Image](https://ipfs.skatehive.app/ipfs/Qmd4fkmf8ZmW6P1y3esS2otNofqPBrqTgwbJ3BcnekCo5q)

### - Comprehensive treasury viewer and analytics dashboard
### - DAO NFT portfolio (tokens available for claim throught task completion)


## Possible Future Enhancements

1. **Bidding with Alternative Tokens**: Enable bidding on Gnars NFTs using a variety of tokens, increasing accessibility and participation.
2. **Round.wtf-Style Airdrop Features**: Implement airdrop functionalities similar to Round.wtf, providing additional incentives and rewards for the community.
3. **Cross-Posting on Warpcast and Hive**: Seamless integration for sharing content across these platforms, amplifying community reach and engagement.
4. **Governance-Based Noggle Rewards**: Allow community members to claim exclusive Noggles for participating in governance actions.
5. Token Gated Governance Ai 
6. UI Internationalization - EN/PT|

#### Possible Future Monetization Ideas

- **Propdates Rounds** (refer to "Future Ideas" for more details).
- **Airdrop Functionality** for rewarding top contributors in the Propdates leaderboard.

![Noggles Image](https://ipfs.skatehive.app/ipfs/QmdpWEc7KQvNWDKkgWXsVXrLsztyHdg3pNV9VwT9vx8mQ4)

Reference: [Noggles Platform](https://app.noggles.com)

## Team Composition and Past Contributions

The **Gnarly Devs** team consists of experienced contributors with a proven track record in managing complex migrations and developing innovative features for the Gnars ecosystem. Their extensive expertise ensures that the project will be executed effectively, delivering significant value to the community.

content_markdown:
# Gnars in Thailand: DEVcon Documentary 

## TL;DR

Join us in Bangkok for DEVCON 2024 as the Gnars team engages with the crypto community and captures key moments from the conference. We will produce high-quality audiovisual content, including interviews, event highlights, and a documentary focused on skateboarding and local culture. Our team will actively participate in the conference, networking with Web3 professionals, and pursuing NFT sales goals for Gnars. Additionally, we will host a side event at our skate house, integrating skateboarding into the crypto dialogue. All content will be made available on-chain to support the expansion of Gnars.

![](https://i.ibb.co/7V27YxD/image.png)

## Project Objectives:

- **Documenting DEVCON Bangkok 2024:** Capture the essence of the event with dynamic coverage, including talks, workshops, and interviews with leaders and enthusiasts in the cryptocurrency industry. Our team will be actively involved, documenting not just the content of the sessions, but also the energy and engagement of participants, creating a comprehensive visual narrative of the event.

- **Produce "Gnars in Bangkok" Mini Documentary:** Create a high-quality mini documentary that captures the key moments of DEVCON 2024 and our side events, blending interviews and skateboarding activities. We'll generate and distribute visual content such as photos, videos, and GIFs, making it all available on-chain across Gnars platforms. Additionally, we'll provide live coverage of the event's opening, closing, and significant highlights on Instagram and Discord, keeping the community engaged with real-time updates.

- **Exploring Thai Culture and the Global Reach of Gnars:** Beyond the conference, delve into Thailand's rich culture, traditions, and landscapes. Conduct Q&A sessions with locals from diverse backgrounds, focusing on their views on blockchain and highlighting the global impact of Gnars and Noggles. This exploration will showcase how these elements connect with remote and culturally rich areas, emphasizing GnarsDAO's presence worldwide.

|![Image](https://ipfs.skatehive.app/ipfs/QmPXxbbq9RZz22srv9PPgA1ceM4TbzTwuDuMo21rSTRhF3) | ![Image](https://ipfs.skatehive.app/ipfs/QmPUmVKaPiCcSUZwuuw5jS1psumCpgLwTQCX7REsdT6KWq)| 
| -------- | -------- | 
| ![Image](https://ipfs.skatehive.app/ipfs/QmS1UHapRY9v3L9QSHSnq4bD2TkWtK5nZftRjbUL3GfAMo)   |![Image](https://ipfs.skatehive.app/ipfs/QmQ14XPfkHR86huXJ8U8bebbb5Nb9dQrufANh9WndaKbhT)     | 

### Proposed Itinerary:
**Logistics for the Gnars Team:**

* Arrival in Bangkok: November first/second week
* Stay in Bangkok: Before DEVCON Bangkok 2024, we’ll explore the city and capture skateboarding footage. During the event, we’ll be based near the venue with Nounish partners. On November 18, we’ll drive two hours to the Skate House for a special gathering and mini-event with attendees. We’ll then spend two days at a beach area before returning to Brazil on November 23.

![](https://i.ibb.co/3FNmt3C/image.png)

This schedule ensures ample time for content creation, networking, and cultural exploration in Bangkok.

### DEVcon 
![Image](https://ipfs.skatehive.app/ipfs/QmP2TFWrrwHWtbE8PmkbiNRRa8QDq5DDdKDkMVWXpQFtqe)

As athletes and builders within the Gnars/Nouns community, we see our presence at DEVCON Bangkok 2024 as a groundbreaking opportunity. Our team of artists, skateboarders, and surfers brings a fresh, innovative perspective that’s unlike anything Gnars has done before. By showcasing the creative and unconventional aspects of our community, we aim to make a lasting impression on attendees, unlocking significant potential and driving meaningful outcomes for the entire Gnars community.

- **Networking Opportunities:** One of our primary goals is to establish strong connections within the crypto and blockchain industry. In-person interactions at events like DEVCON allow us to build meaningful relationships with industry leaders, enthusiasts, and potential collaborators. These connections can lead to future partnerships, projects, and opportunities that can further elevate the Gnars brand.

- **Content Creation:** We aim to create engaging content that captures the essence of our experience at DEVCON. This includes filming "Funny Taks" interactive Q&A sessions about the Gnars/Nouns ecosystem, vlog-style videos, and showcasing our adventures. This content not only promotes Gnars but also provides valuable insights and entertainment to our community and followers.

- **Brand Visibility:** Wearing and promoting Gnars merchandise, such as Noggles boards, keychains, and stickers, at the event will help us spread awareness about our brand. Our goal is to leave a lasting impression, ensuring that Gnars is remembered long after the event concludes.

- **Merch up:** Our plan is to bring a suitcase filled with Gnars and Nouns products, including stickers, recycled Noggles keychains, and Noggles boards, to distribute to event participants. We’ll engage the community through "Funny Talks," interactive Q&A sessions about Gnars/Nouns, using these items to spark conversations. Our primary goal is to sell as many Gnars NFTs as possible during the conference, aiming for around 100 sales by encouraging the exchange of Noggles/Gnars products in conjunction with NFT purchases.

*Production of:200 stickers , 30 Gnars T-shirts, 30 Recycled Noggles Keychain ,5 Nogglesboard, 5 Gnars eco bag, 5 Gnars caps.*

## Bangkok Trip Itinerary and Content Plan

**Outdoor Adventures:**

Bangkok is a vibrant and up-and-coming destination that offers a wide range of activities for skateboarders and explorers. For audiovisual, surfing and skateboarding enthusiasts, the city boasts renowned skateparks such as Pumptrack Bangkok and Hua Mak Skatepark, as well as the iconic Sathorn Unique Tower. Public parks like Lumphini and Benjasiri are excellent for skateboarding, while urban areas like Siam Square offer smooth surfaces and urban obstacles. In addition to skateboarding, Bangkok offers many unique cultural activities. Visit floating markets such as Damnoen Saduak and Amphawa for an authentic shopping experience directly from the boats. Explore lesser-known temples such as Wat Saket (Temple of the Golden Mountain) and Wat Ratchanatdaram, which offer unique architecture and panoramic views. Discover vibrant night markets such as Rod Fai Market and Asiatique The Riverfront, which combine shopping, street food and entertainment.

**DEVCON Bangkok 2024 Coverage:**
- Opening Ceremony: Film and document the event’s kickoff.
- Interviews with Speakers and Participants: Capture key insights and perspectives.
- Workshops and Networking Sessions: Record the educational and interactive aspects of the event.
- Startups and Innovative Companies: Conduct interviews and showcase emerging technologies.
Panel Discussions and Presentations: Film significant discussions and presentations.
Networking Activities and Exhibitor Stands: Document interactions and exhibitor showcases.
- Influencers and Investors: Interview key figures in the crypto sector.
Closing Ceremony: Capture the event’s conclusion and final moments.
Exhibition and Technological Innovations: Film the latest tech displays and innovations.
 
**Post-Event:**

- Footage Review: Analyze and compile all recorded content.
- Documentary Closure: Finalize and close the preview of Devcon documentary, ensuring a comprehensive representation of the event and experiences.

This plan will ensure a thorough documentation of both cultural experiences and the key aspects of DEVCON Bangkok 2024, while highlighting the synergy between Thai culture and the crypto community.

### Audio Visual

Our journey to DEVCON Bangkok 2024 presents a unique opportunity for Gnars. We’ll document the event, capturing keynotes, panels, interviews, and networking activities, all compiled into appealing content capsules. Post-DEVCON, we’ll capture our time at the Skate House, including a two-day gathering and mini-event, along with cultural and skateboarding imagery from stunning Thai landscapes. All visual content will be made available on-chain for NFT minting. We’ll also engage our community with live IG sessions during the event. Additionally, we’re seeking partnerships to maximize exposure, including applying for discounted and free tickets, in case we are able to save this money it will be invested into media promotion.

![](https://ipfs.skatehive.app/ipfs/QmYVZ6QKkSpFJYJrir7WLpiBLbsx9Qhenm1GSdB82L6gqx)
*Vlad and Willy at DevCon Bogotá 2022*

## Estimated Budget:

| Cost | How Much |Detail|
| -------- | -------- | -------- |
| Airfare | $ 8000 | Sao Paulo - Bankok, Bankok - Sao paulo, 4 adults    |
|Accommodation |$ 1100|2 diferent places. Between Bankok Devcon area and Skate House|
|Local transportation| $200| Metro, fast transport, such as for the event, and tourist attractions. Help with gasoline etc.
|Adventure Equipment| $500| Gnars Merch and Extra bags
|Devcon Tickets| $2000 | (4 units with desconts)
|Estimated Total| $11800| Documentary, Network, Gnars Team of 4 folks, side event, e much more. 


## Conclusion:

In summary, our participation at DEVCON Bangkok 2024 is a crucial opportunity for the Gnars community. Our blend of artistry, skateboarding, and professional expertise will bring a fresh, creative perspective that stands out, leaving a lasting impression. We believe this experience will forge valuable industry connections, enhance our credibility, and lead to tangible collaborations that can significantly contribute to our ecosystem. This journey will not only elevate the Gnars brand but also offer meaningful insights and opportunities that can drive real growth and achievements for our community.

## TL DR 

Garcia gathered 6k USD of skateboard equipment. Lets fund Garcia Rodrigues and 1 videomaker with the necessary resources to bring $6,000 worth of donated skateboarding equipment to Uganda. This initiative aims to connect and engage with the local skateboarding community, fostering growth and connection within the local skateboarding community.

## Context 

[Garcia Rodrigues](https://www.instagram.com/garciaskateboards?igsh=Mnd1dTAwdzlxNWVh) is a 39-year-old professional skater, entrepreneur, and president of the social project "[Skate Transforma Vidas](https://www.instagram.com/skatetransformavidas?igsh=dWFmcnRwbm5ucnE3)" based in Itapetininga, São Paulo. He is also the owner of [New Face SB](https://www.instagram.com/newfacesb), a company dedicated to skateboarding. Additionally, Garcia is a proud father of a pro skater [Isabelly Ávila](https://www.instagram.com/isabellyskate09?igsh=OTgzc2tqMGtidjlq). Garcia's passion for skateboarding extends beyond his professional career, as he actively engages in community outreach through his social project, aiming to transform lives through skateboarding.

|![Image](https://ipfs.skatehive.app/ipfs/QmZ7r5qLoEMG8VSge8bs6HrDKrPUSgevLjchSjnxJZLTpN)|![](https://i.ibb.co/kh6PhT3/image.png)|
|**Skate Transforma Vidas**| **NewFace SB**|
|![Image](https://i.ibb.co/yXJGdRh/image.png)|![Image](https://ipfs.skatehive.app/ipfs/QmaGBNh14egrrFXNVCwE2wanejmhjRuVkoJZbewPvd4B93)|

---

## Itinerary (13 Days)

- **Meet Davin** and Visit #1 Nouns School, Mitooma District, Western Uganda.
- Visit Uganda Initiative
- Visit Uganda Skateboard Collectives
- Connect with Other Local Skateboarding Collectives 
- DIY Projects with Locals
- Land and Local Research for a Potential Future Nounish Skatepark in Africa.


## Garcia Past Experience Donating to Uganda 

![Image](https://ipfs.skatehive.app/ipfs/QmdotDMAy2BSYeWfGTxsPFWPhXHrV83hKnCp9WacHuayT7)

We can see one of the coordinators of the Kampala Skateboard Project in Uganda announcing and expressing gratitude for Garcia's initiative to visit and continue supporting the project. This effort includes not only donating skateboarding materials but also constructing a mini ramp, providing skateboarding lessons to the community's children, and skating with them.

![Image](https://ipfs.skatehive.app/ipfs/Qmb3RaQkroFSVbqA5imfngT2tvWwFsKj2zUNYqawZPkbzn)

Here we see the joy and friendliness of the children in Uganda as they skateboard and express their gratitude to Garcia for his efforts in bringing improvements to their lives. The video highlights the poor conditions of the places where they skate, underscoring the importance of upgrading these spots and providing quality equipment so that the children can enjoy skateboarding safely.

# Maryhill Fall RVOD Freeride Sponsorship Proposal

## Event Details
- **Event**: The Maryhill Ratz 2024 RVOD Fall Freeride / Tour de Maryhill / University of Maryhill
- **Dates**: August 31st - September 2nd
- **Location**: Maryhill Loops Rd, Goldendale, WA, USA

![Image](https://ipfs.skatehive.app/ipfs/QmVnJB8uRHhL84GcRLWZUuz8VtGfNKuS8dEmWK1R4sAqom)
- **Event Link**: [Maryhill RVOD Fall Freeride 2024](https://facebook.com/events/s/maryhill-rvod-fall-freeride-2024/)

### Description
The Maryhill Ratz have been organizing events on Maryhill for longer than I’ve been skating and are one of, if not the most respected Freeride / race organizers in longboarding. The road itself is a historic landmark, being the first paved road in western America and an early attempt at creating switchback roads to make descending terrain easier for early cars. Now no longer part of the highway and located on private land, it remains a favorite spot for all types of downhill enthusiasts.

This event features a combination of Freeride, downhill lessons through the Maryhill University, and the Tour De Maryhill race. The Freeride is open to all types of downhill gravity sports, including drift trikes, and even a beagle on a skateboard. The Maryhill University, which I attended at the start of my downhill journey, has been pivotal in shaping future riders and is a major reason for my support of this event. The Tour De Maryhill race adds to the excitement, making the event more affordable and inclusive for a diverse range of athletes and spectators.

[Event Video](https://youtu.be/4HU2SprPFMQ?si=49fgKdSHsZTCg67f)

## Event Sponsorship Plan
The organizers have requested $800 USD for the podium prize money. I will distribute the prize money while highlighting our role as a sponsor. I also plan to create shirts and QR code stickers for distribution during the awards ceremony and am looking into producing banners or flags that can be reused for future events.

## Marketing Plan / Content Creation Contest
To maximize marketing from this event, I will host a content creation contest for the best video and best picture from the event. These will be posted on DH Nouns, where votes will be counted. The posts will then be shared on mainstream social media with permission from the owners to boost event marketing. I will educate participants about the platform and offer to set them up to post their content and earn rewards, in addition to potentially winning.

### Contest Details
(Details are subject to change based on community discussion)
- The contest will be hosted on DH Nouns, with one vote per person.
- It will be open for one week, with winners announced during a live stream that I will host.
- Prizes: $100 for the best video and $75 for the best picture, with the possibility of increasing the prize through delegations if people post on SkateHive.

## Further On-boarding Efforts
### Workshop
During the camping portion of the event, I will host a workshop to teach participants about our platforms and how to engage with them. I will provide hands-on support and set up accounts using my 20+ years of technical support experience.

### QR Codes and Swag
Graphics for shirts and stickers, designed by D.C.O.T.art, will include QR codes to help attendees find us after the event. Additionally, I am having several Noggles printed by a local 3D printer for media creation and giveaways during the event.

### HowDarylRolls Video
I will also shoot a video documenting my road trip to the event with friends, skating, filming the event, and the workshop. This video will be released post-event to recap our activities, illustrate our work, and be used for future marketing. More details for the documentary will be outlined in a separate proposal.

## Costs
- **Podium prizes**: $800 USD = 0.298 ETH
- **Travel and food costs**: $150 USD = 0.056 ETH

**Grand total**: $950 USD / 0.354 ETH

## Recap and Deliverables
- Sponsor the event.
- Announce the content contest.
- Film a mini-documentary about the proposal, journey to the event, and clips from the event.
- Conduct the on-boarding workshop at the event.
- Distribute prizes and QR code swag at the podium party.
- Display banners made from previous events.
- Host online voting and award ceremony for the content contest.
- Edit and release the documentary and clips post-event to reimburse the treasury through SkateHive monetization, as SkateHive’s contribution due to its smaller treasury.24:[

content_markdown:
![](https://i.imgur.com/tby00at.png)

Gnars fam 🤘

We ([Gami](https://gami.wtf) and [Joe Atkinson](https://joe-atkinson.com/)) are thrilled to announce an epic opportunity to bring the iconic Noggles Rail to the UK, with its premiere at the legendary Bay 66 Skatepark in London! 

![](https://i.imgur.com/MZWAftp.jpeg)

These noggles have been designed as a modular structure, making it easy to transport and set up at different locations, ensuring it can be stored at Bay 66 and readily available for future events and sessions.

![](https://i.imgur.com/3l5UyLk.jpeg)

The Noggles Rail has been built and will be transported from Yorkshire to London on the 24th of August, just in time for the Capital Rollers LDN JAM. This event will be a game-changer as we’ll be hosting a dedicated contest on the Noggles Rail with a £1000 prize up for grabs for quad skaters and bladers. 

![](https://i.imgur.com/ETLGlQV.png)

To top things off, we're encouraging skaters to get onchain by creating a Warpcast profile and uploading their best clips from the contest to the /gnars channel. Not only will they have the chance to win the main prize, but additional prizes will be available for those who showcase their skills on the platform.

![](https://i.imgur.com/43apqyj.png)

This is an opportunity to bring the Gnars spirit to London and elevate the local skate scene, Let's make history at Bay 66! Cheers to shredding the Noggles Rail in the heart of London!

### Request

- 4500 USDC
- 0.12 ETH

- Fabrication and Powder Coating: £1100 (1430 USDC)

***Total Cost: 4500 USDC + 0.12 ETH***

Depends on final turnout and is subject to change, but will keep everyone updated on Warpcast.

**Contest formats:**

- 20 minute open Jam session - 2 skaters advance to a head to head final winner takes all, or

**Warpcast bonuses:**

- Best dressed

- Best slam

Transfer to gami.eth who will distribute to Joe as part of onboarding him properly to the DAO and crypto in general.

title: Gnarly TPM Shredder Team

Sponsor the NGO TPM for 1 year, including:  Sponsorship for 7 TPM surfers to compete in Brazilian and state championships...
content_markdown:
![image](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/HJotPGsYC.png)
## Overview
Sponsor the NGO TPM for 1 year, including:

* Sponsorship for 7 TPM surfers to compete in Brazilian and state championships
* Introduction of around 100 kids to the digital world
* Onboarding of 2 PRO surfers to GnarsDAO
* A bunch of Gnarly merch, 7 Gnars and 3 computers
* Tons of spontaneus social media, NFTs drops and Press mídia production

## What
After the initial sponsorship by GnarsDAO in 2022 through the proposal "[Sponsor children from TPM NGO to surf](https://snapshot.org/#/gnars.eth/proposal/0x0b3d6c307f7e596892dda29cf4914598368c0b0212739081290ab6608de770cf)," TPM was able to maintain it's activities and introduce the world of Gnars and Nouns to the children through stickers and artistic activities like coloring and creating Noggles. A special Gnars t-shirt designed by Ilustradora became so popular among the children that they continue to wear it today. 

![image](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/r111_zjF0.png)



![image](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/BJyDDfjYA.png)

Additionally, numerous media pieces were created and continue to be produced by TPM, promoting the image of GnarsDAO.

However, since then, TPM has struggled to pay rent and had to relocate. The impact of the NGO on the community is substantial, and now Gnars has the opportunity again to be part of this project by covering its rent and sponsoring promising gnarly surfers.

After one year without sponsorship, we propose to sponsor the NGO TPM for another year to continue its activities and projects. This includes covering one year of rent to support approximately 80-100 children and 100-120 women, and sponsoring 7 athletes to compete in regional and national surf championships. Among these athletes, 5 are under 18, and 2 are professional surfers who frequently make it to the podium, showcasing GnarsDAO from the top!
![image](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/HyHAGQjFR.png)


In our initial proposal, we started a digital education program focused on web3, which had to be paused due to a lack of computers. In this proposal, we include the purchase of 3 computers to restart digital literacy for participants, eventually introducing web3 topics to empower them to leverage this innovation for their growth and development.

For the 2 PRO surfers, we will onboard them to GnarsDAO, leveraging the return of “That’s Gnarly” to integrate them into the community and provide an additional income source and return to the DAO.

Throughout the process, we will document activities and produce numerous videos and photos of the projects. These will be posted on That’s Gnarly and [TPM and Gnars social media](https://www.instagram.com/tpmtodasparaomar/) (Instagram and Warpcast). Additionally, we will hire [Virei Notícia](https://www.vireinoticia.com.br/) to promote the project, GnarsDAO, and the children’s competition results across major media outlets in Brazil and within the web3 community.

## Why
According to [Proposal 382](https://nouns.wtf/vote/382), the focus of the community is to fund projects that bring nounish public goods to society. The Nouns DAO has supported impactful initiatives since its inception. This proposal aims to onboard athletes who can serve as bridges to these children and use Gnars' social media to reciprocate the sponsorship, creating an additional income stream.

A one-year sponsorship allows careful onboarding and effective results, giving time to create quality content that can generate income for GnarsDAO through NFTs on Zora and/or That’s Gnarly. The press service, alongside the creation of t-shirts, caps, flags, and stickers, will ensure extensive media coverage of Gnars from the top of the podiums, as our athletes frequently place highly.

Finally, GnarsDAO will be investing in future promising athletes. These children will never forget who their first sponsors were.

## Who
[**NGO TPM:**](https://todasparaomar.wordpress.com/)
TPM is a feminist and anti-racist organization aiming to be a socio-educational institution serving the Maracaípe Bay community in Pernambuco. Since 2016, it has contributed to the personal and social development of children, adolescents, and women. TPM - All to the Sea promotes social transformation and empowerment of black women and their children through surfing and socio-educational and cultural practices.

TPM directly and indirectly contributes to universal access for children, adolescents, and women to qualified sports, education, culture, and complementary professional training practices.

**Community Context:**
Maracaípe, known for its waves and surf competitions, faces extreme social inequality despite its booming real estate development. TPM's impact includes participation in regional surf championships, leadership courses, and social organization training, providing transformative experiences in culture and sports.

![image](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/HJl_XQjK0.png)


**Impact:**

* Since 2016, TPM has lost only 4 youths to criminality.
* 10 youths over 16 work in surfboard repair after attending TPM and Surfguru workshops.
* 20 community women work autonomously in female aesthetics after completing the Prosperous Woman TPM course.
* 40 shellfish gatherers are organizing as a cooperative due to TPM's mediation with the Suape-PE Forum.

**Athletes:**

5 under 18 and 2 PROs. All of them are going to get a Gnarly merch Kit with 1 Gnar, stickers, 1 tshirt, 1 cap and 1 lo-fi noggles to make the podium gnarly dressed.

![image](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/Byh7l7stA.png)
![clipboard-image-1722655041](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/rJ1wWmsFA.png)
![12 (1)](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/rJR9lXoY0.png)
![14](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/r1vpeXsFA.png)
![13](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/BypngQjKC.png)
![15](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/rJJJZmiKA.png)
![16](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/Hk6ol7jtA.png)





**Gnars member:**

[Mari](https://twitter.com/marinioac): [Gnars Athlete](https://thatsgnar.ly/thatsgnarly/user/0x4b5f934da25c33f130efc5df47c91af1375baa30), GnarsDAO Board Member and Discord Admin, CC0 Noggles Designer (DCS [Precious Noggles](https://preciousplastic.com/noggles) and LilSisters [First 3D Print CC0 Noggles file](https://x.com/marinioac/status/1656725700290793473?s=20)), [Nounified TPM](https://x.com/marinioac/status/1656759075240046595?s=20), [Surfguru](https://www.surfguru.com.br/) partner, managed [Surfguru first educational campaign](https://snapshot.org/#/gnars.eth/proposal/0x9e670758685c096b923e0b9fa65e2e9cd44906983ea78fe73d750d77be7c568c) and [GnarsDAO Onboarding Content](https://nouns.build/dao/base/0x880fb3cf5c6cc2d7dfc13a993e839a9411200c17/vote/7?tab=details), [SurfguruDAO](https://thatsgnar.ly/surfguru) co-founder, and represented [GnarsDAO at NFT Brasil](https://x.com/marinioac/status/1665919482177495041?s=20). Mari is still an active community member making spontaneus surf and paraglide content for GnarsDAO. For the whole year, Mari will manage the entire project, ensuring all deliverables are met, overseeing onboardings, and keeping the community updated on progress and results.

## How and how long

1 Year of quality content production and onboarding:
* 1-year rent coverage
* 100 stickers
* 100 lo-fi noggles
* 100 t-shirts (to be designed)
* 100 caps
* 3 Precious Noggles (donation)
* 2 flags
* Sponsorship for 5 surfers under 18 to compete in national and regional championships
* Sponsorship for 2 PRO surfers to compete in national and regional championships
* 7 Gnars NFTs, one for each athlete
* Production of several videos and photos and posts on That's Gnarly and/or Zora
* Press media coverage from Virei Notícia about the proposal, GnarsDAO, and competition results


![image](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/rJxAuhz5C.png)



## How much for 1 year

title: The Gnarving
content_summary: Executed | When I first deployed Gnars DAO on mainnet, our auction house contract had "The Gnarving" built in. Every 1000 auctions, the aucti...
content_markdown:
![](https://i.imgur.com/R75rePA.jpeg)

When I first deployed [Gnars DAO](https://www.gnars.wtf/) on mainnet, our auction house contract had "The Gnarving" built in. Every 1000 auctions, the auction duration would double, effectively halving our NFT emission rate.

Since migrating to Base, we've yet to have another Gnarving, since we are running on Builder protocol, and not a full suite of custom contracts. So here I am proposing a Gnarving, and to make up for lost time, I'm proposing we change our auction duration to 4 hours 20 minutes.

They are currently 1 hour 20 minutes, but since we've been seeing quite a few Gnars burned, due to no bids, I think making a more substantial change makes perfect sense, and 420 has obvious memetic value lol.

This proposal also extends our voting delay from 1 day to 2, and our voting period from 4 days to 5, taking our full proposal cycle to one week (7 days). Which I think will make scheduling easier and provide a more familiar cadence for voters. 

While I'm here, I'd like to apologise for my recent absence. Especially to those I've left hanging with unanswered DMs. I was met with the opportunity to work with some of the people I most admire in crypto, and of course jumped at the chance. 

Although I'm still focused on [International Meme Fund (IMF)](https://internationalmeme.fund/), you can expect to see me around a bunch more, helping Gnars out wherever I can, during my free time. 

It's delightful to see how well things have been going in my absence. 

I appreciate every one of you!

Shred the Nouns,

[呂丹冊工](https://gami.wtf/)

title: 1 Year Sponsorship for Tom Rohrer - Toms Tutorials
content_summary: Executed · 3.00 ETH allocated | To everyone reading this, thank you for taking the time to be here and for your consideration in voting for this proposa...
content_markdown:
To everyone reading this, thank you for taking the time to be here and for your consideration in voting for this proposal. All of your support so far has meant the absolute world to me, and my life has already been changed all thanks to the Gnars community.

![Tom_Noggles_Skating_Split](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/rk4ittrFA.jpg)

I’m writing to propose a 1-year continuation of my sponsorship with Gnars. This will apply to my Tom’s Tutorials accounts as well as my personal account, in which I have 140,000 followers in total. As a part of my sponsorship, I’ll be skating Gnars designed boards in my tutorials and in all of my skateboarding clips. I will continue to inform my audience of Gnars, as well as shouting out the artists who designed the boards, while generating interest in the web3 community. I would love to propose another round of artist-submitted deck designs as well, in which I'll skate either my favorite designs or the ones that receive the most votes by the community. Otherwise I'll skate the various boards that live on Boards.wtf to continue to give exposure to Gnars.

I will also agree to represent Gnars through contest announcements, hosted videos, and wherever else I can be of service to the brand, with the goal of getting Gnars on as many skateboarders’ radars as possible. Additionally, I would love to shoutout any big initiatives that Gnars gets behind, such as skatepark project funding, rebuilds, non-profits, etc, in my tutorials on YouTube or on our Instagram. Those big achievements are extremely impactful to other skaters and well worth bringing to light to inform people of how rad Gnars is. This creates a desire for them to want to join Gnars to propose projects for their own communities.

My last proposal was a 6-month proposal that ended over a year ago and I have continued to rep Gnars everywhere that I can to this day. I ask that you please keep this in mind when voting, as I am passionate about this community and in the way I share about it with others. I recently released a [new full street part](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=0HBgcAFvUuo) in [Dabble VM issue 20](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=oVGKKXFfEi4&t=1535s) as well as on my channel that I worked on for years. In my part, I had my filmer insert a clip of me edited with a pair of Noggles on to integrate Gnars into it. 

![Peacock Noggles](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/HJRmF8iwR.jpg)

My pro model board that was originally designed for me to turn pro a couple years back was also released alongside the part. With permission from the artist, I Photoshopped the Gnars logo and a bunch of noggles onto the graphic so that they look as if they are part of the original design.

![Pro Model_Details](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/rkd9cOrY0.jpg)

Another BIG reason for this proposal, is so that I can buy an actual camera to start filming our tutorials with. I have been using my iPhone so far to film all of our content. As you may have noticed, the slow mo iPhone camera and quality is horrible, especially when zoomed in or cut up for social media, and slow motion is extremely important in filming our tutorials. Considering the rapid growth and success of our channel and our desire to provide quality skateboarding content to the world, I’ve been wanting so badly to get a professional camera. However due to finances I have just not been able to.

With these funds, I plan to buy a Sony a7S III camera with a 16-35mm f/2.8 lens, the same setup that the legendary [@bobbybils](https://www.instagram.com/p/C09oW7MpydF/) uses. It’s ability to film 4k at 120fps is ideal for skateboarding/teaching. The price of the camera, lens, gimbal, batteries and other accessories I’ll need to buy totals out to over $5700.

![Camera and Lens_2](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/HJzr3IoDA.jpg)
![Monitor_2](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/ryDL3IoDR.jpg)
![BobbyBils_CameraAndLens](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/Hycfe9SFA.jpg)


I am proposing $5500 USD to cover the majority of the costs of the camera and equipment, and 3 ETH for my ongoing 1-year sponsorship with Gnars.

To help you understand the value in what I can do for Gnars, here is what I have contributed to the brand so far since my initial sponsorship:

In our tutorials on [YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/@toms_tutorials), I’ve earned over 525,000 views while skating Gnars boards and representing the brand. In addition, I’ve earned over 705,000 views on YouTube Shorts, 43,400 views on our recently launched [Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/tomstutorials1/) page, and over 1,743,700 views on [TikTok](https://www.tiktok.com/@toms.tutorials?lang=en). Lastly, on [Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/toms_tutorials/), my videos that feature a Gnars board have earned over 10,589,000 views. And these stats don’t even include the numbers from my [personal](https://www.instagram.com/tom_rohrer/) Instagram account.

In total, the amount of views that I’ve earned so far on videos where I’m skating a Gnars board just on my Tom’s Tutorials accounts is over 13,606,100.

I would love to see that number turn into 20,000,000.

Also, I was able to shine light on multiple artists within the Gnars community that designed the boards I skated from our original 'Skateboards Everywhere Forever' prop. I skated and showcased these boards in each tutorial, shouting out the artist and directing my audience to follow them on their social platforms, in addition to directing my viewers to Boards.wtf to buy the boards themselves.

Lastly, I managed The Berrics YouTube channel for over 5 years, in which I learned how to best optimize YouTube videos to earn views consistently over long periods of time. This has reflected on our channel, as our views on all of our videos continue to increase at the same rate as they did when they were first published. Here are some examples (filmed on Gami’s green Gnars board) of videos that have continued to grow over the span of 20 months:

![YT_Graph1_Tre Flip_V2](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/HkaCA8jwR.jpg)
![YT_Graph2_FS Flip_V2](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/HJ41kPsDC.jpg)

As you can see, new skateboarders will continue to be made aware of Gnars for many years to come just through our channel.  Let’s see what we can do these next 365 days and beyond! Thanks for EVERYTHING guys!32:Tf98,I love Tom and his con

content_markdown:
![CAPAS EP YOUTUBE-indognars2](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/HyEuMACdA.jpg)

## **TL;DR**

**Intro; Reports from previous proposals. Travel Grant to create surfing content in Indonesia; Deliverables: IndoGNARS 2 short movie, 2 VLOG episodes, 16 Social media posts, 10 NFTs on Zora, Press Releases and a Movie Premiere Event.** 

**Requesting: $7.888 USDC** 

_______

#### Intro

Aloha guys, I am [Luiz Hadad](https://www.instagram.com/luizhadad), Brazilian, 34 years old, surfing since I was a little kid and have been a [Gnars surfer since September 2022](https://snapshot.org/#/gnars.eth/proposal/0x4b0fef8be71a1beae3d7d2b31d44ee2df2ca539b36aa66a8221b346f6a713c4a).

I've been in the blockchain space since 2017, working as a community builder in different projects, such as [Muda Outras Economias](https://www.muda-oe.com/) and [SurfHive](https://www.peakd.com/c/hive-141964/created). I also participate as a researcher at [Sherlock Communications](https://www.sherlockcomms.com) PR company, and as an advisor at [Kanna](https://www.kannacoin.io) and [Play4Change](https://www.play4change.io/).

During these past years, I've been trying my best to represent Gnars in and out of the water, as a surfer and community member.

![gland-compressed-prop-renewal](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/Hyh0WAAdA.jpg)
*Picture from my last time in Indonesia recording IndoGNARS*

When I became full-time in crypto, I was able to have flexible working hours and dedicate myself to my biggest passion: spending time in the ocean surfing barrels and chasing big swells.

I am a partner at [Surfguru](https://www.surfguru.com.br), Brazil's biggest online surfing community and forecast website, with 300k unique users and 2.5M visits per month.

In 2022 we launched [SurfHive](https://www.peakd.com/c/hive-141964/created), a community inspired by [SkateHive](https://peakd.com/c/hive-173115/created), with the goal of bringing more surfers onchain. We have 99 surfers from all over the world producing content regularly there.

I've had a couple of proposals approved at Gnars. Two surfing sponsorships, one travel grant to Indonesia, and two proposals to create educational content through Surfguru. Surfguru currently has an active proposal to [produce educational and onboarding content](https://nouns.build/dao/base/0x880fb3cf5c6cc2d7dfc13a993e839a9411200c17/vote/7). I am collaborating on it, with @crisciacm and @marinioac.

#### Highlights and Reports

To bring transparency and accountability, I started writing sponsorship reports. You can check my [first one from the 6-month term, from December 2022 until June 2023](https://peakd.com/hive-141964/@luizhadad/6-months-as-a-sponsored-surfer-at-gnars-dao-or-6-meses-como-um-surfista-patrocinado-da-gnars-en-pt-br). And the second one, [with highlights and learnings from my last sponsorship term, from December 2023 until June 2024](https://peakd.com/hive-141964/@luizhadad/sponsorship-report-gnars-proposal-december-2023-june-2024-or-luiz-hadad-surfer).

Last year I approved a [travel grant to Indonesia](https://snapshot.org/#/gnars.eth/proposal/0x30847f96110952ed83c1aa78c09b5cc11ef1076614560efd29de73e8b9b18894). The main deliverable from the Travel Grant proposal is the **IndoGNARS** movie. Content is available on [YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=NtZMgtDQGCI) and you can [mint it on Zora](https://zora.co/collect/base:0x114551be1ebf2896dad20bdb9ee7b59976ea1954/1). 100% of the funds go to the Gnars treasury.

**Every supporter on my last 2 props (Indo Travel Grant and Sponsorship Renewal got an IndoGNARS NFT airdropped to their wallets)**

**[Watch IndoGNARS on YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=NtZMgtDQGCI)**

I produced heaps of social media content while recording IndoGNARS, most of it posted on [Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/luizhadad), [X](https://www.x.com/luizhadad), and [SurfHive](https://peakd.com/c/hive-141964/created).

The recent release of IndoGNARS got media coverage from surfing and crypto websites, such as:

- Surfguru: [IndoGNARS: Uma Jornada de Surf, Cultura e Inovação na Indonésia por Luiz Hadad](https://surfguru.com.br/conteudo/indognars-uma-jornada-de-surf-cultura-e-inovacao-na-indonesia-por-luiz-hadad-2024-07-19-29234.html)
- Criptotendencias: [IndoGNARS: Una Jornada de Surf, Cultura e Innovación en Indonesia por Luiz Hadad](https://www.criptotendencias.com/actualidad/indognars-una-jornada-de-surf-cultura-e-innovacion-en-indonesia-por-luiz-hadad/)
- BeInCrypto: [Surfistas na Web3: Atleta Tem Salário em Cripto e Comunidade Apoia Documentário](https://br.beincrypto.com/surfistas-na-web3-atleta-tem-salario-em-cripto-e-comunidade-apoia-documentario/)
- Cointelegraph Brazil: [Crypto News: News on BlockchainRio, Mocaverse Closes with Toncoin, Hathor Network Allies with Dinamo, and Other News](https://br.cointelegraph.com/news/crypto-news-news-on-blockchainrio-mocaverse-closes-with-toncoin-hathor-network-allies-with-dinamo-and-other-news)

![quiver-indognars2024](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/ry4UOhxFC.jpg)
*Boards are with Gnars stickers ready to go for IndoGnars2*

## Travel Grant Proposal:

#### My proposal requests funding for the **IndoGNARS 2** movie.

![tubo-backside-yeganga](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/B1nf82lFC.jpg)

#### Indonesia is at the top of every surfer's bucket list. It's where the most perfect waves in the world are located. I am going to stay there for 2 months. Here's the project overview:
- **July 29th until August 8th - Boat trip in the Banyak islands** - We will have a videomaker onboard and I am taking a GoPro 12 with me.  
- **August 8th - September 28th: back to Bali and stay committed to the search for perfect waves in places like Desert Point, G-land, Nias, and Mentawai Islands.**
- **Connect with [Thiago Okazuka](https://www.instagram.com/thiago_okazuka_photography/) and [Alan Rangel](https://www.instagram.com/alanrangelfilmes/)**, two gnarly videomakers that are currently in Indonesia, to record the surfing and lifestyle content. 
- **Mint the top 10 waves on Zora during the trip, and have a social media post directing to it (50% of funds go to Gnars)**
- Edit the movie during October
- **Upload the movie exclusively on Gnars Youtube Channel**
- **Launch IndoGNARS 2 in November with a movie premiere in Espírito Santo for 50 people**

![yehgangga-barrel](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/Hkqo8neFR.jpg)

#### Content Deliverables:
**We will produce gnarly surfing content during the trip:**

- **1 Surfing movie: IndoGNARS 2, to be released exclusively on Gnars Youtube Channel;**
- **16 social media posts during the trip (2 per week on Instagram)** + lots of Instagram stories showing the trip, behind-the-scenes content, talking about Gnars, equipment, surfing spots... From July 28th until September 28th. 
- Collab Posts on social media will be aligned with Pod Media. **As we're the Red Bull of web3, we need action sports content coming in fresh all the time.** 
- **Top 10 waves/moments of the Movie will be uploaded as NFTs on Zora (50% of minting revenue will go to Gnars)**
- **Record two episodes to the VLOG ["Surfing the web3"](https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLa1XuR8fxCbn3IYsqyZAEbn6bSvAWnfe3) at the NXF Slab YouTube Channel.** Lots of content that we record often don't make the final video. I will use it in the VLOG to show the behind the scenes of the surf trip, different waves, gnarly wipeouts, my friends' footage, Indonesian culture, relationship with crypto, and Gnars. 

**[Example of a VLOG episode, that we recorded in Saquarema](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=PMpwRMQLFrQ)**

#### Content Distribution 

I will use my partnership with the [Sherlock Communications PR agency](https://sherlockcomms.com/) to promote the content to reach a broader audience, just like we did with **IndoGNARS**. 

PR promotion will happen for the **IndoGNARS 2 movie launch, VLOG Episodes, and movie premiere**. We will have distribution channels that can raise awareness for the content created and ultimately for Gnars.

Our releases are being sent to media partners like [Surfguru](https://www.surfguru.com.br), [Folha Vitória](https://www.folhavitoria.com.br), [A Gazeta](https://www.agazeta.com.br), [O Globo](https://www.oglobo.com.br), [Infomoney](https://www.infomoney.com.br), [Portal do Bitcoin](https://www.portaldobitcoin.com.br), [Be in Crypto](https://www.br.beincrypto.com), [Cointelegraph Brazil](https://br.cointelegraph.com/), [Criptotendencias](https://www.criptotendencias.com), [The Defiant](https://www.thedefiant.io), and [BlockNews](https://www.blocknews.com.br).

![2012-LuizHadad-17-05-2024](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/B1EWhBVFR.jpg)

An example of good PR work is the news of a 4m wave in Baía de Vitória, Espírito Santo - **This wave got heaps of [media coverage](https://www.folhavitoria.com.br/esportes/noticia/05/2024/ondas-gigantes-de-mais-de-4-metros-sao-registradas-na-baia-de-vitoria-surfe) because it was in epic conditions** and had good timing on the press releases.

We edited a [video of this session](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=FEA3l-tTYvk&t=1s) in the [NXF Slab Vlog](https://www.youtube.com/@nxfslab), which now has 4k views in 1 month, and highlights Gnars everywhere!



#### IndoGNARS 2:  Movie Premiere

When the movie is ready, we will do a Movie Premiere in Espírito Santo, either in Brizz Bar or Aloha Restaurant, for at least 50 people

The 1k will be invested as follows:
$ 200 Gnars merchandise and stickers
$ 150 DJ / Live Music
$ 500 food and drinks
$ 150 after movie

#### **Bonus: Attending Coinfest Asia in Bali**

I've participated in a couple of events and podcasts during the past 6 months, mostly in Brazil and Latin America. My plan is to keep participating in them, but this time in Asia, while on the Surftrip.

**I've applied to speak at the Coinfest Asia 2024, in Bali (22nd and 23rd of August 2024). Hopefully, I'll be selected and we'll be able to represent Gnars in the Conference as a speaker.**

I also connected with Yoddah.eth this week. We will get together and explore ways to nounify Bali during August and September!

![gnarly-drop-maccas](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/S19TIngKA.jpg)

## Financial Proposal
To be able to execute the proposal, I request funds to:

Thanks for your attention! I count on your support! Terima Kasih :)

Soy patinador de Descenso Profesional desde hace 10 años, **soy Campeón Nacional y Clasificado número 1 de la selección Colombia de patinaje**, me encanta enseñar mis técnicas, tengo una escuela de patinaje urbano y Descenso en Bogotá-Colombia ˋˋ[team patinaje total](https://www.instagram.com/teampatinajetotal)´´, hago Clases Magistrales en diferentes partes de Colombia y Latinoamérica.
![Imagen de WhatsApp 2024-07-24 a las 08.14.44_934987d5](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/BJSzHzkKR.jpg)

Con el patrocinio de Gnars busco invertir en diferentes áreas que debo fortalecer como deportista, a continuación haré una lista con las áreas en la que quiero mejorar:

- **Contratar entrenamiento físico y mental.**
Esto con el fin de mejorar mi estado físico y mantenerse bien ya que he venido entrenando y enseñando durante un tiempo.

- **Indumentaria para competencia ruedas, cascos, protecciones.**
Este equipo se mantendrá seguro y rápido para estar en el nivel adecuado de la competencia.

-Mech impresa con los logos de gnars usando imágenes cc0 de internet.
Esto es necesario para llevar la esencia de la comunidad en prendas y distribuir stickers y la imagen de Gnars y nouns en mis entrenamientos y competencias.

- **Tecnologia,Telefono movil con buena camara y memoria, tripode para movil y memoria extraíble.**

Con este equipo accederé a internet para compartir mi trabajo y experiencia con la comunidad, y usaré este equipo para editar y grabar contenido una importante herramienta de trabajo que utilizaré a diario. 

***Como pienso retribuir a la comunidad en linea y local:***

Tengo una comunidad importante a la que le gusta mi proyecto y está atenta a lo que enseño en redes sociales, la idea es hacer una serie de tutoriales para aprender a patinar y entrenar futuros patinadores de Downhill roller inline empoderados por la comunidad web.

La idea es publicar videos educativos  en internet y empezar a formar personas de la comunidad de habla hispana y hacer crecer el deporte en un futuro abriendo oportunidades para los patinadores y enseñando a patinar y como cunirse DAO y aprender  juntos sobre web3.

Tambien involucrare a la comunidad en formas creativas de presentar GNARS a la comunidad, hareare rutas urbanas con temáticas para dar a conocer el proyecto a la comunidad local  por ejemplo usaremos las calles para crear dibujos que hagan referencia a los noggles NOUNS marcando rutas en los mapas urbanos.

ESTAS SON MIS ESTADÍSTICAS EN REDES SOCIALES:
• [INSTAGRAM](https://www.instagram.com/patinajetotal)@patinajetotal: 22.3k Seguidores.

• [FACEBOOK](https://www.facebook.com/patinajetotal): 10.000 Me gusta – 13.000 seguidores.

• [YOUTUBE](https://youtube.com/@patinajetotal?si=gqtxmzMZ3m3vgC-V): 1.64k Suscriptores.

![Imagen de WhatsApp 2024-07-24 a las 08.14.43_5a27dcb7](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/H1qBrM1YC.jpg)

El presupuesto que propongo a GNARS DAO invertir en **mí** previo al Mundial de patinaje en **septiembre 20** buscando tener el mejor equipamiento, preparación física también hacer un buen contenido educativo antes del Mundial y video experiecia durante y después del Mundial planteo este desglose de gastos:

Preparación física y mental: **0.11 ETH**

*Este ETH se invertirá en los próximos 3 meses después de propuesta esta solicitud, espero contar con el apoyo de la comunidad Gnars para cumplir este sueño de la mano de la comunidad.*

**ENTREGABLES**
- 5 Videos patinando con merchandising de Gnars.

- 5 videos educativos enseñando del patinaje con merchandising de Gnars por ejemplo gorras camisetas y accesorios.
1. Como sentarse, levantarse, caer y frenar

- Presentare un documento publico creado en HackMD sera publicado en diciembre 1 contando la experiecia de estos 3 meses, adjuntando evidencias de las actividades y mi participación en los [WRG](https://www.worldskate.org/downhill/events-downhill/competitions.html).

Los videos tendran una duración máxima 3 minutos y serán publicados en Youtube Canal Patinaje Total.
