# Establish the Pod Media

## TL:DR
We propose establishing the Media Pod and its core infrastructure, then focusing on specific initiatives rather than broad overarching funding. This strategy sets a standard for future pods and allows for targeted funding of core media activities as detailed below, with subsequent initiatives being proposed individually, granting the community greater influence over the pod’s direction and focus areas.

## History 
We’ve had access to our [Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/gnarswtf) account for 2 months, and the positive progress is evident. We've gained approximately 300 followers and successfully held the [Gnars Contest](https://www.instagram.com/p/C8pCW8jO8CN/), which has helped define our profile’s main colors and align with the Gnars aesthetic from our website. Collaborations with our athletes and artists have brought our profile to life.

As we are primarily onchain, our Web2 presence hadn't been consistently managed before. However, after these 2 months, it's clear how valuable it is to have an active social media channel that people engage with daily. This regular interaction not only generates exciting content but also strengthens our community and enhances the visibility and impact ofno the Gnars project.

## Objectives
**Video Content Creation:** Develop a steady stream of high-quality videos showcasing our athletes, community events, and creative projects.

**Social Media Management:** Provide consistent and engaging content across Instagram and Youtube, maintaining a daily posting schedule.

**Branding:** Ensure all content aligns with GnarsDAO's branding guidelines, promoting a cohesive and recognizable identity.

**Community Engagement:** Strengthen the GnarsDAO brand through strategic media, storytelling, and interaction with our audience. Boost the main posts and achievements of athletes and the gnars community on IG.

**Growth and Interaction:** Increase followers and engagement through community activities, collaborations, and interactive posts.

**Nouns space:** Post a Pod media in Nounspace

## Strategy
Develop a monthly content calendar featuring athlete highlights, web3 project updates, creative content, and community stories. Regularly produce and release videos capturing the spirit and activities of the GnarsDAO community. Conduct regular giveaways, Q&A sessions, and interactive posts to boost engagement. Ensure all media aligns with GnarsDAO's branding guidelines for a cohesive identity. Use analytics tools to monitor growth and engagement, adjusting strategies as needed to optimize performance.


## Actions
The actions below will be carried out over 6 months, leaving until January with a maintenance plan, demand and budget.

- Daily use of IG, X, and Youtube social networks, interacting with users and keeping the page active. Create 2 different filters for Instagram, like a Gnars Mask and something interactive like a 3D one running on top of the head.

- 3 posts per week on Instagram and 2 post per month on Youtube. ranging from main achievements, main information/news, creative videos, creative arts, photography curated by our shreders, and interacting with the community. Keeping the focus of these posts on videos.

- Make 1 professional video every 15 days adapting the nouns of creation and design aesthetics, and post it in reels, as an NFT on our zora profile, integrating with our discord and Youtube channels. The last Youtube Gnars post was 7 months ago, the idea would be to upload all the videos we will make as well as the main videos and premieres created by the community on our channel, after re-editing if necessary within a gnarly aesthetic. Likewise, we only have 7 videos posted on our YouTube, a very small number for the time it took to complete our DAO.

- Carry out general curatorial work such as content from Shredders and the gnars/nouns community, to architect communication and sharing of main posts, such as saving and organizing on our drives and clouds. ([Terabox](https://www.terabox.com/portuguese/cloud-storage-pricing-plans) e GoogleDrive)

- Structure code with written video link, to github gnarsdot of the main creations, premieres and developments, by gnars partnerships, to be placed in our database following the website gnars.com, keeping it updated in sync with current achievements.

- Allocate money to hire professionals to create possible designs and illustrations, more elaborate animations for important events, such as gnars' birthday, or something special.

## Budget

- Management of (IG, Youtube and Twitter), including all branding work, communication with communities, curation of main content, art direction, brand following, daily and weekly posts, content creation and constant movements. Monthly cost for managing the 3 social media. discreet $750 per month divided between zimardrp (surfer) and will dias (skater). **Cost for 6 months: $4500 total cost**

- Video creation Renanmatic (videomaker) $375 per month. **Cost for 6 months: $2250**

- Design art work **$1000** Approximate money to carry out an average of 2 to 3 design works.

- Terabox cloud for videos, approximately 4 dollars per month. catch for 8 months. **approximately 32 to 40 dollars.**

- Money for boosting on Instagram, such as reserve money for another possible action around media, such as photography, etc. **$300**

**Total cost: $8085**

*Over the course of 6 months, we aim to deliver daily and weekly posts showcasing our best achievements and projects, maintaining active communication on our social networks and within the community. This includes reposting, producing 12 Nounish/gnarly videos (six impactful 15-25 second clips and six 30-60 second videos), and boosting the main videos. We'll also create design or animation works, including two creative Instagram filters, to celebrate events like our birthday or New Year. We will upload videos to [YouTube,](https://www.instagram.com/reel/C8xL1CppKF9/) keeping our pages active with current accomplishments. Additionally, we'll save and organize all major collections and creations in Drive, documents, HackMD, or GitHub, including links and project explanations, to facilitate possible integration with our Gnars database.*

## Time
- zimardrp, willdias, renanmatic
**2 weekly meetings between the team to define actions and share community achievements.**

content_markdown:
First NOGGLES RAIL at Medellín Colombia
Proposal
![skaye-park-ancianos](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/BkEH2-EdC.svg)

[Fuzzyface.eth](https://x.com/DCOT15) is a visual artist and promoter of DHNouns and Gnars in the sports community of Colombia. As a Gnar builder and proponent of decentralization ideas cc0 and Nouns, Fuzzyface.eth proposes the construction of a rail in the shape of noggles, using the design, materials, and measurements of the skate rail noggles sculpture created by [Colectivo XV](https://gnarsdocs.vercel.app/docs/Level-2/how-to-create-a-nounstacle), incorporating one more rail on the map, this time in **Medellín, Colombia**  [Skate plaza ancianos](https://www.google.com/maps/place/Ancianos+skate+plaza/@6.2633449,-75.5988314,17z/data=!3m1!4b1!4m6!3m5!1s0x8e4429000a6faef5:0xe861f85573f6a4b5!8m2!3d6.2633449!4d-75.5962618!16s%2Fg%2F11y3zmr1wn?hl=es&entry=ttu) .

**How Do I Plan to Do It?**
[Fuzzyface](https://www.instagram.com/danihell_969/) contacted the organizers of the event [MEDELLIN SKATEMARKET](https://www.instagram.com/medellinskatemarket2024/?g=5), [Chonetos](https://www.instagram.com/loschoneto). The event, which will take place on August 16, 17, 18 of 2024, in the city of Medellín, the event will focus to create spaces for local brands and provide an experience that brings together different actors from the national skate scene. It opens opportunities for brands to network and create spaces for on boarding and communication.

The event of 17 of august includes a day of fair where brands that pay for their space will have a stand to offer their products, and a skate jam where the best tricks will be awarded. This will be the perfect moment to present the Noggles rail to the community, where we will donate $300 USD to the prize pool. Fuzzyface will ensure high-quality documentation of the event and experience.


***Activities Proposal
Gnars will participate in two activities:***

1. Exhibitors Fair:
 17 of august 2024 at confama [video reference](https://www.instagram.com/evolucionsk8/reel/CyosIBELpCx/)
We will have a booth presenting the noggles rail and inviting the community to participate in an online event where we will deposit 0.1 ETH at contest pool.
Conduct a 25-minute onboarding talk to introduce the Medellín skater community to Gnars and Nouns.
Noggles rail will be featured in the skate jam, awarding cash for creative tricks.
Skate Jam:

[@tomchoneto](https://www.instagram.com/tomchoneto) will be in charge of the construction of the railway in Medellin will handle the construction and transportation of the rail in Medellín.

[fuzzyface](https://www.instagram.com/danihell_969/) will travel to Medellín on August 8 to oversee the construction, install Gnars logos, QR codes, and information about the artwork, and supervise the rail's paint and finishing details.

Fuzzyface.eth will also present Gnars at the stand during the event, onboarding and talking about the DAO with attendees, distributing stickers, and inviting people to join the Discord or WhatsApp community and the Gnars DAO space.

2. After the event, we will install the noggles rail in the public space "El Puente de Colombia con San Juan ([SKATE PLAZA ANCIANOS](https://www.google.com/maps/place/Ancianos+skate+plaza/@6.2633449,-75.5962618,3a,75y,90t/data=!3m8!1e2!3m6!1sAF1QipMx5YIKvIBpBZ5tSQ6bZETBb0XDZuTFlVjeyhOE!2e10!3e12!6shttps:%2F%2Flh5.googleusercontent.com%2Fp%2FAF1QipMx5YIKvIBpBZ5tSQ6bZETBb0XDZuTFlVjeyhOE%3Dw150-h150-k-no-p!7i3280!8i1846!4m16!1m7!3m6!1s0x8e4429000a6faef5:0xe861f85573f6a4b5!2sAncianos+skate+plaza!8m2!3d6.2633449!4d-75.5962618!16s%2Fg%2F11y3zmr1wn!3m7!1s0x8e4429000a6faef5:0xe861f85573f6a4b5!8m2!3d6.2633449!4d-75.5962618!9m1!1b1!16s%2Fg%2F11y3zmr1wn?hl=es&entry=ttu))" where the local and international skate community can visit it. We will donate this sculpture to the Medellín skate community, creating a connection point for the ONLINE EVENT that we will promote, leaving a landmark of Gnars' presence in the local skate scene.



How to Reward the Local Community
We plan to deposit **0.1 ETH** in a prize pool on the platform thatsgnar.ly/dhnouns/contests , which will be distributed among the top 10 most voted videos. The winners will be chosen by the downhill nouns community. We will promote the contest as follows:

DIGITAL MONEY FOR TRICKS: Send a video doing a trick on the noggles rail and win ETH. Join a community that empowers athletes.

Noggles rail reference:

![Noggles-Rail-DIY-Guide-Portuguese-8](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/Sklzj7SrdA.svg)

The rail noggles will be installed in the public space between August 19 and 21 where people will be able to record their trick and compete for a portion of Contest pool, this pool is open to donations where donors will get votes back to participate in noggles contest Medellin 2024.



***Budget Breakdown***

***1*** Sculpture Noggles Rail, Construction, painted and supports to anchor the floor: **0.25 ETH**

***1*** Stand Payment 0.018 ETH, General Prize Pool 0.018 ETH: **0.036 ETH**

Prizes for the Top 10 Tricks on the Noggles Rail at skate jam inside  medellin skate market event : **0.1 ETH**

Rail Transportation to the Event, Event to Skatepark Transportation: **0.025 ETH**

Hydration and Snacks for Volunteers Setting Up the Noggles Rail at "El Puente de Colombia con San Juan," Medellín, Colombia: **0.016 ETH**

Round-trip Tickets from Bogotá to Medellín and Airbnb Stay for Fuzzyface.eth for 11 Days:      **0.22 ETH**

Online Contest Creation for Tricks on the Noggles Rail within DH Nouns, Depositing ETH for ***10*** Winners, Open for ***5*** Weeks to pay at OP network: **0.11 ETH**

Gnars Merch Design and Printing: T-shirts x ***18*** Screen printed art front and back by dcot-deployer.eth, Flags x ***2*** for Stand Decoration, and ***500*** Stickers for Distribution to the Skate Community in Medellín (Winners and Collaborators): **0.17 ETH**

Payment to fuzzyface for production and networking within the event and during the weeks of work on the project: **0.05 ETH**



Taxes: 0.007 ETH

content_markdown:
## TL;DR
This proposal aims to preserve Bless Skateshop, a cornerstone of São Paulo and Brazil's skateboarding community, founded by skateboarders for skateboarders. Bless Skateshop plays a vital role in the local community, especially during the challenging times brought on by the COVID-19 pandemic. It serves as a guardian of Sopa de Letras Square, home to the only DIY skatepark fully supported by the Gnars community.

The recovery of Bless Skateshop is essential. With the invaluable support of skateboarder and artist Will Dias, a dedicated collaborator committed to our growth and progress, we can ensure the skateshop continues to thrive and support the skateboarding culture.

---

## Introduction

* We are Bless Skateshop, established in 2012 in the vibrant neighborhood of Santana, São Paulo. Since then, we have become a focal point for the local skateboarding community, dedicated to promoting and enhancing skateboarding culture in the region. Located next to the famous sopa de letras square, our store has become a meeting point for skaters, friends and customers, united by the same passion: skateboarding. We constantly seek to improve our space and boost skateboarding through community initiatives and events, always keeping our mission as a priority.

| ![WhatsApp Image 2024-07-01 at 17.46.30](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/Byy1Uclw0.jpg) | ![WhatsApp Image 2024-07-04 at 16.33.31](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/S11EYhFvC.jpg)|
| -------- | -------- |



--- 



* ### People Bless has had as athletes/collaborators/artists Over the 12 years of Bless Skateshop, we've had the privilege of having talented skaters such as:

- [Victor Cardoso](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=rpcXWvKUXjA)
- [Vitor Ramos](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=xojXWZVXbkQ)
- [Leo Spanguero](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=PcYQoMhSjno)
- [Sérgio Garb](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=DWBqKvd2NZc)
- [Rafa Ramos](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=3yK847p06bk)
- [Kaue Figueiredo](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=tIGQMJGEO3I)
- [Adriano Lachoviski](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=o4w_iQqz3E4)
- [André Leite](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=DCq0K3s06YM&t=64s)
- [Kaue Martins](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=DCq0K3s06YM&t=64s)
- [Alexandre China](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=3ZmBZhaK4RY&t=149s)
- [Will Dias](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=PHli_ZBNt8I)
- [Talles Silva](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=OEQDf4jK2zc)
- [Gabriel Siquiera ](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=lfD0tASarLA)


--- 
### A brief story of what it was like to go to another country, Peru, to buy skateboard decks 

For years, we've dreamed of having Bless skateboard decks, manufactured by an American company, reaching the quality of the Real, DGK and Baker brands. The scarcity of materials in Brazil has made this goal even more challenging.

At the end of 2021, an unexpected opportunity made this dream come true. After providing sales advice to my friend Julio De la Cruz, I received payment for the customized forms I had dreamed of. To get them, however, we had to travel to Peru.

A journey to Assis Brasil, with a tight deadline to pick up the shapes in Puerto Maldonado. The trip was full of anxiety and challenges, but determination drove me on.

The crossing to Peru was intense, and the lush jungle landscape made the adventure unique. Holding the shapes in Puerto Maldonado, I felt that all the effort had been worth it.

When I returned to Bless Skateshop, I brought back not only quality shapes, but a story of overcoming. This journey symbolizes perseverance for the skateboarding community in the northern zone of São Paulo, showing that we should never give up on our dreams. Skateboarding, more than a sport, is a way of life that teaches us to persist and overcome adversity.

* ### Some products made by bless

![Captura de Tela 2024-05-14 às 02.06.27](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/B1U9XOxXR.png)


---

#### To help Bless Skateshop emerge from bankruptcy, we have developed a strategic plan that includes the following key elements:

* **Financial Review:** Carefully evaluate the store's finances to identify areas of waste, reduce unnecessary costs and optimize cash flow.

* **Product Diversification:** Expand the mix of products on offer to attract a wider variety of customers. This can include accessories, clothing, footwear and even skateboard-related services such as lessons or events.

* **Marketing and Advertising:** Invest in effective marketing strategies to increase the store's visibility, both locally and online. This can include social media campaigns, partnerships with influencers, promotional events and targeted ads.

* **E-commerce:** Expand operations into e-commerce, updating the online store to reach a wider audience and facilitate sales beyond the store's physical reach.

* **Strategic Partnerships:** Seek partnerships with local collaborators, and other businesses in the community to increase exposure and collaborate on joint initiatives.

* **Long-Term Financial Planning:** Develop a sustainable long-term financial plan with clear goals and strategies to ensure the store's financial stability in the future. By implementing these strategies consistently and adapting to the needs of the market and the community, Bless Skateshop can work to overcome bankruptcy and thrive again.

* **Community Force:** Onboard the most skateboarders we can among costumers and local skaters to generate shared revenue using web3 tools

![4b26efe2-a932-4588-b612-b5bf75402a8b](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/H1VV3wWX0.jpg)

### New Website Integrated with SkateHive and base blockchain:

Bless will launch a new website integrated with SkateHive, enabling payments in HBD, HIVE, USDC, and ETH for products and services. This will facilitate secure and fast transactions, expanding payment options for our customers. Moreover, it will promote the inclusion of web3 technology and provide access to information for the community, including children and black individuals.

![Captura de Tela 2024-06-19 às 00.40.10](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/rkFQVCy8R.png)

### Objective of the Bless x GNARS Plan:

The partnership between Bless Skateshop and GNARS aims to create a synergy that strengthens by promoting skate culture and exploring new technologies in an innovative and disruptive way.

### Benefits for Bless:

Decentralized financial resources, GNARS will provide Bless with access to necessary financial investments without the need to turn to traditional banks, avoiding indebtedness with high interest rates. Using decentralized blockchain principles, Bless will be able to obtain financing in a fair and community-based way.


#### Global visibility:

 The GNARS network will help Bless expand its presence beyond São Paulo, reaching a global audience of extreme sports enthusiasts. This global visibility is key to building a strong and connected community.

### Benefits for Gnars

#### Bless x GNARS Social Barbershop:

The implementation of an exclusive Bless x GNARS awning will signal the partnership's presence to the community, offering exclusive colab products and services such as our social barbershop. This will increase local visibility and strengthen the store's image as a multifunctional meeting point for the community.
![](https://ipfs.skatehive.app/ipfs/QmVbQrWr6p8U2uRTSALHNCbrgqNc3mifER5A5YNtUoictW?pinataGatewayToken=nxHSFa1jQsiF7IHeXWH-gXCY3LDLlZ7Run3aZXZc8DRCfQz4J4a94z9DmVftXyFE) 

| ![WhatsApp Image 2024-06-30 at 23.30.04](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/BJ5ZPKgPR.jpg) | ![WhatsApp Image 2024-07-01 at 16.41.56](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/H1ZEvtlv0.jpg) |![WhatsApp Image 2024-06-30 at 23.30.05](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/rkdpYKlwC.jpg) |![WhatsApp Image 2024-07-01 at 16.41.56 (1)](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/SJHVcFlPC.jpg)  |
| -------- | -------- | -------- |--------|

**We want to [create a special](https://www.instagram.com/reel/CuDXTQrvvl0/) Reels series every 15 days or monthly, featuring haircuts in a gnarly, Nounified environment. We'll share these onchain and CC0 with the Gnars/Nouns community. Clients will get haircuts with Noggles elements and then hit a skate session on a Noggles obstacle course.**

### Bless Skateshop and Gnars DAO unite to offer a unique and advantageous experience for Gnars community members.
strengthening the connection between skateboarding and decentralized technology. Through this innovative plan, Gnars token holders will enjoy exclusive benefits that go beyond simple discounts, creating a mutual relationship of value and engagement.

### 1. Exclusive Discounts on Products and Services:

**Progressive Discounts:** Gnars members will receive progressive discounts on Bless Skateshop products, with the percentage increasing according to the amount of Gnars tokens held.

**Special Offers:** Access to exclusive offers and promotions on Bless Skateshop products and service, such as early releases, special packages, and advantageous combos,include free hair cut for all.

**Discounted Services:** Get discounts on services offered by Bless Skateshop, such as skateboarding lessons, workshops and free rental equipment para a pratica de skate na gnars plaza.

### 2.Cryptocurrency Cashback.

This option aims to expand the payment options available at Bless Skateshop and promote cryptocurrency adoption in our community. 


**Networking and Collaboration Opportunities:** 
Connect with other members of the Gnars community at Bless Skateshop, creating opportunities for networking, collaboration, and exchange of ideas evry day about web3, radical sports culture, music and Urban art.

### 3. Loyalty and Recognition Programs:

**Gnars Points System:** Accumulate Gnars points with each purchase at Bless Skateshop, redeem your points for discounts, exclusive products, and unique experiences.

**Community Recognition:**  Be recognized as a member of the Gnars community at Bless Skateshop, receiving differentiated treatment and access to exclusive opportunities.



The partnership between Bless Skateshop and Gnars DAO creates a new chapter in the history of both communities, offering mutual benefits that strengthen the skateboarding culture and decentralized technology. Through this innovative plan, Gnars community members will feel rewarded for their engagement, while Bless Skateshop will have the opportunity to expand its reach and build customer loyalty, ensuring a prosperous and sustainable future for both parties.

title: Bring Thats Gnarly Onchain
content_summary: Executed | Hey Gnars-folk, rocketman here.    I'm bringing this proposal to you all in the hopes that we can work together to bring the magic...
content_markdown:
Hey Gnars-folk, rocketman here.

  

I'm bringing this proposal to you all in the hopes that we can work together to bring the magic of [That's Gnarly](https://thatsgnar.ly/) onchain. Now that Gnars is on Base - this should be an cleaner transition. 

  

Our goal is to upgrade Daily Drops to be a permissionless onchain mechanism to **give shredders a fun place to engage in Gnars in a way that earns revenue for themselves and the treasury.** 

  
![QmVequdChfsBJUNTudjS75VHQKjwtdeAsmDxy493fCj9Sd 2](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/ByZI06avR.png)

  

We proved out this vision in 2023. That's Gnarly became the community media home of Gnars DAO. That's Gnarly helped the Gnars community earn over **10 ETH**, split between shredders and the Gnars DAO treasury. TG saw over 8k MAUs on the platform at it's peak, with stories (15+), creations (2,500+ uploaded), drops (200+), shop items like Gnarsauce all sold through the platform. TG onboarded skateboard legends like Stevie Williams, and seen content uploaded from across the globe.

  

We want to take all this grass-roots gnarly activity onchain to empower the community to permissionlessly build and onboard shredders. 
  

# The Plan

  

We previously ran Daily Drops in a manner that required manual intervention from a trusted party (rocketman, Davin, and xargs). We saw tons of shredders onboarded and over **10 ETH** earned for the treasury through the daily drops mechanic. We'd like to bring this mechanism onchain, and make it permissionless, just like the Gnars daily auctions.

  

* Gnars holders will be able to vote for the top pieces of content uploaded to That's Gnarly, fully onchain on Base

* Create a wrapper contract on top of Zora ERC1155 contracts, owned by Gnars DAO, to drop the top content every day to a new That's Gnarly NFT collection, every day, forever.

* The Daily Drop Zora contract will be a free mint, with a duration of 7 days, and a new daily drop can be created every 24 hours. These parameters can be updated by the DAO. 

  

**Other plans**

* Bring all past and future creations fully onchain to ensure maximum composability and to enable developers to build on TG.

* Bring back shredder profile pages to highlight all uploaded content.

* Open source frontend + contracts. The plan for the codebase is that it will be available open source after we finalize some company winding down, this should be done by the end of the month.

* The plan is to hand over full control to Gnars DAO. The repo will be owned by Gnars' Github, database can be transferred and set up by member(s) of the tech pod, Gnars DAO will own the contracts, and Vlad or another trusted community member can own the That's Gnarly domain. 

* We will remain available to work on it if any issues come up, and plan to stay engaged and continue working on making That's Gnarly the home for Gnars DAO with subsequent proposals and work. 

  

# Funds Request

We estimate it will take 5-7 days to build the contract, and another 4-5 days to update the UI of That's Gnarly to support the Zora open edition minting and onchain interactions.

  

### That's Gnarly Dev ($7.5k USDC)

Our team consists of two developers now, rocketman and @wkocjan.

We kindly ask for your support in funding That's Gnarly to bring it onchain so we can keep building for the community.

Let me know if you have any questions, my DMs are open.

  

*power to the people,*

  

rocketman

content_markdown:
## TL;DR 

This proposal:

1. RetroFunds Pharrá Buarque for the creation of the Noggles Rail concept, including its construction and execution manual. [Check it out here!](https://ipfs.skatehive.app/ipfs/QmUmHdQwVvPeCgQiQSZTMMuVuWbhwU92vyLjubTi2KqXaG?pinataGatewayToken=nxHSFa1jQsiF7IHeXWH-gXCY3LDLlZ7Run3aZXZc8DRCfQz4J4a94z9DmVftXyFE)

2. Mints the Guide with ZORA contract as a Droposal, using the droposal function of Nouns.build

3. Fund the concept, creation, and documentation (photo and video) of another skatable Noggles, along with its manual of replication.

## Context 

In 2022, I embarked on a journey to learn more about Web 3.0, despite still having a lot to discover. Thanks to my friend Vlad, I was introduced to cryptocurrencies, DAOs, and vibrant communities like SkateHive, Nouns, and Gnars.

One day, I had the idea to transform the Nouns logo into a skateable sculpture. That night, while at home on my computer, with a joint in hand, a glass of wine, and rock and roll playing, the concept came to me easily. However, turning that idea into reality proved to be a challenging process, involving many hours of sketching and refining until it finally came to life. 

![Image](https://ipfs.skatehive.app/ipfs/QmNrUvevpYTmnaYiZm1LwtWFRbMF8KxeRrn3jv23QbM2px?pinataGatewayToken=nxHSFa1jQsiF7IHeXWH-gXCY3LDLlZ7Run3aZXZc8DRCfQz4J4a94z9DmVftXyFE)


![](https://ipfs.skatehive.app/ipfs/QmUsZyoDH5BBoAr4L6P1HNabXu6UmXUf5extjKdG8YRJ8w?pinataGatewayToken=nxHSFa1jQsiF7IHeXWH-gXCY3LDLlZ7Run3aZXZc8DRCfQz4J4a94z9DmVftXyFE) 


After that, I showed it to Vlad and the members of the Coletivo XV, everyone loved it. At that time, we were seeking funding for the I Love XV event in Rio de Janeiro, and one of the attempts was through a proposal at Gnars, and the NOGGLES RAIL was the key for our proposal to be approved and the I Love XV 2022 to happen. 

However, I had no idea that after the event, the unveiling of the sculpture, all the tricks performed, and the wonderful party that took place, this sculpture would become so famous and celebrated among the members of the web 3.0 communities around the entire world.

![Image](https://ipfs.skatehive.app/ipfs/QmdeqeuTfC3LLoLGCRHh2AJvwV81SeRMii6s5HijDkKXBp?pinataGatewayToken=nxHSFa1jQsiF7IHeXWH-gXCY3LDLlZ7Run3aZXZc8DRCfQz4J4a94z9DmVftXyFE)

![Image](https://ipfs.skatehive.app/ipfs/QmWEPHaB3xc2iv5diXfPuMNUkPczE3KsExxmHjm8JvcJAT?pinataGatewayToken=nxHSFa1jQsiF7IHeXWH-gXCY3LDLlZ7Run3aZXZc8DRCfQz4J4a94z9DmVftXyFE)

## Guide Motivation 

Ensure aesthetic fidelity, quality, and durability to create new pieces of this infinite art.

After the completion of the first Noggles Rail and its subsequent success, many members of the Gnars community were inspired to build their own sculpture glasses in their cities. However, as the creator of the original piece, I noticed that many of these attempts contained errors in design or execution, potentially affecting their durability. To address this, I decided to create a detailed guide to ensure that Noggles Rails can be constructed correctly and maintain high quality worldwide.



![Image](https://ipfs.skatehive.app/ipfs/QmdF6m16rWXVrhxM7j6esoPpHB1Fghk6dsZCcTRX83A8H3?pinataGatewayToken=nxHSFa1jQsiF7IHeXWH-gXCY3LDLlZ7Run3aZXZc8DRCfQz4J4a94z9DmVftXyFE)

![Image](https://ipfs.skatehive.app/ipfs/QmdXtA6sgP7SvvmMiCani1hTR4M6KdAF1xF7Z1XueKcant?pinataGatewayToken=nxHSFa1jQsiF7IHeXWH-gXCY3LDLlZ7Run3aZXZc8DRCfQz4J4a94z9DmVftXyFE)

## New ⌐◨-◨ Sculptures and Guides 

After creating, building, and inaugurating the Noggles Rail, I spent several days developing additional skateable sculptures based on the same concept. In total, I designed six new pieces.

The next step in this project was to put these six new designs up for a community vote, allowing one to be selected for construction. Alongside the chosen design, a detailed manual will be created to guide the construction process.

Throughout the project, the entire process will be documented with photos and videos, capturing everything from the development stages to the inauguration, showcasing skaters in action.


# Options 

![Image](https://ipfs.skatehive.app/ipfs/QmZR6g4uTcMJ4pNgfVQvuBEMAun4jrtBRUPp9gbExVjSMQ?pinataGatewayToken=nxHSFa1jQsiF7IHeXWH-gXCY3LDLlZ7Run3aZXZc8DRCfQz4J4a94z9DmVftXyFE)

### 1. Noggles Delta

### 2. Noggles Jumps

### 5. Noggles Blocks
![Image](https://ipfs.skatehive.app/ipfs/QmeiJuBH9NvSVvNeUPG1hgFMdhzqPkmGsrFZy75f1wjamn?pinataGatewayToken=nxHSFa1jQsiF7IHeXWH-gXCY3LDLlZ7Run3aZXZc8DRCfQz4J4a94z9DmVftXyFE)

## Community Voting 

The next Nounstacle has already been decided by community voting using the Discord platform. And the chosen one was...

![Image](https://ipfs.skatehive.app/ipfs/Qma14XrRnNvBfWg9gm6jDmkUAhURC9bg4kWy7FbwLVZKSg?pinataGatewayToken=nxHSFa1jQsiF7IHeXWH-gXCY3LDLlZ7Run3aZXZc8DRCfQz4J4a94z9DmVftXyFE)


### 1. Noggles Delta

![Image](https://ipfs.skatehive.app/ipfs/QmQ6SoTxaLYnVeFio8EcsTu53QABrrazLcbBgvFfFF69cx?pinataGatewayToken=nxHSFa1jQsiF7IHeXWH-gXCY3LDLlZ7Run3aZXZc8DRCfQz4J4a94z9DmVftXyFE)



## Location

The chosen location was the ['Boulevard Olímpico'](https://www.google.com/maps/place/Boulevard+Ol%C3%ADmpico/@-22.895617,-43.1836762,16.94z/data=!4m6!3m5!1s0x997fed2a603d85:0x1aa94fba5a012081!8m2!3d-22.8957303!4d-43.1802!16s%2Fg%2F11rz2mv37y?entry=ttu). This central area of Rio de Janeiro underwent urban revitalization about 10 years ago and has become a street spot frequented by skateboarders from around the world.


![Image](https://ipfs.skatehive.app/ipfs/QmcXsnQ79sHyrKuQzncaQGtxNfPyydpqVJJpy3AwizAzaA?pinataGatewayToken=nxHSFa1jQsiF7IHeXWH-gXCY3LDLlZ7Run3aZXZc8DRCfQz4J4a94z9DmVftXyFE)

This is the initial step in the idea of spreading various skateable Noggles, expanding this already existing open-air art gallery, and adding a collection of sculptures to the existing graffiti corridor in the area. 

It is estimated that, during peak season and events, the Olympic Boulevard can receive tens of thousands of visitors per day. On normal days, the number tends to be lower, but still significant due to its attractions, such as the Museum of Tomorrow, AquaRio, and the view of Guanabara Bay.

Therefore, on a typical day, it can be estimated that the Olympic Boulevard receives between 10,000 to 50,000 visitors, while on special event days this number can increase considerably.

## Timeline and Roadmap 

1. Noggles Rail DIY Guide - [DONE](https://ipfs.skatehive.app/ipfs/QmUmHdQwVvPeCgQiQSZTMMuVuWbhwU92vyLjubTi2KqXaG?pinataGatewayToken=nxHSFa1jQsiF7IHeXWH-gXCY3LDLlZ7Run3aZXZc8DRCfQz4J4a94z9DmVftXyFE)
2. New Sculpture + Guide - DEADLINE SEPTEMBER 2024
3. Photo & Video Documantation - DEADLINE OCTOBER 2024
4. Press Release

# Bernardo Nassar Sponsorship propososal

***TL;DR***

Proposal for a 6-months sponsorship. Workshops and Meetups at athlete training centers throughout the state. Live coverage during two of the biggest swells of the season, documentary-style videos in 16:9 format showcasing action and workshops, and reels throughout the period.

## Introduction 

*This is me surfing avalanche at 2020. This wave was the biggest wave surfed on Brazil that year.*
![Bernardo Nassar (NXF) (1)_Easy-Resize.com](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/rk8wDFJQC.jpg)

This is the updated version of my previous proposal. I received a lot of feedback from the community, carefully analyzed each one, and revised my proposal. For example, I removed the request for repairs and equipment acquisition and chose to hire audiovisual professionals instead. This was one of the suggestions I received, and I decided to follow it. I believe this will be better for me as an athlete because it will allow me to produce more content, chase bigger waves and swells, and focus much more on my performance.

## About Me

I am Bernardo Nassar, I'm 33 years old, I'm an extreme wave bodyboarder, content producer. One of those responsible for putting the state of Espírito Santo on the radar of the most extreme waves in the world.

Founder and creator of the NXF Bodyboard Team, responsible for discovering Avalanche and showcasing the untapped wave potential in ES. Trailblazers in big waves within the state. Administrator of NXF social media platforms.

Throughout my career as a bodyboarder and content producer, I have always focused media on behalf of the NXF team, even while leading. However, I have a large portfolio of production available at the link below as well.


[NXF Media House](https://www.canva.com/design/DAFsXDcRnpc/I9CQcNrkpfalgXfGSOEaQQ/edit?utm_content=DAFsXDcRnpc&utm_campaign=designshare&utm_medium=link2&utm_source=sharebutton) 

***I was at [Teahupoo](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=kKU6zezwUoU) (one of the gnarlyest eaves of the world), with my friends, and one of them almost died and i saved him. T[his history virzalized and we were invitated to tell it on Fatima Bernardes program at  Globo tv](https://globoplay.globo.com/v/3682173/) (She was like Oprah in BR)***


![Bernardo - Fatima bernardes](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/ryzW9Fy7R.jpg)

[*Episode for the "Canal OFF", with Henrique Pinguim, at the Coral do Céu wave here in my hometown.*](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=v6Up5xx4CI8)


## "Web3 + Extreme Sports = GNARS"

-  Workshop "Web3 + Sports = GNARS" 

The workshops will be held at bodyboard and surf schools, where I will bring Gnars culture to aspiring athletes, aiming to enhance their onboard skills. **Other targets include the Neymara Carvalho Institute** (Neymara is a five-time world bodyboard champion), **CT Nogueira** (Training center of the ten-time state bodyboard champion), and a meetup at "WeBelieve Hub," the meetup will be the last event because the idea is to bring together athletes from local schools and the crypto community from other areas, boosting Gnars' presence in the sports scene within our state.

The work at CT Nogueira will be more focused on finding gnarly athletes and onboarding them to the DAO. 
For Neymara institue the work will be more focused on social impact, web3 knowledge, the relevance of speaking english, making a good presentations, proposals and how my work, during time at the dao, helped me to improve this skills, not even on web3 but also my athlete carrer. 

In the workshops, we'll start by explaining Web3 in general. Then, I'll delve into an explanation of what GNARS is. Following that, we'll explore the OnBoard journey: How to create a wallet, what an NFT is and its purpose, what "noggles" are, the objectives of GNARS, using Discord, and how to create an NFT on Zora.


## Content Production
| RAD swell avalanche | Late drop Coral do Céu  | Barreling |
| -------- | -------- | -------- |
|![](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/rJ-RiFJ70.jpg)|![Imagem 2](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/rJIWbqGmR.jpg) |![Imagem 3](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/Hk0f-5fQR.jpg) |  

The content produced will focus on my personal profile on Instagram, using the "collaborative post" tool to reach a larger audience, along with the profiles **@nxfslab, @gnarsdao, and @surfgurupro**, which collectively reach approximately **71 thousand followers**. Additionally, there is an opportunity with one of the largest Bodyboard profiles in the world, **@we.bodyboard,** where I've had some posts shared, boasting over **147 thousand followers**. One shared post with them garnered over **840 thousand views.**

![image](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/r1wEKFzmR.png)

![image](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/H1iHKKfXC.png)

![image](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/rylBotMXA.png)

![EPISODIO CORAL DO CEU, OFF](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/ry2bsKymA.jpg)

![cdc 2](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/B1kqycM70.jpg)

**The videos focusing on actions** both in and out of the water, workshops, and meetups will adopt a **documentary-style** format, with a duration ranging from **5 to 7 minutes**. These videos will feature action scenes, naturally, but will also include footage from workshops and meetups discussing Gnars and onboarding new community members. They will also be featured prominently on the NXF Slab Channel.

Furthermore, i'll will make press releases for media partners: Surfguru (the **biggest surf channel in Brazil**), two **local media outlets**: Folha Vitória and A Gazeta, and other national media.



![YT](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/rktqKKMXR.jpg)



In Web3, I've been posting my content that would typically be "reels" on Instagram, minting them on **Zora**, and sharing them on **FarCaster**. For longer videos, I'll be using **3Speak TV**.



![3S](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/rkucFtMmA.jpg)

![STOKEN](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/SkuqYtzmA.jpg)

![image](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/SkHm9tf70.png)

![ZORA](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/BJmxotMX0.jpg)

![Video novo 2012](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/ryrxtoNVA.jpg)

**Even before the proposal passes**, we're already producing content in the format suggested here, with the **GNARS logo always showing** in the bottom left corner of the screen.

This initiative has gotten attention from **various local traditional media** outlets and is now being directed to crypto media, **highlighting GNARS'** important role in carrying on the work.


### ***Folha Vitoria Journal***

![Folha Vitoria](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/r1oxZhEEA.jpg)

### ***Folha Vitoria TV Channel***

![Folha Vitoria YT canal](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/Sy6GWhVNC.jpg)

### ***A Gazeta Journal***

![a gazeta](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/HkxNZ3EVA.jpg)

    




* 5 videos showing the resume off the month action, and showing the workshops and meetup's. 
* 20 reels during the period
* Weekly posts on Surfhive (as already done)
* Directing 20% of Surfhive post revenue to Gnars (currently at 5%)
* Offering a day of surfing or sightseeing to any user who owns 1 or more Gnars, providing photos and videos. Also, welcoming any community member on trips we take to connect with the local community and/or spend a day surfing together.



## Gnarly Lives

We'll make a great live on a really big swell on ***Gnars instagram***, that will be presented by **@zimadrp**, on top of a jetski, during one hour or more (denpends of the audience). The ideia is make one live at the Avalanche wave, and the second at the "Coral do Céu", or another big slab. 

[***LIKE THIS LIVE***](https://www.instagram.com/p/CQTNGR2jc8O/)


## Merch

* Stickers on my boards;
* 10 Tshirts Gnars;
* 10 Hats to use, pilot and to present;
* 03 Windbrakers 


![BLUSA](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/SJpznwpyR.png)
![bonés](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/H1aGhDa1R.png)
![Ilustração-Pranchas](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/HkCM3DTJC.png)
![WINDYBREAKER-GNARS](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/H10M3DakA.png)

# Financial Proposal: Six Months Sponsorship

* 1k USD -  Editing for the 5 Videos 16:9, *200 USD per video*, these videos will have between 5 and 7 minutes, the videos will be between 5 to 7 minutes long. In them, we will talk about the preparation for surfing, tracking the weather forecast, the action itself, and also show the dynamics of the workshops and meetups.
* 600 USD - 20 Reels - 30 usd per video;
* 1.8k USD - 15 days of underwater video maker services, 120 usd daily;
* 200 USD - 5 days of videomakers for interviews, supplementary footage, and workshop footage, 40 usd daily; 
* 1.340k USD - Rental fuel, boat rental, and jet rental for production. 
* 164 USD - Rent a Gnarly Live jetski;
* 280 USD - MERCH;
* 600 USD - Organization of 2 Workshops, maybe 3 (as i mentioned above, i am still negotiating with the championship organization.) and Meetups.

**Total Proposal: 5.984k USD**

*This represents 997 USD per month for the entire delivery. It's less than 33 dollars per day during this 180 days.*


![gnar-3077](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/ryrsTB3MR.png) 

I was very happy to have the Cabeca de Tijolo NFT because it is a term in surfing, just "brick" referring to heavy and massive waves.

°°       PhArRá BuArQuE       °°    
      ` Skateboarder, Activist, Artist, Architect and Urbanist`
 ![Image](https://ipfs.skatehive.app/ipfs/QmSkVzPUubqUBeVWSe6W63juWSb62QuhhLQw71Yb6zX53g?pinataGatewayToken=nxHSFa1jQsiF7IHeXWH-gXCY3LDLlZ7Run3aZXZc8DRCfQz4J4a94z9DmVftXyFE) 

Pharrá Buarque is a Rio de Janeiro-based **architect and urban planner** who has been immersed in the world of skateboarding for over **25 years**. Combining his passion for **skateboarding** with his professional background, he rethinks on a daily basis how citizens engage with the city and urban space.

The political perspective of skateboarding, primarily seen as a social, cultural, and artistic activity, prompts Pharrá to reconsider the city as a space for occupation and interaction, not solely for consumption or work.

As a member of the Coletivo XV, he plays a crucial role in opening up the space of Praça XV for skateboarders and leading ongoing interventions that aim to integrate any citizen into urban space through skateboarding. Pharrá spent **five years** with **Rio Ramp Design** and, **for the past four years**, has been at the forefront, alongside his partner Jackson Bahia, of [**Tangente DIY Skateparks**](https://www.instagram.com/tangente_skateparks/). This venture specializes in designing and constructing skate parks, as well as various architectural, landscaping, furniture, and urban art projects related to street culture, particularly skateboarding.

Pharrá's experiences on the streets have led him to explore the city with great freedom, naturalness, and organicity, propelling him towards the path of art. He consistently questions society and its relationships through his thoughts, expressed in interactive artworks scattered throughout urban spaces.

# V.2 Gnars Sunset IRL Docuseries Premiere Event | Open Sky Cinema

**The last proposal didn't meet the minimum threshold, even with all the votes combined.**

**After receiving constructive feedback from both voters and community members, we downsized our budget and made some changes.**

Changes Made, Added, and Removed:

* Budget reduced from 5,610 USDC to 3,990 USDC
* DJ (removed)
* Decreased number of welcome drinks, merch, and stickers
* Designer (removed)
* Changed surfboard from ultimate model to regular surfboard
* Added a speech about the ecosystem
* Included more information about our Press Relations
* Sunny highlighted by WSL
* Merch kit delivery to surfers,and web3 influencers and invitations to local surf social projects
* Mix of the original logo for the Gnars event
* Added information about the backdrop, photographer, and filmmaker


## Continue Proposal 512 with Gnars for a significant impact and effective onboarding

TLDR: Rickyday (me) and Sunny Pires, along with our team, passed a prop on NOUNS, to make a Docuseries in Nicarágua to conquer a Volcano in the name of Nouns as a surf adventure.

**We aim to engage the Gnars community in the project**. Our initial idea is to have Gnars featured in the episodes (is gonna be there). **However, we would like to make an IRL event to launch the docuseries** as an extra distribuition, impact and onboarding from our initial prop to Nouns.

 We believe this docuseries and Gnars collaboration will significantly benefit our community. 

![gif1](https://i.imgur.com/bPHeIWs.gif)

![image](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/S13lo1lfA.png)

With Prop 512 we are already showing the world what is Nouns and Gnars.

We are from Brazil and there is people from San Diego,CA talking about us. See the news [here](https://www.pacificsurf.com/web-3-and-news-sponsorship-horizons-for-professional-surfers/).

![image](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/SJFAWxezA.png)

![image](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/r1CLMggGA.png)

Sunny is getting the attention from big medias as WSL (World Surf League) with noggles at the spotlight! Making the biggest score from Pro Junior category with a 9.33.
See video [here](https://www.instagram.com/p/C56PORruO1B/)


![image](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/SJpUd-OMA.png)

With all the noise we are making in the media, Nouns don't have a place to lead people directly. **Gnars would be the perfect place to lead new people.**


Rickyday and Sunny went to [Nico's](https://www.instagram.com/powercaast/) Podcast, a studio fully branded with noggles and gnars, was 1hrs talk about Surf, Gnars, Nouns and web3.

![image](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/r1n5RJeMR.png)

We have a **Press Relations** "[Virei Notícia](https://www.vireinoticia.com.br/)" paid by our main proposal for 3 months (from May to the end of July).

We have a schedule with them: in May, reaching out and discussing Nicaragua and Nouns; in June, discussing the trip experience and inviting to premiere event; and in July, the launch of the docuseries and the premiere event.

![image](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/ryWXDXvZA.png)

**Everyone is invited, entry is FREE!** 

We would love to host an Gnarly IRL Docuseries premiere event before we launch the episodes on Flamboiar's channel. **It would be a special VIP episodes for everyone attending.**

We talked to **[Casa Somar](https://www.instagram.com/p/C1J-tBvOqvh/), a renowned local guest house with a beachfront view in Búzios (Sunny's hometown)**. Is the perfect place, they have the shredder vibe giving kite surf, foil and wing foil classes. Casa Somar loved the idea of a local professional surfer launching his documentary there in the format of an open sky cinema.

![image](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/SygzJhLZ0.png)

They have a gastrobar to provide excelent food and drinks.

Combined with the press relations from prop 512 reaching out to other medias to promote it, we have the perfect combination to reach audience.

![image](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/BkKsl28ZR.png)

![image](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/HJNr6-wb0.png)

The strategy adopted for this event is to "arouse curiosity and they will come to you", rather than relying on workshops and forcing people to pay attention to us. It's been proven that this approach is challenging and not very effective.

We want people to notice this "brand" investing in this kid with surf trips, a documentary team, premiere events, and career development, creating the thought, "Okay, this is new, and I want to understand what those square noogles are all about."

**Prominent figures in the surfing world reside in Búzios** and are familiar with Sunny and his family. We also aim to hold the event on July 6th, a weekend following the world surfing championship in Saquarema (WSL CT), which is near Búzios. The top professional world champions will be in the area.

The docuseries will serve as an onboarding pathway, but it's not limited to just that. We've developed a **strategic awareness plan** involving individuals who will amplify its impact through their media channels.

**We'll be sending invitation kits to surf and web3 influencers**, inviting them to join us for a drink. Each kit will include an invitation card along with the following items, which have our own personalized logo for this project. Mixing the oficial logo from prop 512 and Gnars.

![image](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/SyDJJ7_MA.png)

* Truck hat;
* T-shirt;
* Ecobag;
* Recycle water bottle made from bambu fiber;
* Gnars invitation card;

***Invitation card*** 

![image](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/BkgetA38bR.png)

The following kit will be sent to some influencers, as: 
[Familia Surf Dog](https://www.instagram.com/familiasurfdog/) (already familiarized with gnars through Nico), [Gabriel Pastori](https://www.instagram.com/gabrielpastori/), [Trekinho](https://www.instagram.com/trekomias/), [Imbica](https://www.instagram.com/paulodiegoimbica/), [Phill Rajzman](https://www.instagram.com/philrajzman/), Gabriel Medina's family (Sunny is close of his family), [Surf do bem](https://www.instagram.com/surfdobem/) (social project for girls from 6y to 16y) from Búzios . 



![image](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/r1snXpL-A.png)

**During the giveaways following the Docuseries, Sunny and Rickyday, his manager, will give a speech**, thanking everyone and explaining a little bit about how everything happened with Nouns and Gnars.

The backdrop will be used so that people can take photos with Sunny, or alone, and post them on their social media. In the artwork, there will be a QR code that will lead people to the Gnars website, along with the Gnars logo itself. We will use the hashtags #SunnyinNicaragua and #gnarspremiere to later track the event's repercussions.

We will also have a photographer to document the event and a filmmaker to create a mini film for social media (CC0), to be shared on the team's, Sunny's, Casa Somar's, and any other interested media's networks, particularly Gnars' social media platforms.


![image](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/BytzabPZA.png)

**To spark more interest**, we'll be offering a complimentary **welcome drink** to the first 20 guests.

**Giveaways:**

# NXF Slab Sponsorship Proposal 


**TL;DR:** 

Sponsorship proposal from the NXF Slab collective for one year (May 2024 - May 2025), requesting funds  to:

1) Fix the tow-in jetski;
2) Fix the inflatable boat; 
3) Purchase new filming equipment; 
4) Budget to make gnarly edits, share on social media;
5) Organize workshops in the local community to onboard new members on Gnars and teach them how to create NFTs on Zora.


	
    
    
# **ABOUT US**


**O NXF SLAB**, is a team of Bodyboard and Surf athletes obsessed with big waves and their consequences, rewriting the history of Espírito Santo state, Brazil, in this scenario for several years. We have national and worldwide notoriety when it comes to these waves, especially regarding one of Brazil's biggest waves, AVALANCHE.


![NXF TEAM](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/SJqWtPaJC.png)



Our content production began with the emergence of Web 2.0, particularly on YouTube and Vimeo around 2005. Since then, our work has gained national and global recognition within the sport. We have had numerous appearances in newspapers, online articles, television programs, Surf and Bodyboard film festivals, and major niche media outlets worldwide.


The team consists of bodyboarders: Bernardo Nassar, Breno Kuster, Lucas Rocha, Carlos Bellumat, and André Majevski, and surfers: Luiz Hadad and Fabio Sandes.


We ventured into Web 3.0 around 2020, introduced to this new world by Luiz Hadad, who recently joined the team and had been involved in Web 3 since 2017. 


We were sponsored by a protocol to create a collection of NFTs with the content we produced, host meetup events, develop the local community by onboarding practitioners and our followers, and spread Web 3 culture. 


Currently, four team members are connected with the community, including the DAO-sponsored rider, Luiz Hadad: Bernardo Nassar, Lucas Rocha, and Carlos Bellumat.


## **Content Production**


***Summary portfolio of some spontaneous media works.***


https://www.canva.com/design/DAGAocZ9_TU/WSQoXx9ecjCIIyxBPXHduw/edit?utm_content=DAGAocZ9_TU&utm_campaign=designshare&utm_medium=link2&utm_source=sharebutton

Media returns will be concentrated on the team's Web 2.0 profiles, including shared posts and tags from **@Gnarsdao**, **@Thatsgnarly**, **@Surfgurupro**, and **@Surfhive**, reaching over **60k followers**, in a**ddition to the athletes' profiles**. We plan to release:

![image](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/rJP1iD6J0.png)





* 12 Gnarly reels during the year

* 4 Gnarly videos for YouTube, in 16:9 format. The first will summarize the first half of the season, while the second will cover the second half/end of the Brazilian Slab season. And more 2 videos "Behind the scenes", talking about the season with the Gnars Sponsorship and showing the workshops making the onboards of new members and creating NFTs. 

On Web 3.0, content production will focus on Bernardo Nassar's profile, who is currently the team's spokesperson. We will post on Surfhive, Warpcast, Zora, Discord, and provide feedback on the work's results. This includes:



![print profile stoken](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/rJ_3oD6yA.jpg)

![gnar-3077](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/B1MZaPT1A.png)





* Weekly posts on Surfhive (as already done)
* Directing 20% of Surfhive post revenue to Gnars (currently at 5%)
* Participation in online or in-person Web 3.0 events, always representing Gnars (shirts, jackets, caps)
* Organize workshops in the local community to onboard new members and teach how to create NFTs on Zora.
* Offering a day of surfing or sightseeing to any user who owns 1 or more Gnars, providing photos and videos. Also, welcoming any community member on trips we take to connect with the local community and/or spend a day surfing together.

## **MERCH**

* Stickers on my boards
* Noggles on the sides and front of the Jet
* Noggle flag on the boat


![BLUSA](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/SJpznwpyR.png)
![bonés](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/H1aGhDa1R.png)
![Ilustração-Pranchas](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/HkCM3DTJC.png)
![JET2](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/ByAfnPayA.png)
![JET4](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/SJJ7hwp1C.png)
![JET5](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/HkJXhva1A.png)
![JET6](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/HkJmnw6kR.png)
![WINDYBREAKER-GNARS](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/H10M3DakA.png)



Content production is ongoing, especially as the new season begins. Over the years, **we have invested heavily in improving** our wave riding, content **quality, image, logistics**, and distribution. **We have purchased** a flexboat, a Jet Ski, and numerous cameras during this time. However, our production is currently **compromised due to a series of problems**. The Jet Ski's engine is damaged, the boat's rear is compromised, and our filming equipment is malfunctioning due to prolonged use and exposure to harsh conditions.



# Financial Proposal: One year sponsorship

### Equipment Repair

#### Jetski Repair:
* Engine reconditioning: USD 600.00
* New Yamaha original parts: USD 1,5K
* Mechanic labor: USD 900.00
* Total: USD 3K

* Editing 4 Season Summary Videos: USD 380.00
* Organizing workshops: USD 780.00

**TOTAL: USD 9,980.00**

content_markdown:
### Introduction
Gnars was recently gifted a significant amount of [$Sendit (↗︎)](https://sendit.city/) tokens (Thanks Gami and Benbodhi!). The Gnars treasury holds **777,777,777.77↗** (7% of the total supply 🤑) with a current valuation of around **$180,000 USD** at the time of submitting this proposal. These funds aren't doing any good just sitting in the treasury, so this proposal meant to kickoff for putting these funds to work for Gnars!

### Objective
Distribute a meaningful portion (10%) of the $Sendit tokens held the Gnars treasury to the Community and Tech Pod for discretionary use towards creating community incentives, supplementing contributor compensation, and innovating token use cases.

### Allocation
**77,777,777.77↗︎** (10% of the supply held by the Gnars treasury) with a current valuation of around **$18,000 USD** at the time of submitting this proposal.

**Community Pod:** 38,888,888.885↗︎ (50%) to the [Community Pod Multi-sig](https://basescan.org/address/0x576950a0ae9c6c134a381fb4cf245e478e82ecab)

**Tech Pod:** 38,888,888.885↗︎ (50%) to the [Tech Pod Party](https://basescan.org/address/0xe63617c62f18dbc7eff3d7c9eb8bac4d1c2adecc)

### Utilization
#### Community Pod 🎉
The Community Pod will primarily focus on fostering community engagement, nurturing relationships with other communities, and amplifying the Gnars brand across various platforms. The allocated tokens will be utilized at the Community Pod's discretion, but will likely include:

- **Supplementing Compensation:** Rewards for community managers, moderators, and other contributors based on their level of engagement and impact.
- **Contests and Incentives:** Tokens will be allocated as prizes for contests, challenges, and initiatives designed to encourage community participation and content creation.
- **Social Media Engagement:** Incentives for creating and sharing engaging content on social media platforms, thereby increasing Gnars' visibility and reach.

#### Tech Pod 🤖
The Tech Pod will spearhead the exploration and implementation of innovative technical solutions, enhancing the functionality and utility of $Sendit tokens within the Gnars ecosystem. The allocated tokens will be utilized at the Tech Pod's discretion, but will likely include:

- **Supplementing Compensation:** Fair compensation for developers and other technical contributors assisting in the development and maintenance of Gnars infrastructure.
- **Experimental Technical Use Cases:** Funding for experimental technical use cases aimed at expanding the utility of $Sendit tokens within the Gnars ecosystem with the ultimate goal of uplifting both ecosystems.

Examples of some use cases currently being discussed by the Tech Pod are:
1. **Expanding Auction Bidding:** Integration of $Sendit tokens into auction bidding on [gnars.wtf](gnars.wtf) in a way that automatically settles bids in ETH.
2. **Auction Rebates:** Creation of $Sendit rebates as incentives for participation in auctions, encouraging higher auction settling and more earned ETH for Gnars.
3. **Liquidity Providing:** Creation of or contribution to existing $Sendit liquidity pools, generating novel streams of "passive income" for the Gnars.
4. **Farcaster Frames:** Creation of Farcaster Frames that make use of $Sendit tokens to encourage and enhance engagement with the Gnars ecosystem.

### Impact
#### Community Growth 🌱
Enhanced community engagement, leading to increased participation, retention, and advocacy for Gnars.

#### Technical Innovation 🦾
Introduction of novel use cases for $Sendit tokens that could lead to the discovery of new or enhanced revenue streams and strategies for Gnars.

#### Economic Empowerment 📈
Fair compensation and incentives for contributors, fostering a sustainable ecosystem of collaboration and innovation within Gnars Community and Tech Pods.

### Conclusion
Allocating a portion of the $Sendit tokens in the Gnars treasury to our Community and Tech Pods unlocks massive potential for innovation & engagement and transforms dormant assets into engines of progress.

content_markdown:
# Base Jump 4 of 4 (proposals 2-3 not required)

![](https://ipfs.decentralized-content.com/ipfs/bafybeia6q6n5247ilusjhnjxyarliorjdc7yeavtqyyb6xqmx64nsdaeaa)

This proposal is step 4 of 4 in migrating Gnars DAO operations to Base L2, allowing us to reduce our gas costs by 99% and proceed with our mission of bringing a million shredders onchain. Base Jump 2 and 3 as mentioned in [Base Jump 1](https://www.gnars.wtf/dao/proposals/37) are no longer required. Full details and a recount of what led to this outcome are explained later in this proposal.

The attached transactions send all ETH and USDC from the treasury to `gami.eth` for bridging to Base and I hereby give my guarantee it will be done without fault – if anything *is* to go wrong, I will personally cover any losses. 

There's an additional transaction that sets `gami.eth` as owner of the mainnet Gnars NFT contract, so that OpenSea descriptions may be updated, followed by setting contract owner back to the treasury.

## How we got here

Following the Base Jump 1 proposal, the transaction to pause auctions on mainnet was executed. We then proceeded to prepare Base Jump 2 which would call L2 Migration Deployer, deploy a DAO with given parameters on Base (including an Alternate Metadata Renderer), and set Merkle Reserve Minter to allow L1 holders to claim.

Unfortunately, navigating these steps was more difficult than expected due to a lack of documentation. We also witnessed high gas prices on mainnet for a sustained period, making the complex series of operations prohibitively expensive. After discussion with the Builder team, and internally with the tech pod, we decided it best to opt for a trusted Base deployment. 

### Steps taken for  Base deployment

1. [Deployed DAO](https://basescan.org/tx/0xd04448d928d0e40835894a4654c2f6675b8a79d24ee24dfa9d420876746e2c68) using nouns.build on Base
2. Called `setReservedUntilTokenId` with the [number of tokens](https://basescan.org/tx/0xda60ef32dc06b6c7f7b4aa1d8f6f4017271734e421688e046289dfa6f4f970f1) we needed to reserve (and [once more](https://basescan.org/tx/0xfdd4e0648d3033a8e2fc95d3e3e778f4067246474fc3c7c6f501964ab76d383b) to rectify an issue)
3. [Called](https://basescan.org/tx/0x93045d8be145dcfba0981644e518e98210afa099de9321d6b109169b426b4ad9) `updateMinters` with the address of the MerkleReserveMinter contract to allow minting for airdrop
4. [Called](https://basescan.org/tx/0xfe1c187acbad7d903162de2ddd46f17d1ded6cf2f1cc04c707337d5c353d9cc0) `setMintSettings` one the MerkleReserveMinter contract with our new token contract and associated settings ready for airdrops
5. [Airdropped](https://basescan.org/address/0x7D8Ea0D056f5B8443cdD8495D4e90FFCf0a8A354?fromaddress=0x3a6a50263db9b25c8d03e997373c194eb3d99dd1) tokens to holders on Base 
6. [Unpaused](https://basescan.org/tx/0xafa70f8c4ad9b503a5adbd5163ab975cdc813059c371c56e04e44afd9414204e) auctions on newly deployed DAO

### Details of deployed contracts

- NFT: [0x880Fb3...11200C17](https://basescan.org/address/0x880Fb3Cf5c6Cc2d7DFC13a993E839a9411200C17)
- Auction House: [0x494eaa...b698097f](https://basescan.org/address/0x494eaa55ecf6310658b8fc004b0888dcb698097f)
- Governor: [0x3dd4e5...5ed71b4c](https://basescan.org/address/0x3dd4e53a232b7b715c9ae455f4e732465ed71b4c)
- Treasury: [0x72ad98...14ce6f88](https://basescan.org/address/0x72ad986ebac0246d2b3c565ab2a1ce3a14ce6f88)
- Medatadata: [0xdc9799...931d4b58](https://basescan.org/address/0xdc9799d424ebfdcf5310f3bad3ddcce3931d4b58)

Gnars on Base is live at the standard nouns.build [interface](https://nouns.build/dao/base/0x880Fb3Cf5c6Cc2d7DFC13a993E839a9411200C17), auctions are running successfully, and all NFTs have been airdropped to their respective holders. 

### Important things to note

1. **The artwork currently showing is Gnars HD** by ilustradora.eth and this is because we learned our fully onchain pixel art contracts are not compatible with Builder protocol. New contracts will be written, and later a proposal submitted, to swap out the offchain art with fully onchain art.
2. **Your new Gnars on Base have the same IDs** as your originals on mainnet, but the trait combinations are different, and you can consider them additional Gnars, as opposed just being L2 copies. You maintain ownership of all your original Gnars on mainnet and they continue to function as both collectibles and voting tokens, as the mainnet DAO will continue to exist indefinitely. 
3. **Gnars 0-626 never existed on mainnet** as they were the IDs of the Gnars OG collection, which were never integrated with governance, and instead used to claim 2-for-1 Gnars V2. Now on Base, they've been minted and airdropped to the treasury, to raise additional revenues by selling them through various experiments and promotional efforts. There's even potential for the low IDs to fetch a premium and provide further value to the DAO.

## Where we're headed

You've likely already experienced the magic of Base and other Ethereum L2s, and now that the Dencun Upgrade is complete, you're enjoying sub-cent transactions and lightning speed. 

There's so much to look forward to now we've made the jump, and while there are some works in progress and upgrades that need completing, rest assured that this is just the beginning. A new frontier for Gnars DAO and action sports more broadly.

Big love famgnarly 🤘

content_markdown:
"Coverage $1000 of the short film production, which was shot in January and February, as well as a support for the final day of the project, which includes the photos + fashion film for the Ode to Skate, to be carried out on March 31st."
 
![unnamed (6).jpg](ipfs://bafybeidomwihw5dj2q4baknyvvuelqchhrxa3hnihui7ytwhonjtcdz6ke)

 
![unnamed (12).jpg](ipfs://bafybeibtdu5k32lqjd3vytnvjdv36nmoo5n4xxbzusfelgcqwpufdlwc7a)

 
![WhatsApp Image 2024-01-22 at 15.55.36.jpeg](ipfs://bafybeia5e7dkvcuw5ge6kmo62y7wzwtx3qib2anu62twj3wvdprym6dlzm)

![unnamed.jpg](ipfs://bafybeif7n5zuzrg4zdy33zfoqorirnekpyggrijws74oti2bjrrlv2xv6m)
    
    
## Introduction
The "Ode to Skate" project, conceived by Carolina Cristine, a photographer, began in 2021 as a photo project and evolved into the production of a short film in 2023. All scenes were independently recorded in that same year, but the project was not completed. Now, in 2024, we are resuming efforts to fulfill this dream and record the Ode for the second time from scratch.

Through a film, photographs, art, classical painting, street art (pixo), music, and narratives, "Ode to Skate" aims to reveal the challenges and love present in the skateboarding scene, encouraging discussions and exploring various other areas of life, connecting them to the skateboarding universe. In the future, we plan a grand launch event, including Best Trick, a photo exhibition, a party with the musicians who created the music and soundtrack, and the premiere of the short film.

Currently, we are in the process of developing the photos and the film, which explores profound themes such as freedom, work, desire, childhood, speech, art, introspection, community, expectation, and frustration. This film delves into the skateboarding universe in a unique way, bringing to light the complexities of growth and the quest for a connection with our inner child.

## Synopsis
"Ode to Skate" delves into the emotional journey of a skateboarder named Gui, who faces the challenges inherent in the process of growth. The film addresses themes such as the Peter Pan syndrome, anxiety, and the struggle against expectations that can lead to frustration. Gui, our protagonist, finds himself confronted with the responsibilities of adulthood while trying to balance his work and his passion for skateboarding. Throughout the journey, he discovers the importance of community and authenticity, with friends playing crucial roles in his transformation. The film celebrates life, art, freedom, and the quest for true essence.

The film aims to immerse itself in the world of skateboarding, classical painting, street art (pixo), emotional journey, and community, delivering a compelling narrative that critiques the current skateboarding scene and market.

In addition to the short film, we are exploring other forms of expression, such as photography. It was through photography that Carolina, the mind behind the project, after a year of capturing unpublished images, came up with the idea of telling the story in a more dynamic way. Over these nearly 3 years, we have conducted various experiments and documented them all, concluding with the final photo session set to take place in the coming days. We are also involved in music, with Pedro producing the film's soundtrack, and we are recording a song performed by Guilherme Alves, Romero, and Janvi, three skateboarders from the cast. We are also exploring classical painting and pixo with Romero and MIA. Additionally, we are delving into art and fashion, already customizing the protagonist's clothing. The idea is to develop more clothing pieces and then head to a photography studio for the final project records.

## Objetive
**Immediate Goal:**

* Clearing outstanding payments in the short film production
* Production of art on clothing pieces. 
* Photo session to be held on March 31st."

## Production Details:

Recording Dates:  21 e 22/01,  26 e 27/02 e 31/03.
Location: São Paulo, Brazil.
Team Involved: 30 technical staff and 75 cast members.

## Production Costs:

Food: $ 500
Transportation: $ 300
Equipment + Clothing + Art: $200

**Estimated Total: $1,000**

(The costs are mainly focused on food and transportation, considering the size of the team and cast. Currently, we are conducting a raffle with the goal of raising funds to expand our ideas and go further with the project.)

**Resources Obtained Through Support:**

Online Raffle: $200
Filming Equipment
Audio Capture Equipment
Van for Equipment

## Future Goal Expected for August 2024:

* Best Trick
* Artistic Interventions
* March
* Photo Exhibition
* Film Premiere
* Launch Party with Ode Musicians

### Established Partnerships

Collaboration with audiovisual team, skate professionals, and digital magazines, including Black Media, Flanantes, and Brit's.

### Support Opportunity:

We are seeking financial support to cover the costs of team food and transportation on filming and photo days.

### Offered Counterpart to Brands:

- Visibility associated with a creative and innovative project.
- Social commitment, supporting community, art, and culture.
- Recognition in front of a diverse and engaged audience.
- Story posts.
- Video of Skaters with Nouns' skateboard deck for digital media.

Main and Supporting Skateboarders participating in the project acquired the Nouns shape, during the day of productions to produce media content (photo and video) for dissemination on Gnars/Nouns social networks and for people who watch the participants' videos to awaken curiosity about the shape of Nouns glasses, bringing visibility and publicity about Nouns, and encouraging more people to join the community.
"The video will be made by Gnars athlete, Pedro Nem (nemdabel) who is already part of it and is responsible."",

## Proposal Costs:

| Category | Costs | 
| -------- | ----- | 
| Food     | **$500**  | 
|Transport | **$300** |
| Equipment Clothing Pieces Art | **$200** |
|Estimated Total: | **$1000** | 0.253 ETH Today

content_markdown:
# Base Jump 1 of 4 (pause auctions)

![](https://ipfs.decentralized-content.com/ipfs/bafybeigokefatq6ttnryxrqt2hltef4irhldx2ewsdliaw2r3eckxdgarm)

This proposal is step 1 of 4 in migrating Gnars DAO operations to Base L2, allowing us to reduce our gas costs by 99% and proceed with our mission of bringing a million shredders onchain. 

The attached transaction pauses our auctions to ensure that no new Gnars are created on mainnet. Then we can deploy our new DAO cross-chain and airdrop all token holders their same ID numbers with the same trait configurations. An ETH ask to cover migration gas costs has been omitted as external funding has been secured.

Huge thanks to [Builder DAO](https://nouns.build/dao/ethereum/0xdf9b7d26c8fc806b1ae6273684556761ff02d422/424) whose tooling allows us to deliver a smooth transition with minimal technical overhead.

## Base Jump Proposals

This proposal is the first in a series of 4 required on mainnet for our Base L2 migration and can only be executed following a successful vote.

*Here's a summary of the **4 proposals** in order:*

1. **Base Jump 1 of 4 (pause auctions)** to pause the auctions on mainnet and ensure our token supply remains static during migration
2. **Base Jump 2 of 4 (deploy on base)** to call [L2 Migration Deployer](https://hackmd.io/peXISQ2CSQOwRGmvpUpK9A#L2-Migration-Deployer), deploy a DAO with given parameters on Base (including an [Alternate Metadata Renderer](https://hackmd.io/peXISQ2CSQOwRGmvpUpK9A#Custom-Metadata-Renderers)), and set [Merkle Reserve Minter](https://hackmd.io/peXISQ2CSQOwRGmvpUpK9A#Merkle-Reserve-Minter) to allow L1 holders to claim
3. **Base Jump 3 of 4 (transfer treasury test)** to call L2 Migration Deployer and use `depositToTreasury` to transfer test amount (ETH and USDC) from L1 treasury to newly deployed L2 treasury
4. **Base Jump 4 of 4 (transfer treasury final)** to call L2 Migration Deployer and use `depositToTreasury` to transfer remaining ETH and USDC from L1 treasury to newly deployed L2 treasury

We are aware that these proposals incur substantial gas costs to voters. To ensure everyone can have their say, all gas spent on voting in this series of 4 proposals will be refunded. Refunds will be processed with a proposal immediately after Gnars is operational on Base L2.

## Builder Collaboration

We are very fortunate to be working closely with Builder DAO on migration and will be actively contributing to the Builder Protocol and shared [nouns.build](https://nouns.build/dao/ethereum/0xdf9b7d26c8fc806b1ae6273684556761ff02d422/vote/90) frontend. Due to the timeframes required for proposal voting and executions, our migration will effectively commence 26 February 2024 and be completed on or before 8 March 2024.

Builder DAO have been so kind to welcome us during Launch Week for their own migration to Base L2 from 4 to 8 March 2024 [as detailed here](https://nouns.build/dao/ethereum/0xdf9b7d26c8fc806b1ae6273684556761ff02d422/vote/90). The week-long marketing effort comprises activations with Prop House, BuilderBox, The Noun Square, BasePaint, SpeedTracer, Yellow Collective, Based Management, The Park, Unlonely, Jesse Pollak and more!

## We Need Your Help

As you can imagine, this migration is quite an undertaking, with many technical considerations and a large sum of money at stake. So we'd like to draw your attention to the following:

1. If you have ANY of your Gnars in a multisig, or any smart contract for that matter, please let us know so we can assist you
2. If you have ANY proposals that you NEED to submit during the migration period, please let us know so we can assist you

**Please note:** We may VETO proposals submitted during migration to ensure NOTHING interferes with a smooth and successful transition from Ethereum mainnet to Base L2. 

## Next Proposal

Base Jump 2 of 4 will be published no later than 26 February 2024 and it's the most important step for our migration. Merkle Proofs will be used in order to ensure that all Gnars holders are airdropped the same token IDs with the same traits on Base L2 as they have on mainnet.

Gnars DAO will still exist on mainnet, you will maintain ownership of all your Gnars on mainnet, and your new Gnars on Base L2 will be fully onchain just like on mainnet. Migrating to Base will be transformative for our DAO operations as bidding, settling auctions, submitting proposals, and voting, will cost a fraction of what they have so far.

If you have any questions, please direct them to our [Farcaster channel](https://warpcast.com/~/channel/gnars), or within the [Gnars community discord](https://discord.gg/gnars), and standby for further details in the next proposal.

*Base Jump in 4, 3, 2, 1...*
