content_markdown:
# Bring That's Gnarly onchain

Hey Gnars-folk, rocketman here.

I'm bringing this proposal to you all in the hopes that we can work together to bring the magic of [That's Gnarly](https://thatsgnar.ly/) onchain.

Our goal is to upgrade Daily Drops to be a permissionless onchain mechanism to earn revenue for Gnars and onboard shredders, and to build a Nouns Builder-esque system for local communities across the globe to easily build their own mainstream-accessible subdaos under the Gnars brand.

![](https\://revolution.mypinata.cloud/ipfs/QmXcBgGVWYqDXVms5go6wgvN4TM57iNTGV3EHfV6d7Rmgk)

# Intro

That's Gnarly became the community media home of Gnars DAO. Over the past year, our team has been working tirelessly to build and improve That's Gnarly. We've helped the Gnars community earn over **10 ETH**, split between shredders and the Gnars DAO treasury. We've seen over 8k MAUs on the platform at it's peak, with stories (15+), creations (2,500+ uploaded), drops (200+), shop items like Gnarsauce all sold through the platform. We've onboarded skateboard legends like Stevie Williams, and seen content uploaded from across the globe.

We want to take all this grass-roots gnarly activity onchain.

![](https\://revolution.mypinata.cloud/ipfs/QmNbB6MKb4m9wePeh5Exvy4b3LTEzJMggWYL5WLwDkc1Tz)

# Goal

**Our goal is to help Gnars bring a million shredders onchain.** We will do this through a clean, mobile first experience, that will be the go to spot for shredders all around the world to engage and uplift their communities through the power of Gnars DAO.

Local communities will be able to easily request funding through the DAO page, build contests to onboard their communities and friends at events, and share their gnarly media for the world to see.

Additionally, communities like DH Nouns that operate under the Gnars brand will be able to spin up their own nounish subdaos on That's Gnarly in one click, fully onchain on Base.

![](https\://revolution.mypinata.cloud/ipfs/QmVwGP2SYynwToT6yT5eyPGPaX1ivb4f2SCXpLktHFpexE)

*Gnarly contests all around the world will have a home to highlight unique events onchain.*

![](https\://revolution.mypinata.cloud/ipfs/QmWDVdbcmidCNj1FxAhRGgmKtpvYmrqLG1NQNkbZRo1F6N)

*Shredders will be able to earn money for the treasury*

![](https\://revolution.mypinata.cloud/ipfs/QmNbvEQXcgQ2fVcYKDutpo7MHR2HzKRUzpvBH1ZvyAwmPU)

# The Plan

### **A Gnarly revolution builder**

A flow for local communities to create their own Nounish DAO on That's Gnarly in one click just like Nouns Builder. These communities will be hosted on That's Gnarly, and come with splits contracts to earn treasury revenue, an onchain DAO, and an onchain feed for shredders to earn and engage on.

The communities will be built with [revolution](https://github.com/collectivexyz/revolution-protocol), a new protocol we have been developing for over a year that makes it easier to earn a vote in the DAO for your efforts.

### **Daily drops contract**

We previously ran Daily Drops in a manner that required manual intervention from a trusted party (rocketman, Davin, and xargs). We saw tons of shredders onboarded and over **10 ETH** earned for the treasury through the daily drops mechanic. We'd like to bring this mechanic onchain, and make it permissionless, just like the Gnars daily auctions.

*   Gnars holders and That's Gnarly collectors will be able to vote for the top pieces of content uploaded to That's Gnarly, fully onchain on Base L2
*   Create a wrapper on top of Zora ERC1155 contracts, owned by Gnars DAO, to drop the top content to a new That's Gnarly NFT collection, every day, forever.

1.  **Audit Funding for onchain contracts**

*   Set up an audit with 0x52 for the drop contract
*   Implement any recommended changes or fixes based on the audit findings.

1.  **Other plans**

*   Bring all past and future creations fully onchain to ensure maximum composability and to enable developers to build on TG
*   Integrate Zora free mints to enable anyone to easily mint the content they upload
*   Continue improving the [DAO](https://thatsgnar.ly/thatsgnarly/dao) page and overall site UX

# Funds Request

### That's Gnarly Dev ($20k USDC)

Our team consists of two developers now, rocketman and @wkocjan. We were previously funded by VCs, but have no money left from them.

We kindly ask for your support in funding That's Gnarly so we can keep building for the community.

We propose a budget allocation of $20k. This will help to extend runway on That's Gnarly for at least another 2 months ($5k/month/developer) and allow us to deliver the planned features and upgrades to the site. We are actively looking for other funding routes in the meantime, and envision this to be our only funding ask of Gnars DAO for the foreseeable future.

### Revolution Contract Audit ($12k USDC)

We are working on a new protocol codenamed [Revolution](https://github.com/collectivexyz/revolution-protocol).

We've already paid for an initial audit with Code4rena ($52k). All contracts will be used by the subdaos created on That's Gnarly. We are in the process of doing a second review audit with @0x52 ($18k). You can find the report from the first audit [here.](https://code4rena.com/audits/2023-12-revolution-protocol)

We asking Gnars to help cover 10% of the cost of the past 2 audits (\~$6k), which will enable us to have more time to keep building That's Gnarly.

We're asking Gnars to cover the cost of auditing the Daily Drops contract, we don't have money to pay for it ourselves. We estimate the cost to audit the Daily Drops contract at $6k. So, \~$12k total.

Let me know if you have any questions, my DMs are open.

*power to the people,*

# Mexico can be Gnar.lier

![](https\://revolution.mypinata.cloud/ipfs/QmaniVzhhT5p6UcQSrPykQb32ud5YZfXy2BiaMDPqZe91d)

📌 TL;DR

**3,625 USDC for 3 events in collaboration with an extreme sports school, and permanent obstacle creation.**

\*"We want to make a critical mass so that [thatsgnar.ly](http://thatsgnar.ly) can be what we think it can be"

\- 3 events in partnership with local organizations:

\- Skateboarding

\- Surfing

\- Onboarding dozens of young athletes

\- Laying the groundwork for a park restoration in Mexico and attract creativity and talent found in the region.

## Related work, and progress so far!

### Fattybuthappy & 0xyezh are proliferatooors

![](https\://revolution.mypinata.cloud/ipfs/QmdJ2VsFKFedHgUE5sCnhdzW1qkCVrYAFbWpnfvXx71eNG)

We have given talks about Gnars in México's local crypto hubs, \[the Bitcoin Embassy Bar]\(<https://twitter.com/bitcoinemb>) in Mexico City, and \[the Tulum Crypto Club.]\(<https://twitter.com/tulumcryptoclub>)

We're passionate and dedicated to creating Gnarly events in the amazing spots of Cancún, Tulum and Playa Del Carmen.

### What´s our vision?

**We aim to onboard Mexican athletes to the Gnars community.**

![](https\://revolution.mypinata.cloud/ipfs/QmX1HgHGizXpyzDU96fyEyPbGsNr5ybx4y9MKtHcJ7sLXi)

We attended, hacked and won at ETH Chicago and attended the[ LIL Gnarly Skate Jam](https://thatsgnar.ly/thatsgnarly/stories/thatsgnarly-24-404344) that inspired us to foster a decentralized sport scene in México.

We have commissioned and **already paid $650 of $1000** for three 78 x 78 cm cubes with two ramps and a rail as you can see the actual process of the ramp building that is not completed yet...

![](https\://revolution.mypinata.cloud/ipfs/QmZV8BSEFHKkEJVq6GmJPRxksadHEMJoA4rfjW68bcz8yN)

![](https\://revolution.mypinata.cloud/ipfs/QmSoHBxiGso5Erimq3QxgrKLs8Yo5cPX4ZLg9CTPJWUcfY)

### Roadmap & Deliverables

\- Three Gnars events in the following 3 months

\- Skateboarding and Surfing tournaments in collaboration with a local athletic education organization.

\- Welcome 60 new athletes, boosting our collective to a whopping 400 athletes!

\- Plant the seeds for Gnars MX

**Nohoch is an athletic education organization in Puerto Aventuras, Riviera Maya, Mexico.**

6 years ago a duo of brothers expanded their dad 80´s cave diving brand,

(Nohoch = Giant in Mayan,) into a surf school by hiring educators that provides mentorship in skateboarding, parkour, stand up paddle board, and archery, to 100 kids per week.

\*Through collaboration with renowned athletes, Nohoch organizes summer camps and sports trips all around Mexico to promote cultural sport competition in collaboration with local communities; reaching a total of 60 events just last year 2023!

**[\[Surfing school\]](https://instagram.com/nohochsurf?igshid=NzZlODBkYWE4Ng==\)**)**

**[\[Skateboard school\]](https://instagram.com/nohochskate?igshid=NzZlODBkYWE4Ng==\)**)**

### Skate Event

Skateboard trick contest

Game of G.N.A.R.S.

\- Signup \~15 skaters each competition,

As for any event there will be direct talks to athletes, parents, and any interested in hearing how this radical brand we all love can be leveraged to accomplish athletes goals, human sport excellency that Gnars can allow as first prop on [nouns.wtf](http://nouns.wtf) envision, as also have art materials to blaster gnarly traits in the skateparks. And overall bring more capital, builders and athletes to enrich the ecosystem always and all ways in line of last proposal in nouns.

To encourage the purchase of [Gnars.wtf](http://Gnars.wtf) NFTs, the first 21 attendees of Riviera Maya events to buy a Gnars artwork will receive personalized Instagram, Facebook, and Messenger filters of their purchased artwork. This promotion will be on a first-come, first-served basis.

### Surfing Event

Nohoch team has participated in state and national surf competitions judging by following parameters to have a dynamic and healthy competition in different categories:

\- Commitment and degree of difficulty

\- Innovative and progressive maneuvers

\- Combination of major maneuvers

\- Variety of maneuvers

\- Speed / Power / Flow.

Equip artists with paints, canvases, and tools, to foster an atmosphere where creativity knows no bounds.

### Thatsgnar.ly Contest

\- Three winners per event

\- post content, win Bigshot Noggles

\- cross post on chain and on socials, tagging Gnars

After we have 3 winners at each event, all winners will compete to win a pair of noggles, the rules are simple: the 3 people with the most clips minted or posted on <http://thatsgnar.ly> will each get its pair.

Deliverables:

Onboarded Shredders with merch

Media Content

Physical Noggle Ramp.

\- Events as with activities mentioned, open to anyone to foster the community in a new country full of talent.

\- Content about construction of noggle ramp, events, and athletes onboarding of the ramp.

\- Onboard already local athlete communities to generate awareness of Gnars show the on chain mode of sports.

## Team

### Fattybuthappy x 0xyezh

**Fattybuthappy:** Regular guy, loving innovation and seeking better ways that made me stumble upon this amazing, gnarly ecosystem. That i would love to be a part of its growth more than just buying nft, but also spreading its influence in my hometown to foster active, creative building around sports athletes.

# ZIMA ARDRP Proof of Shredding Sponsorship Proposal 6 months

## ZIMA ARDRP Proof of Shredding Sponsorship Proposal 6 months

![](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/rJXU93pq2.jpg)

https://hackmd.io/@Xaw06mIYSJyb-P7X_KRJrg/SJ6SqPjrT

## TL;DR
- Zima ARDRP Sponsorship
- Reforestation of an area deforested by fire in a surf environmental reserve
- Production of Gnars Asymmetrical surfboards 
- Production of Gnars Surf Products, send to athletes. 
- Content production with professional shortmovie of the creation process, shaper and performance of the board model, talking about Gnars.
- And of course, a lot of proliferation by Gnars, Noggles, in the universe of Surf, Fashion, Music, art.
## About Me
**Yo. Nice to meet you friends**

My name is [João Pedro Parmagnani](https://www.instagram.com/joaoparmagnani/) (ZIMA ARDRP). I'm 27 years old, a Free Surfer, multi-artist, and co-founder of [Airdrop Culture](https://www.instagram.com/airdrop.culture/), a promising project, the first Brazillian Surf Brand in Poncho Manufacturing with an in-depth essence in High-Quality Design and Surf Culture.

I am a Mechanical Engineer with a passage in the field of Oil and Gas Quality and Control of Products, Qualified in Product Management, soft skills, and more. But the truth is, my true faculty was and always will be in life.

I surf since i was child in the rotten waters of Espírito Santo amazing place that suffered a huge environmental attack, one of the biggest in the history of Brazil located in Rio Doce,  where I learned to surf right now has a lot of [heavily contaminated chemicals](https://instagram.com/reel/CHJNS9ZDH7-/), heavy metals.

![](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/HJodlMRcn.jpg)

Drawling lines at surf, currently director of projects and production at Airdrop Culture, I try to dynamically streamline all layers of my life with enthusiasm, generating opportunities and optimizing processes.

I am a surf influencer in Brazil, with connections from North to South as well as international since I lived in Chile at the Punta de Lobos World Reserve and in Ericeira, Portugal, in the last few winter seasons, producing content, connections, and Research from the Surf universe.

![](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/Hy0VlWDsn.jpg) 

I identify myself with the gnars vibe because I see myself as one. I'm an alternative surfer of crazy boards, models totally outside the basic standards and extremely performant. I also like to create some pretty crazy arts with whatever resources I have in front of me, linking drawings, prints, assemblies, photographs and crafts. Syntropy

Started with the involvement of Web3 when I became interested in NFTs, looking how to create and develop something on top of it. At that time, I was already working on an open-source project on plastic with friends from Precious Plastic ES. That's when Luiz Haddad invited me to surf Web3. He did my Onboard at That's Gnarly, and soon after at Gnars, we minted this classic NFT minted for 420. Thank you, Bro.

![](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/Byw1a6T5h.png)

I could be paying Luiz in HIVE because I'm a member of the SurfHive community and I write about Surf and culture articles there, and I get crypto for it.

![](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/HJIzdT6q2.jpg)

This picture was my first Drop at That's Gnarly, the first Regência NFT, and I also won first place in the Surfguru Dao Ultimo Swell championship.

>***Check-Out some Posts at Surf Hive Community** :)*

> [Recycled Wax Srapper](https://peakd.com/hive-141964/@joaoparmagnani/recycled-wax-scraper-precious-plastic-es)

>[Punk and Underground: The Subversive Movement Riding the Waves of the Surf](https://peakd.com/hive-141964/@joaoparmagnani/enpt-br-punk-and-underground-the-subversive-movement-riding-the-waves-of-the-surf)

>[4 years with Asymmetrical Surfboards](https://peakd.com/hive-141964/@joaoparmagnani/enpt-br-4-years-with-asymetrical-surfboards) 

>[Incredible and polluted waves 🆘 Sink or Swin](https://peakd.com/hive-141964/@joaoparmagnani/enpt-br-incredible-and-polluted-waves-sink-or-swin)

> [The commodification of surfing: commercial influences and the evolution of the sport in the consumer society 🕶](https://peakd.com/hive-141964/@joaoparmagnani/enpt-br-the-commodification-of-surfing-commercial-influences-and-the-evolution-of-the-sport-in-the-consumer-society)

I also dedicate years as a scholar and developer of Asymmetrical Surfboard models in partnership with Shaper Maze Surf Crafts.

Asymmetrical boards revolutionized the surfing world by challenging closed conventions. With their innovative designs and intentional asymmetries, they opened up new possibilities for maneuvers and experiences for surfers. Likewise, the Web3 movement and the punk spirit are shaking up the centralized structures of the internet.

![](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/r1lxeRT93.jpg)

While asymmetrical boards brought new energy to surfing, the Web3 movement is injecting new energy into the internet. Both are driving innovation, diversity, and freedom, allowing individuals and communities to explore new territories and challenge the limitations imposed by traditional structures.

## Gnarthete's Journey (onboarding + progress tracker)

* Before making this prop I was advised by Luiz to check out the Athlete's Journey. This protocol is very interesting to ensure the trajectory of the athlete and how he added value to the community.

* I started using the community 11 months ago through Thats Gnarly, then with Surf Hive, co-relating posts on with gnars. Today I am a member of That's Gnarly with some Drops, producing content to expand the community on the decentralized platform, supporting Gnars at SurfHive, as well as buying NFTs projects from Thats Gnarly, Surfguru DAO, Nouns and Gnars. 

* I already understand better the system of the community itself and I think could be a good time for a Sponsorship prop, before the turn of the year, because next year I would like to be executing these projects in favor of gnars and not taking the courage to upload any props.

* My Journey at Gnars was very organic. I simply identified with the proposal, branding, artistic trait of the content presented and with the participants of Gnars.. so, i started surfing this wave on Web 3. 


## Public Goods
### Green Plan 
The idea is to invest 1000 USD in the reforestation of an area that was deforested due to a fire. This area is Rebio (biological reserve) de Comboios, a surf spot, rich in culture and biodiversity in Brazil, which suffered the biggest environmental crime in the history of Brazil, with the dumping of 40 million m3 of toxic mud in the Rio Doce flowing into the mouth of the river, right next to this fire region.

The base of the Tamar Project in Espírito Santo is also located in the reserve, carrying out various actions, where professionals in the area monitor the beaches and local biome.

![WhatsApp Image 2023-12-12 at 15.48.21](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/HkeEEP8Ia.jpg)
Aerial view of the area that was devastated by the fire
![WhatsApp Image 2023-12-12 at 16.12.43](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/Syl4VPILa.jpg)

Map created for this proposal by Tunan Thome, tuberider oceanographer to help understand the area, where within the green area is REBIO and the red line is the place of fire & reforestation and the red diamond corresponds to the mouth of the Doce River.

This project will be an honor to carry out and be able to share with all you. It's already something that I really enjoy and have been doing for a few years with local regency friends, but for personal use, now being able to help the community is incredible.

### Action

* Divide the 1000 USD for the purchase of seedlings of some species, exemplo *"Aroeira, Almescla, Bromelias"* previously indicated by [Hauley Valim](https://www.instagram.com/hauley.valim/) who is already involved in Web 3 with the [Muda](https://www.instagram.com/mudaoutraseconomias/) project and also by Tunan Thome, native. Both contain knowledge of agroforestry, and will assist in planting and management.
 
* Hold 2 moments with ASR, the Regencia Surfing Association with breakfast and full support, to plant these seedlings throughout the demarcated territory, an awareness meeting in the village and in the surf community.

The seedlings will be purchased from Hauley and another biologist friend from Aracruz, Arthur, completing the local cycle.

I am co-creating this part of public goods in partnership with Luiz, so the objective is for him to help me with this project, just as I also help with the projects they seek to develop for Gnars.

![noundry-studio-noun (2)](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/B1Ff3JBI6.png)
*Gnars Plant Head playing with Noundry Studio*

## Budget and Deliverables

### Production ''Gnars Quiver'' Asymmetrical Gnars Board, Products, Stickers, Shredding at Social Media and Public Goods.

I would be honored to become a Gnars athlete, as I identify with the GnarsDAO and how the community itself works. True! I'll commit myself to propagating noggles/Gnars/That's Gnarly in my social media, nounshing the close friend through art, social influence in the field of culture, art, skateboarding, surfing, fashion and conservation of the environment and Web3. 

I have many friends in the field of art, creation of illustrations, etc. Some of them are already interested in the universe of web3, NFTs, I really intend to introduce gnars, the decentralized model of community that encourages athletes and movements around skateboarding and surfing for the people they had around. I also believe that thats gnarly is a good way for the user to start becoming familiar with blockchain tools, discord, auction and aggregator platforms. Onboarding more people, using what the community has to offer, state-of-the-art governance, art creation, athlete support and socio-environmental impact initiatives, a lot of cool things to address.

Gnars asymmetric board model, and to produce products aimed at targeting influential surf athletes in the surf business. and also -produce, in partnership with a professional filmmaker friend, shorts of surfboard Asymmetric Gnars Project and other moments, in high quality and propagated in the media. There will be a daily **nounification** where the people involved leave their ballast, and I believe this can be really cool for the Gnars community. 

- ### Asymmetrical Gnars Board


| Sweet Amnesia Model | Pik Fork Model  | Paralelogramo DMT Model |
| -------- | -------- | -------- |
| ![Imagem 1](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/Ska5LCa53.jpg) | ![Imagem 2](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/rkTqICp5n.jpg) | ![Imagem 3](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/B1a9IRTq3.jpg) |

Examples of possible asymmetry models that I aim to develop with my Shaper.

**Production Cost: 450 USD per unit**

*illustrative photos, but in theory we would put the noggles in the Asym Gnars models under the lamination fiber in a harmonious way or maybe even on the entire board, for example the skateboard that @willdias make. Forever with the noggles on the board.* ⌐◨-◨

So, I budgeted 1 model to be produced with the support of this prop that I would use in this next season of high waves and tubes that are to come. However, we can study the future possibility if you think it's cool to produce a Gnars asymmetric board model for the Gnars Shop.

- ### Hood (Gnars-Airdrop Culture-SurfGuru) Art Collaboration

**Production Cost: 24 USD per unit**

## Proliferation

- ### Asymmetrical Boards Plans:

I have the goal of increasingly integrating Brazilian surfing, the surf core moviment, just like the Surf Gnars team. 

I'm always out there jumping into the waves and showing new creations to surfers from different spots. I will dialogue about Asymmetrycal Gnars model in the sand on the beach, lending Gnars Asym Model to friends for surf sessions, developing media to send out to the community, as well as in an online campaign on profiles [@airdrop.culture](https://www.instagram.com/airdrop.culture/) [@joaoparmagnani](https://www.instagram.com/joaoparmagnani/) [@mazesurfcracts](https://www.instagram.com/mazesurfcrafts/) [@we.collective](https://www.instagram.com/we.collectivee/) [@itemfilmes](https://www.instagram.com/itemfilmes/)


- ### Product Plan Airdrop Culture Gnars Surf Guru

Upload the two shirt models via dropshipping with the [Reserkavink Platform](https://reserva.ink/surfguru?collection=SURFGURU/) , which makes it possible to have the product available in virtual stock without having to physically produce it, so the platform produces the product once is sold on the internet, and charges a fee to the user for this, in this case, as Surf Guru already has the registration, it would come at a low cost and would enable other people in Brazil to have the product in a simple way, but the best of it is that when a product is sold, part of the money goes back to the DAO.

**Every 3 months, SurfGuru checks product sales with the platform, and I intend to share the sales results here in the prop page group.**

| 40% Sales value | 30% Sales value | 20% Sales value |
| -------- | -------- | -------- |
| Airdrop Culture     |       DAO/Gnars     | SurfGuru (product that has the photo printed on it, 10% goes to the Photographer)     |

***Luiz and I thought of this as an initiative to not have too much production cost, but to enable online sales throughout Brazil, generating an interesting movement in the Surfing universe as well as enabling financial returns for DAO.***

The idea of ​​making these products is also add value to gnars, so I listed some friends who are involved in Surf and the energy that echoes in this project, many of which are already associated with that's gnarly or giving indirect support to athletes who already are present here, to send de products, stickers and Gnars Keychains made by Recycled plastic, spreading noggles in different areas. For Sure keeping voices up to date on the production of boards, products and shipping to athletes... sharing moments in the community. 

I will leave the instagram link of the athletes in question for sending the gnars products with a brief description. ***Gnarly surfers.***

- ### Production of content:

Creation of Blogistic Content for the Airdrop Culture Website, IG and the possibility of a future physical magazine, using all the materials we already have such as, [Example 1](https://www.instagram.com/p/CxnVNtTro6a/?img_index=5/), [Example 2](https://www.instagram.com/p/CxEScSpvLnA/?img_index=1/),, so, it would consist of developing an artistic drawing board like this with everything that happened in this proposal , in addition to producing boards, reports, arts, products and also making a post on the [Gnars website](https://gnars.com/) And in the stories of thats Gnarly, as well as providing this material in English for better fluidity on Web3.

The idea is to make a video with an original surfing aesthetic, like VHS or old style in partnership with Item Filmes, a film producer from the Brazilian Cultural Branch, showing the process of producing surfboards with subtitles in English, in addition to reporting how we got support from gnars to make this board, here it comes, painting and then the test, surfing images with a Gnars Asymmetric board.

Here is the link [Okê Okê](https://nobodysurf.com/ok-ok/) of the last production of Item Filmes in the short "Oke Oke" that I was able to participate. The film was released on NobodySurf, a popular surfvideo community with 542k followers.

- ### Gnars keychain production:

| Keychains Marine Life by Precious PLastic ES | CNC Router Machine | ARDRP Surf Scraper Recycled |

As I said, I work with friends from [Precious Plastic Espírito Santo](https://www.instagram.com/preciousplastic.es/) OG [fcarva](https://thatsgnar.ly/thatsgnarly/user/0xaaed9fff9858d48925904e391b77892ba5fda824/collection) and I want to produce Gnars keyrings made from recycled plastic. It's a process we've already done and it would be awesome to do it for gnars. The creative part is also interesting where we take a plastic sheet and cut it on a cnc router machine. We can also record a [video](https://www.instagram.com/p/CxJW5jQPnBc/) of the complete process from keyrings to the athletes' kit listed above, accompanying the other products and also produce a few more quantities, I thought about sending it to anyone going to a crypto event this year representing Gnars to possibly distribute it to the community.

### Davin's Notes:
Really want to thank Josh and Trevor for being patient with us as we go through the gnars political cycle to resolve some underlying issues in our DAO. Expect a final proposal from Vlad to make it official that we now only give away 1 Gnar per Shredder.

## Introduction
This counter counter -proposal is designed to ensure the onboarding of Josh Lippi and Trevor Banta is made Clear with the standardized practices of Gnars DAO. In keeping with our commitment to fairness and consistency, this proposal over writes the 2 other Proposals which both got over 80+% support from voters

## Background

This proposal provides clarity from the two "successful" proposals which are:
1. https://snapshot.org/#/gnars.eth/proposal/0x3dcb9566427c72d318242451eac0e8e37ec338f63c4813ffcbf9cffc7603f188 (FOR - 85%, AGAINST - 14.95%)

content_markdown:
# Help Miguel 🤘

![](https://i.ibb.co/300zYtJ/miguelzin-1-min.png)

**TL;DR**
Miguel is a 5-year-old boy born with several limb deficiencies, yet he is a HUGE fan of skateboarding and radical sports.

Our goal is to help Miguel obtain a prosthesis to enhance his quality of life and enable him to participate in more sports. We will document this journey with Pedro Quintas, a high-tier skate athlete in Brazil with over 200k followers.



---

## **About Miguel**

Even before Miguel took his first breath, fate had already dealt him a challenging hand. His father's departure left a void that would shape his journey, but it was the very beginning that foreshadowed a life marked by unique struggles.

As Andressa, Miguel's resilient mother, faced the first ultrasound, an unsettling truth unfolded—the ominous revelation of her unborn child's imminent physical challenges. The diagnosis confirmed a congenital condition that manifested as a complex set of malformations: absence of upper limbs, a shortened femur on the left side, and a complete absence of the femur on the right.

Miguel's story, however, transcends the boundaries of his physical limitations. It caught the attention of SBT, an open television channel that decided to share his inspiring journey with the world. A [video](https://youtu.be/Nlpz_SfypHE?si=yzW45REIkSeuV-7X), meticulously crafted to depict Miguel's indomitable spirit, is a testament to the strength found within the human will, a beacon of hope in the face of adversity.

You can find it [HERE](https://youtu.be/Nlpz_SfypHE?si=yzW45REIkSeuV-7X).

Undeterred by the challenges that life threw his way, Miguel emerged not just resilient, but downright gnarly. Far from letting his physical limitations define him, he embraced life with infectious enthusiasm. Skateboarding, swimming, beach outings, and even the world of art – Miguel reveled in them all. His zest for life knows no bounds.

**Miguel + Skateboarding**

Miguel's passions and pursuits are vividly captured in his videos, offering a glimpse into a life filled with determination and joy. To experience the vibrant tapestry of his interests, one need only explore the collection of videos that showcase Miguel's indomitable spirit.

His story is a beacon of inspiration, demonstrating that adversity can be transformed into opportunities for growth and fulfillment.

Our collective aspiration is to recognize Miguel as a member of Gnars, a community that celebrates and empowers Persons with Disabilities (PwD). Through his unwavering positivity and resilience, Miguel becomes a pioneer, forging a path for others to follow.

Here you can see several videos of Miguel having a good time while Skateboarding: [HERE](https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1Ny9XFfvbzhW1FRgM0-GIinARXnPHOMt2?usp=drive_link)



---

## **Content Creation + Pedro Quintas**

Our aspiration is to forge a dynamic partnership with Pedro Quintas, collaborating to create compelling content featuring Miguel, showcasing Gnars as a community dedicated to supporting and celebrating people from all walks of life.

[Pedro Quintas](https://www.instagram.com/pedroquintas13/) embarked on his skateboarding journey at the tender age of 3, quickly earning the reputation of a prodigy. His ascent to the elite echelons of the sport culminated in representing Brazil in the inaugural Skateboarding Olympics. 

At a mere 10 years old, Pedro astounded the skateboarding world by becoming the youngest Brazilian to execute a 540° trick, and by 11, he conquered the formidable Mega Ramp – setting unprecedented records. Presently engaged in the Olympic Qualification for Paris 2024, Pedro is tirelessly honing his skills for the global stage and concurrently crafting his next Video Part. Currently ranked number 4 in Brazil and 20 globally, Pedro's remarkable journey continues to inspire enthusiasts worldwide. 

Explore more of his incredible work [here](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=7nNLtBAysuo) and [here](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=KVi1HHX65Ac).

**[Twitter](https://twitter.com/loud_quintas)** (40.8K Followers)
**[Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/pedroquintas13/?hl=pt-br)** (206K Followers)
**[Tiktok](https://www.tiktok.com/@loud_quintas)** (14.6K Followers)

---

## Proliferation Proposal

We are genuinely eager to contribute to this project as it encapsulates the authentic essence of community and empathy. 

The impact of this prosthesis extends far beyond the realm of technology; it profoundly influences someone's life. Additionally, it presents a unique opportunity to showcase the values of Gnars within the vibrant skate community in Brazil.

**The Content Proposal can aggregate value in a few verticals:**

i) Produce gnarly content ;

ii) Lead community building efforts such as: hosting events/meetups, onboarding new members, help building tools, create partnerships that will benefit DAO members, and represent the DAO everywhere you go.

iii) Create/collaborate on a focus on public goods, both on Gnars and Nouns. In this case, support PwD(People with deficiency). 

iv) Start a partnership with Pedro Quintas, and have more impact in Brazil skateboard scene. 


**Pedro Quintas deliverables will be:**

**Instagram/TikTok Reels:** A dynamic showcase of Pedro Quintas and Miguel skateboarding together, shooting a VOD and short video.

**Instagram Posts:** A captivating photo featuring Pedro and Miguel, capturing the essence of their collaboration and the diversity of the Gnars community. It will have Noogles/Gnars stickers on his helmet and board.

**Tweet:** A concise and engaging tweet amplifying the collaboration between Pedro Quintas and Miguel, emphasizing the inclusivity championed by NOUNS.

**Community Socials:** Participation in Twitter Spaces/Discord AMAs with Gnars

---

## Prosthesis - Details

![protese](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/H1LOwQvYT.png)

![Captura de tela 2024-01-18 193400](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/r1H9vXvFp.png)

---

## Planned schedule for 2024:
We are planning to record all the content in March 2024:
It takes 20-40 days to receive the prosthesis because it comes from outside of Brazil.

Shooting of the video in São Paulo/Brazil as soon as the prosthesis is finished.

---

## Funds

We are requesting a total of **8.1k USDC for acquiring the prosthesis** and **1k USDC to invest in the content creation for the whole process as a documentary** : One day with Pedro Quintas and Miguel, filmmaker, and photographer.

**Total: 9.1k USDC**24:["$","di

# Proposal for Funding Gnars Tech Pod & Development

## Proposal for Funding Gnars Tech Pod & Development

**Objective**: 
To secure $10,000 USDC & 25 Gnars in order to support the development and maintenance of the core infrastructure for Gnars, enhancing the overall user experience and functionality of the Gnars ecosystem.

**Definitions**:
- Tech Pod: Members of Gnars Discord with the "@POD: Tech" role
- Tech Party: People who are assigned in the [Tech Party](https://www.party.app/party/0x0e4b654fc57d68fba4e64932e33e515a9400a65f) app to govern funds

**Scope of Work**: 
- Development, maintenance and optimisation of the main auction & DAO site [gnars.wtf](https://gnars.wtf).
- Development, maintenance and optimisation of frontends that interact with the Gnars contract suite such as [settle.wtf](https://settle.wtf).
- Exploration and implementation of innovative methods to distribute the funds effectively via bounties, retro rewards and small grants using tools such as prop house or coordinape for example.

**Budget Allocation**:

The $10,000 USDC will be used to:
- Fund development bounties.
- Provide retroactive compensation for voluntary contributions.
- Support innovation and research using other fund distribution methods.

The 25 Gnars will be used to:
- Fund development bounties.
- Reward active participants in Tech Pod endeavors.
- Other various fun and gnarly purpose.

***Note:** It might be hard to provide a detailed breakdown of ETH allocation for each project/task ahead of time since part of this initiative is to outline some bounties and maintenance work, potentially setup a prop house round for innovation ideas and retro fund voluntary contributions that have impact.*

**Management and Oversight**:
Upon success of this proposal, the funds will be sent to the [Tech Party](https://www.party.app/party/0x0e4b654fc57d68fba4e64932e33e515a9400a65f). Decisions regarding fund distribution will be made collectively, ensuring transparency and fairness, but will ultimately be at the discretion of the Tech Pod members of the party. We would like to start with a small enough amount that the risk is low to the DAO, but large enough to prove the model with meaningful rewards for contributors.

**Timeframe**:
These funds are expected to cover an amount of work at least equivalent to that of hiring a developer for the same work as carried out. We estimate that it will take 1-3 months to distribute the funds from this proposal.

**Expected Outcomes**:
- Continuous improvement in the core infrastructure of Gnars.
- A fully functional auction/DAO site.
- Seamless frontends for user interactions.
- Enhanced community participation through fair compensation models.

**Reporting and Accountability**:
Updates will be provided to the community from the Tech Pod, detailing the progress of each project or group of periodic tasks, funds utilised, and achieved outcomes.

**Risks and Mitigation**:
Potential risks include delays in development, unforeseen technical challenges, however, using retro funding models and smaller incremented bounties, we should be able to mitigate any serious risk.
As for the code itself, most is likely to be frontend and not contract level, and there will be trusted managers of the GitHub repositories to approve pull requests. Any contract upgrades (not foreseen) would need to be approved via proposal prior and potentially be audited to avoid any nasty surprises. But again, we don't foresee anything of this nature in this proposal's scope. 

**Feedback:**
Community members are encouraged to share feedback, suggestions, or concerns in the Gnars Discord. 

**Party:** https://www.party.app/party/0x0e4b654fc57d68fba4e64932e33e515a9400a65f

![image](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/SkxkJ7wc6.png)

**Additional Transactions:**

_If this proposal passes, a multi-sig transaction will be initiated to transfer 25 Gnars (to be chosen by the multi-sig signers at the time of the transaction creation) to the Tech Party._

title: Maré Gnars Breakers

content_markdown:
# Maré Gnars Breakers

*submitted by \*rocketman on behalf of Irven*

I am Irven Oliveira, Born in the Complexo da Maré favela in Rio de Janeiro, began dancing in the street with his childhood friends inspired by a DVD of the legendary RedBull BC ONE 2005, Since then never stopped playing soccer for so unknown BREAKING, one day dancing with his friends in the street where they lived, some guys passed and saw that scene and stopped to observe, and automatically approached and minutes later were dancing along with Irven and his friends, who danced there and represented the purest BREAKING, the same way it was born in the african-american and latin communities in the United States in the 70s.

### tldr

I have created the Maré Breakers project, which emerged after observing the interest of young people and children in the community for the activity, where the classes happen without structure, in the open sky and the objective of this proposal is with the support of the GnarsDao obtain a structure to teach the modality and ally with knowledge about Crypto introducing the young people who live in the favela to the world of the web3.

![](https\://revolution.mypinata.cloud/ipfs/QmQsMyYXwJEdR3cp5N8L4ijKrGyesVHthop3cbmJoJpUJK)

# **Overview**

We can give possibilities to Children and Youngsters who live in imminent social risk in the communities of Nova Holanda and Parque União, in the surroundings of Complexo da Maré, in the Municipality of Rio de Janeiro, with involvement in the Art and development of all the processes of Introduction to Breaking Dance and the WEB-3 World using the Reproduction of KNOWLEDGE as the main instrument of learning and reflection about the history, its different segments and its applications within the world we live in. 

BREAKING, regardless of gender, is a real form of socio-cultural inclusion of young people, fundamental for the awakening of children, and for them to become multipliers of the learnings of the process.

Identifying potential talents in the actions developed by the  Breakers of Maré, and awakening them to opportunities for transformation, makes these children and young people see the Maré Breakers of Maré as a real welcoming reference, a laboratory for the creation of future athletes, Olympic medalists, holders, teachers, and producers of culture. 

The belonging and identity of the territory are the basis of the project, working the whole methodology designed for immersion within the Classes - this direct contact with the productive processes - Understanding and working this step by step is fundamental to the success of the activity.

![](https\://revolution.mypinata.cloud/ipfs/QmTJuRw3upJ7MAXoPo3LiGpWr4jFLi9G4k6obBp2ds7WYQ)

![](https\://revolution.mypinata.cloud/ipfs/QmZaFFr5TXX9jsA5KwUM5Lc4fHMKQqJRv421anr1BUGx8S)

# **Target**

To train about 20 young people and children and turn them into future professionals .  The project's extension intends to create a solid bond in the relationship between instructor and student, to the point of having enough time to identify and work in the best way possible and in an individual way with all those who participate in the project.

In this scenario, the work methodology fits into the reality of each one, directing them to their specificities throughout time.

The project will last 3 months, divided into 1 modules of 1 months each, with direct impact on the transformation of each participant.

![](https\://revolution.mypinata.cloud/ipfs/QmUKTSGyM93Hpfu7bwSSfmwKUp1CQXjmWFXZc9GMGiQamL)

Shirt model

### **Methodology and educational plan**

The established lesson plans will divide the 20 participants into two classes of 10 students each, separating them by age group, since our target audience is youth and children between the ages of 7 and 18. The first group will be made up of students between the ages of 7 and 13; the second group will comprise young people between the ages of 14 and 18. Classes will take place twice a week for two hours. The workshop will be divided into 3 distinct modules;

### **1st Module: Immersion, What is Break**

*   Introduction to Dance : 
*   history, concepts, propulsors; 
*   Introduction to Basic Steps: names, practices;
*   What are TOP-ROCK- DROPS- FOOTWORK- FREEZE- POWER MOVIES
*   Lecture with other renowned B BOYS

### **2nd Module: Becoming a Bboy**

*   Variations of TOP-ROCK - DROPS - FOOTWORK - /guide;
*   FREEZE variations - POWER MOVES
*   How to Breathe while dancing in a competition
*   Battle Tips ( BOOK THE ART OF BATTLE )
*   BÔNUS (Maré style footwork, one of the fundamentals of breaking dance developed at Maré complex) where the B BOY, makes footwork using geometric shapes, during his dance and makes it more fluid and creates endless possibilities for movement 
*   Breaking Life Style

### **3rd Module: Introduction to WEB-3**

The content taught will be supported by Ramon, Noun Builder in several projects, including 

*   What is WEB-3;
*   What cryptocurrencies are;
*   What is a blockchain;
*   What is NFT;
*   How to create a Crypto Wallet;
*   Basic knowledge of DAO;
*   Introduction to the Gnars ecosystem;

# Place

The workshops will be held in the COMPLEXO DA MARÉ community, in Marémusicrec. A structured physical space, which, with the approval of this project, will be revitalized for carrying out all Activities.

![](https\://revolution.mypinata.cloud/ipfs/QmSLo64DY7BMQpN8LDqcUNVUdstkTg1kixLjLSNvd9aomC)

![](https\://revolution.mypinata.cloud/ipfs/Qmeg6AYeA2RNfZUjUEtgZNcg4TSgENM2aLY99aWovVSZ3u)

**For classes to start we need to repair the floor, fill some holes, redo the grouts, seal the floor, buy new rugs the size of the slab, tatamis, and make new graffiti on the walls, with the name of the project and the gnars logo**

**Link to the detailed video showing the floor and walls**

<https://drive.google.com/file/d/1xD31E2g92Flclk5keE8ippMe83CmzzyQ/view>

slab plant 

![](https\://revolution.mypinata.cloud/ipfs/QmW5C6VMaBXHLXT6ES9rQBwqMK7mqEZAfYQ1JiWt7oqZFg)

# Budget

Our idea is also to continue with training and classes after the 3 sponsored months, keeping the space open for the training of students and bboys and bgirls from the Mare Complex and Rio de Janeiro, for this reason we requested this repair in the place where everything will happen, it will be an open place with access for everyone 

# Impact

As time went by, Breaking on the Tide decreased and many BBOYS had to change their training time to work and thus Breaking on the Tide has been struggling in the underground to survive. Today there are 6 BBOYS who still train in the entire Complexo da Maré area that inhabits over 150.000. Irven has managed to compete and travel to represent Maré-RJ in championships in Sao Paulo and Minas Gerais. Today he works as a teacher of breaking in a volunteer and Cultural Producer where he lives, held some events such as MARÉ HIP HOP - Roda Cultural do Parque União - continuing the Roda Cultural that still exists once a month  where there is a battle of MCS, and CYPHER BREAKING

![](https\://revolution.mypinata.cloud/ipfs/QmUmTtStgwqVEs8yos2FG17mwJ3yi9A9S4sxbEK8m15kC8)

The budget will cover the costs with instructors, space allocation, purchase of sound equipment, flat dance mats, and tatami sheets for the safety of the students;

\*\*1.5 eth \*\*will cover 3 months of the project;( team mission ) managing the project's social networks, creating strategy improvements, curating teachers, organizing classes, hiring and supervising the renovation

0.5 ETH for (unforeseen events and unpredictable expenses in the budget)

( USD COSTS )

<https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/u/0/d/1UaFGyzMDF7YXIuZZFwFYPWP36OwSwoAA0WYIYudKRM0/htmlview>

### TOTAL

**2 ETH + USD 4,386.17**

0xfffC9F45f22256580014c72a883671e61Ec0C08b

### Team

[Irven Oliveira](https://www.instagram.com/irvenconfigs/) - Profissional Bboy and the creator of Maré Gnars Breakers

[Ramon ](https://twitter.com/ramonouns)- prop writer, Nouncilor and nouns builder at [Nounify skatepark](https://prop.house/proposal/837),[ nouns holiday](https://prop.house/nouns/nounish-holidays-in-30-cities),[,](https://prop.house/proposal/1430)[Lil nouns Skate culture Festival](https://prop.house/proposal/1381) and more.

### Links

Photos and videos of my work with children and teenagers 

<https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/19LL97_mivOZIZKWBlij1nDvzPooUKNCt>

Thank you everyone for reading this far, we are building and giving new expectations to the new generation, together <3

title: Counter-Proposal: Standardized Onboarding of Josh Lippi and Trevor Banta
content_summary: ### **Introduction**
content_markdown:
### **Introduction**
This counter-proposal is designed to ensure the onboarding of Josh Lippi and Trevor Banta aligns with the standardized practices of Gnars DAO. In keeping with our commitment to fairness and consistency, this approach respects the diversity of how members join our community, whether through purchase or other means.

### **Background**
The original proposal suggested allocating 2 Gnar NFTs each to Josh Lippi and Trevor Banta, which diverges from our standard onboarding procedure. In the interest of maintaining a balanced and equitable approach, especially considering that some community members acquire Gnars through purchase or other individual efforts, it is important to standardize NFT allocations. This ensures that each member, regardless of their entry method, is welcomed equally.

### **Proposal Details**

1. **Allocation Adjustment:** 
   - Allocate 1 Gnar NFT to Josh Lippi (joshlippi.eth)
   - Allocate 1 Gnar NFT to Trevor Banta (errorgardener.eth)

2. **NFT Selection:**
   - The specific Gnar NFTs to be allocated will be chosen based on availability and relevance, ensuring a meaningful and representative selection for both new members.

As the specific Gnar NFTs intended for allocation to Josh Lippi and Trevor Banta were not specified in the previous proposal, nor have they been pre-determined by the Gnars Community, I propose a collaborative and transparent approach to this process. To ensure fairness and community involvement, it is suggested that the proposers present their preferred Gnar NFT choices to the Community Pod. This will allow for an internal voting mechanism as a palliative measure.

The available Gnars for selection can be viewed at this link. This step will provide an opportunity for community members to have a say in the allocation process, ensuring that the NFTs chosen are in alignment with community interests and values.

This approach not only maintains transparency in the onboarding process but also reinforces the communal spirit of Gnars DAO by involving members in key decisions. It reflects our commitment to fairness and inclusivity, ensuring that all members, particularly new ones, feel valued and integrated into our community.

3. **Transaction Details:**
   - The NFT transfer will be executed from the Gnars Multisig wallet, with transaction details to be confirmed and signed off by authorized DAO members.

### **Justification for Counter-Proposal**
This counter-proposal is justified by the need for a fair and consistent onboarding process. Given that Gnars are acquired by community members in various ways, including purchase, it is essential to avoid arbitrary allocations of multiple NFTs to certain individuals. This ensures that every new member, regardless of their background or contributions, is welcomed on an equal footing, maintaining the integrity and egalitarian ethos of the Gnars community.

### **Conclusion**
We encourage the Gnars community to support this counter-proposal, which aligns with our standard onboarding practices and upholds the principles of fairness and consistency in welcoming new members.

The available Gnars for selection can be viewed at this link. This step will provide an opportunity for community members to have a say in the allocation process, ensuring that the NFTs chosen are in alignment with community interests and values.

This approach not only maintains transparency in the onboarding process but also reinforces the communal spirit of Gnars DAO by involving members in key decisions. It reflects our commitment to fairness and inclusivity, ensuring that all members, particularly new ones, feel valued and integrated into our community.

3. **Transaction Details:**
   - The NFT transfer will be executed from the Gnars Multisig wallet, with transaction details to be confirmed and signed off by authorized DAO members.

### **Justification for Counter-Proposal**
This counter-proposal is justified by the need for a fair and consistent onboarding process. Given that Gnars are acquired by community members in various ways, including purchase, it is essential to avoid arbitrary allocations of multiple NFTs to certain individuals. This ensures that every new member, regardless of their background or contributions, is welcomed on an equal footing, maintaining the integrity and egalitarian ethos of the Gnars community.

### **Conclusion**
We encourage the Gnars community to support this counter-proposal, which aligns with our standard onboarding practices and upholds the principles of fairness and consistency in welcoming new members.

title: Petition for Enhancing Fairness and Decentralizing Decision-Making in GNARs DAO Governance
content_summary: #### TL;DR:
content_markdown:
#### TL;DR:

Petition for our biggest holder and founder to temporarily adjust their participation in the GNARs DAO's decision-making process. 

### **Introduction**:
GNARs DAO currently faces a challenge with the concentration of voting power in the hands of its largest holder. This situation has implications for the diversity and fairness of decision-making within our community. Our proposal seeks to introduce temporary measures to mitigate this issue, fostering a more balanced governance structure until we can achieve a better token distribution and enhance governance engagement.

### **Problem Statement**:
For onChain proposals
The dominant voting power of the largest holder in GNARs DAO discourages participation from smaller holders, particularly due to the financial burden of gas fees associated with Ethereum-based contract voting. This diminishes the active involvement of a significant portion of our community in the governance process. Once a small holder will wait to decide if its worth to spend their money according with the biggest holder vote. With the current holders engagement a vote turnout against the biggest holder becomes almost impossible and it never occurred so far.

> #### "Yes, I will vote if I find a window of cheap gas after that big holder votes" 

**In general** 
A significant concentration of voting power in the hands of the largest holder poses a challenge to the decentralized decision making sold by our brand.


**Possible Proposed Solutions**:
1. **Voluntary Voting Pause by the Largest Holder**: A temporary cessation of voting by the largest holder is proposed to allow for a more evenly distributed decision-making process. This measure will remain in effect until a more balanced token distribution is established.
   or
2. **Establishment of a Delegation Program**: To encourage wider participation and offset the impact of Ethereum gas costs, a delegation program will enable the largest holder to distribute their voting power among a broader group of community members.


### **Implementation Plan**:
- The Voluntary Voting Pause will involve a commitment from the largest holder, with a timeline synchronized with key milestones towards achieving equitable token distribution.
- The Delegation Program requires a framework that ensures fair and transparent delegation processes.


### **Impact Analysis**:
- The Voluntary Voting Pause will immediately address the current imbalance and pave the way for more democratic participation.
- The Delegation Program aims to mitigate the financial barriers to voting, encouraging broader community involvement.


### **Conclusion**:
This proposal introduces temporary measures aimed at realigning the governance dynamics of GNARs DAO to be more inclusive and representative. Our goal is to create a governance environment that reflects the diversity and collective strength of our community until a more permanent solution can be established.

### **Call to Action**:
We invite the members of the GNARs DAO community to engage in discussions around this proposal, offer insights, and contribute to refining these ideas. Your involvement is vital in shaping a governance structure that is truly reflective of our community's collective voice.

His jaw is wired shut and he can not work for 2 months. This man does not come from money and his folks have created a Go-Fund-Me to help them take care of Grady. Grady rips at skateboarding and works a full time job to support his life.

The dude is between a rock and a hard spot and needs a fresh start. 

This proposal aims to make  Gnars Dao a donor to his Go Fund Me,  involving @web-gnar making a Go-Fund-Me account with the name: GNARS DAO. The funds would be sent to @web-gnar-- who would then, send them to Grady's Go-Fund-Me.

## Introduction
This proposal is for a Discord Moderator role for the Gnars DAO community Pod. The individual will be responsible for managing the Discord server, creating messages, making announcements, scheduling pod meetings, ensuring Discord security, and bringing any community issues to the board for voting on resolutions.

## Proof of Nounishness
I am a Gnars holder and voter that has previously served as a moderator in other Discord communities, demonstrating a strong understanding of community management, conflict resolution, and Discord security protocols.

**Other communities worked:**

- Odysee (20k members)

- LBRYFoundation (10k members)

- Carabela (200 members )

- Futster (700 members)

**More recently I helped Vlad to update discord server with the new discord onboard features** :point_down: 

  
 
![image](ipfs://bafkreiawjky3lpt2zylis77estkf5nw2uuyxypwh6wsfvvyrpcixfwimlm)
    
    
    

## Description
The Discord Moderator will be responsible for:

- Managing the Gnars DAO Discord server
- Creating and posting messages and announcements
- Scheduling pod meetings and other events

| Events   | Frequence|
| -------- | -------- | 
| Community Call| Tuesday   
| Governance Call| tbd      
| Community Pod | tbd  |
| **Announcements**|Daily|
| Daily Drops |Daily|
| Nouns Square Twitter Spaces|Weekly

**Available all day for changes and server support**

> Announcements should have its write reviewed by Pod:community 
> Other announcements and demands can be defined by community pod
> Full schedule should be presented after proposal approval

- Ensuring the security of the Discord server
- Bringing any community issues to the board for voting on resolutions
- The individual has a proven track record in community management and has demonstrated a strong understanding of the Gnars DAO community and its values.

## Budget and Deliverables
The budget for this proposal is 0.4 ETH+ 1 Gnars for a period of 4 months. The deliverables will be the successful management of the Gnars DAO Discord server, including the creation of messages and announcements, scheduling of pod meetings, ensuring Discord security, and bringing any community issues to the board for voting on resolutions.


## Conclusion
This proposal aims to ensure the smooth running of the Gnars DAO Discord server, enhancing community engagement and ensuring the security of the platform. The individual proposed for this role has a proven track record in community management and a strong understanding of the Gnars DAO community and its values.

From September 2022 until March 2023 I was able to do many things related to @Gnars.  In my original proposal I commited to: 

"My focus will be on producing content and representing gnars in different events - from beach cleanups to web3 events.

Surfguru.com.br will also be a partner in this iniciative, sharing news, reposting content on social media, and raising awareness about gnars in any other ways we can think about.

I’ll get stickers to put on my board and all the other avaliable merch to represent gnars anywhere I go."

During this 6 months, I believe I acomplished the proposed goals, as you can see on [my sponsorship report](https://peakd.com/hive-141964/@luizhadad/6-months-as-a-sponsored-surfer-at-gnars-dao-or-6-meses-como-um-surfista-patrocinado-da-gnars-en-pt-br).  I'd love to keep collaborating with Gnars as a sponsored surfer. Since we're still buiding the [Gnarthlete Journey](https://discord.com/channels/928811922244137020/1118918402472411266/1118918402472411266)

Here goes few highlights from the report:


![](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/Skvt1ZVI3.jpg)
- Creating surfing content in gnarly waves, such as slabs and barrels, in Espirito Santo and Fernando de Noronha; This content became part of few Gnars videos, including the first surfing/water sports mint on That's Gnarly and the first surfing collab mint too;

![](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/HJFokZVIh.jpg)

- Spreading the word about Gnars as a speaker during the Ethereum Rio Conference and 3 meetups at WeBelieve Hub;

![](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/rkaTkbV8n.jpg)
- Running a DAO Governance Workshop at Ethereum Rio and having Gnars as one of the cases;



- Onboarding Mari, Lucas Rocha, Bernardo Nassar, Carlos Bellumat, Criscia, Gabriel Sodré, João Parmagiani, Felipe and Gabriel Carvalho amongst others to our community; 

![](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/ryTbl-V83.png)

- Growing SurfHive and fostering the community, that now can generate a small revenue to Gnars - every Gnars member can choose Gnars as a default beneficiary, and the DAO will earn at least 5% of the post's rewards;

- Helping close partnerships that bring benefits for Gnars holders:  
    - [Surfguru](https://surfguru.com.br/) - 1 year subscription for all Gnars holders with +2 NFTs and 90 days subscription for all holders.
    - [We Believe Hub](https://webelieve.com.br/) gnars holders can work there 2x a week for free
  
    

## **Travel grant proposal: Surftrip to Indonesia**

Indonesia is a dream for every surfer. It has perfect waves, beautiful islands, awesome parties, lots of fun and plenty of opportunities to spread the word about Gnars.

With the travel grant, I commit to **continue** as a Gnars surfer travelling in indo with: 

- Gnars logo at the top of my board, along with Surfguru as my major sponsors;
![](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/HynzWWEUn.jpg)

- Gnars mention on every social media post related to the trip  - also @thatsgnar.ly, @nounish, @nounsbr and #GnarsWaves #GnarsDAO and #NounsWaves hashtags
- Noggles on my web2 and web3 profile names ⌐◨-◨  (They're already on my [instagram](https://www.instagram.com/luizhadad) and [twitter](https://www.twitter.com/luizhadad))
![](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/HJ4Alr483.jpg)

- Wearing Gnars gear (hats, shirts, glasses, POAP) during the trip;

**On the web3 content side** I can commit to post at least once a week a blog post on SurfHive and submit two creations on That's Gnarly.

Over 2 months (8 weeks), that would mean:
- **8 posts on SurfHive + 16 submissions on That's Gnarly**

I'd like to contribute with 20% of my earnings on SurfHive to Gnars. There, I can set Gnars as a default beneficiary. I am curious of how much this will be after the surftrip.


**Regarding **web2 content**, my deliverables will be:**

- Two web2 surfing post per week (minimum) on Instagram mentioning and tagging Gnars, That's Gnarly, SurfHive, Nounish, NounsBr; **That equals 16 posts.** 
- Stay active on instagram stories creating content about the trip and relating to gnars / web3

- Put nounish stickers all over the place ⌐◨-◨ 
- Foster partnerships with local business, like Bagus Ink Surf Camp, that our friend Ricky onboarded to Gnars.


**Planned surfing schedule for the trip:**

**From July 9th until August 31st:**
- Two months in Indonesia: few days in Bali (10th until the 13th of July), from 14th July until 28th of July I'll be in the Mentawais at Macaronis Resort (one of the best waves in the planet). 
- I will go back to Bali and keep chasing barrels during August - G-Land and Desert point are on my bucket list



![](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/BJL9VWNU3.jpg)

**Financial proposal**

My ask is a travel grant of 2 ETH to help me with travel expenses.

My current travel budget is as it follows:

1k USD - Return ticket: Brazil - Jakarta (Indonesia)
250 USD - Return tickets from Jakarta to Bali
300 USD - Return tickets from Bali to Padang (Mentawaii)
150 USD - Hotel + food in Bali for the first days (July 10th until July 13th)
3k USD - Cost of Macaronis Resort for 2 weeks ($200 per day + transfers)
500 USD - Hotel in Bali / Desert Point in August
500 USD - Videomakers/photographers for the trip

Total costs: 5.650 USD

2 ETH = 3.8k USD at the time of writing (1 ETH - 1.903 usd).

I saved some money for this trip and I am also looking for other sponsors to help me pay for the remaining 1.8k usd from the travel costs.

Thanks Mari for delegating your Gnars so I could put my prop up.

Also thanks to Vlad and Gami for the continous support! You guys are legends!

Mahalo!
![](https://i.imgur.com/1oEPgyq.png)
            @luizhadad / wavehead

content_summary: ![](https://ipfs.decentralized-content.com/ipfs/bafkreicnjc5oebxyrxhbepupq32777qxjn5fchttuqdrjenpowqa7ldcfy)
content_markdown:
![](https://ipfs.decentralized-content.com/ipfs/bafkreicnjc5oebxyrxhbepupq32777qxjn5fchttuqdrjenpowqa7ldcfy)

**Requesting 5 ETH, 15 Gnars and 15 Nouns Vision** to fund a mandated Prop House round for an open, permissionless and decentralised celebration of nounish and gnarly culture globally. 

Gnars DAO turns one 21 June (Go Skateboarding Day) so let's have a belated birthday party to coincide with the second Nouniversary beginning 8 August 2023. 

## ⚡️ TLDR

**Prop House round:**

- 5 x 1 ETH grants for Noun²gnar¹versary celebrations
- 5 x 3 Gnars and 5 x 3 Nouns Vision for prize giveaways
- Showcase gnarly culture, our people and their creations 
- Jam sessions and parties with friends around the globe
- Photo and video content to document the experience

## 🤘 Recommendations

We've loads of things to celebrate and we should all bring our own unique flavour to our own events. Here's some ideas to get the creative juices flowing:

- Any action sport, meet, jam and after party
- Big noggles stickers turn any board into noun head
- Host a screening of any relevant gnars nounish films
- Onboarding to That's Gnarly and Gnars DAO membership
- Get some friends who do film and photography to come along
- Photos and film to be released within 2 weeks of event finish
- Hippy jump noggle setup where nose bridge is the limbo bar
- Discuss giant noggles 'opstacle' and distribute the blueprints
- If you have ability to fabricate an 'opstacle' exhibit or shred
- Portable version that folds and assembles would be cool
- Community artwork showcase and gnarly skate decks
- Lil Bubble EP on rotation and live music or DJ set
- Gnars HD artwork reveal and official launch

## ✅ Requirements

Let's peer into the void, keep building at the edges, and showcase our absurd cultural movement like never before. Prop House submissions must:

1.  Explain how you'll maximise attendance
2.  Suggest merch you'll provide for attendees
3.  Formulate a plan for how to give away prizes
4.  Demonstrate plan for a film and photo crew
5.  Nominate a relevant nounish film to screen

## 📅 Scheduling

To allow ample time for planning, we've taken into consideration this proposal cycle, Prop House round setup, promotion and facilitation.

- Proposals: 1 week - 21 Jun to 28 Jun
- Voting period: 5 days - 29 Jun to 4 Jul
- Events planning: 4+ weeks - 5 July to 7 Aug
- Celebration: up to 1 week - 8 Aug onwards
- Media production: release within 2 weeks

During these 2 weeks, I will be promoting the upcoming round heavily so that entrants feel well-prepared and have ample time for brainstorming, ideation and feasibility studies.

title: Onboarding Abuga Aroni with 1 Gnar NFT for LvL 1 Gnars shredder
content_summary: ![](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/ryWB8jQrn.jpg)
content_markdown:
![](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/ryWB8jQrn.jpg)

Hello everybody! I am **Abuga Aroni**, a downhill skateboarder from Kenya, and the homie behind [Downhill254](https://downhill254.com/).

I picked up downhill skateboarding in the UK back in 2016. But when I came back to Kenya in 2017, I found I was pretty much the only downhill skater in around.

This kinda sucked, and so I spent the following years trying to grow the Kenyan downhill skate scene. 

![](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/rkSRDsXH2.jpg)

Couple years later, and we're still only a handful but we're slowly growing. I dream of having a massive scene one day, and hopefully the seeds of stoke I plant will blossom 🌸.

I'm a big believer in giving back. Over the last few years, I've been helping out beginners and novices through my [blog](https://downhill254.com/) and [youtube channel](https://www.youtube.com/@downhill254skate). 

I've been creating content that helps skaters around the world get off the right (goofy or regular hehe) foot for [downhill skating](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Tn5bk6hg_B0&list=PLDfyn8uDFYiZ-PITeT0439V5-AukFKKeK). Teaching them everything they need to know, to allow them to go from being a total beginner, to a skater that can handle any hill they come across. 

![](https://hackmd.io/_uploads/ryAgFsXBh.png)

The great side effect of helping new skaters, is that I've been able to  make downhill skateboarding my main source of income through content creation. 

And being a part of movements and communities like Gnars, and Skatehive couldn't be more perfect.

title: Onboard Raicca Ventura with 1 Gnar NFT
content_summary: ![Screenshot 2023-05-15 at 23.39.54.jpg](ipfs://bafkreibayg7a55h46hqk3pwsecs5kozml346mntorc3cfqbj752qqg4dga)
content_markdown:
![Screenshot 2023-05-15 at 23.39.54.jpg](ipfs://bafkreibayg7a55h46hqk3pwsecs5kozml346mntorc3cfqbj752qqg4dga)
    
Raicca Ventura, at the age of 16, has gone from being a promising talent to a reality in the current park skateboarding scene in Brazil, and unless there are major reasons preventing it, she will be representing Brazil in the 2024 Paris Olympics. There is great expectation that the women's park skateboarding category will bring an unprecedented medal for the country. It is the only skateboarding category in which Brazil has not won a medal.

With a collection of awards in her resume and currently ranked as the number one female professional park skateboarder in Brazil, Raicca has skateboarding running through her veins. Her history with skateboarding is long-standing and comes from her family. Raicca learned to skateboard at the age of 6 under the influence of her father and uncle, who are also skateboarders. The girl would tag along for her father's skateboarding lessons at the São Bernardo do Campo skatepark and ended up developing a passion for it.


In 2022, Raicca competed for the first time against the world's best in Rio de Janeiro and finished in 4th place. In 2023, she took part in the Dubai stage of the World Championship and finished in 11th place.

## Whats Next 

Raicca was one of the first woman to drop the megaramp and certainly a great add to our Gnarly Crew. 

This proposal requests Gnar 717 to onboard her to the community.

With this proposal Raicca would be recognized as Gnarthlete level 2 -> https://app.charmverse.io/gnars/page-5339523206847683).

title: Surfguru educational campaign to onboard holders into GnarsDAO [1ETH for 3 months]
content_summary: ![](https://i.imgur.com/b2wl3vf.jpg)
content_markdown:
![](https://i.imgur.com/b2wl3vf.jpg)

### WHAT

[Surfguru](https://surfguru.com.br) is going to create a well rounded educational campaign with graphic presentations, video content and online classes during 3 months to onboard Brazilian surfers to become Gnars holders.

![](https://i.imgur.com/zDfWkTM.jpg)

Surfguru is going to offer a 1 year subscription for all Gnars holders with +2 NFTs and 90 days subscription for all holders. 
The subscription includes:
- 15 days of surf forecast
- Personalized surf alerts
- +10 years of forecast data
- Less ads
- Access to benefits club
- 10% goes to the oceans

[Surfguru has already created a GnarsDAO merch store](https://reserva.ink/surfguru?collection=GNARSDAO) where subscribers have 31% discount.

![](https://i.imgur.com/uXtBYMU.png)
*Check out Ilustradora artwork for #gnarswave at the store*

### WHO

![](https://i.imgur.com/ZUjrZwH.jpg)

Surfguru is the leading surf forecast website and largest surfer community in Brazil with +300k unique users and +37k followers on instagram,, providing surfers with comprehensive information on wave forecast and surf news. Surfguru's mission is to connect people with the ocean, live the Aloha spirit and take care of the ocean. 10% of Surfguru’s income goes to social and environmental projects around Brazil, like [TPM](https://snapshot.org/#/gnars.eth/proposal/0x0b3d6c307f7e596892dda29cf4914598368c0b0212739081290ab6608de770cf) (also sponsored by Gnars).

![](https://i.imgur.com/pIPR4wk.jpg)


Surfguru founded [Surfhive](https://peakd.com/c/hive-141964/created), created the social currency [DROP](https://www.instagram.com/reel/Civ5iKJDxfo/) to reward beach clean ups, and has done educational campaign for [Detrash](https://www.instagram.com/reel/CkRaVTUjVg4/). [Mari](https://snapshot.org/#/gnars.eth/proposal/0x781c3062dce32c2ae1b29ad80bc95c37175c67c43ed086b196b20104669177bc) and [Luiz Hadad](https://snapshot.org/#/gnars.eth/proposal/0x4b0fef8be71a1beae3d7d2b31d44ee2df2ca539b36aa66a8221b346f6a713c4a), are partners of Surfguru, sponsored athletes and active members of GnarsDAO. [Críscia](https://thatsgnar.ly/thatsgnarly/user/0x1c3a9b9070d86d54e22a99334eac90a30e7cfd36) is an active content creator of Thatsgnar.ly and she also creates content for Surfguru and she leads Surfhive. [She did the reels about Thatsgnar.ly](https://www.instagram.com/reel/CrRZEZEuwfd/) that went viral with +23k views and onboarded 19 creators to TG. In addition, Surfguru has a wide team that believes that GnarsDAO can become a very strong community of surfers.

![](https://i.imgur.com/oGdgPKP.jpg)


![](https://i.imgur.com/7mGLEUF.png)

*Surfguru is going to continue #gnarswave competition directly on Thatsgnar.ly starting on May23.*

### WHY
Brazilian surfers are becoming more and more interested in NFTs. Surfjunkies is a great example of that with +3k mints in 3 days, which +40% were web3 newbies. Plus, big surfers like 3 times world champion [Gabriel Medina](https://forbes.com.br/forbes-tech/2022/06/gabriel-medina-fala-sobre-sua-nova-onda-a-web3/) and giant wave surfer [Lucas Chumbo](https://hardcore.com.br/lucas-chumbo-entra-para-o-universo-das-criptomoedas/) are involved in large crypto projects. 

![](https://i.imgur.com/O848ZdB.png)


From a different perspective, GnarsDAO benefited greatly by partnering with well-established communities such as, Coletivo XV. And now it can partner with Surfguru impact NounsDAO through the surf community.


### HOW

![](https://i.imgur.com/n4qUnAR.gif)

During these 3 months Surfguru is going to create educational content about how to be part of GnarsDAO: how to buy a Gnar and how to participate in the community.

- 1 reels per month on Surfguru’s instagram about GnarsDAO:
    1) What is GnarsDAO, websites and discord
    2) Basics of creating a waller, buying ETH and purchasing a Gnar at Opensea
    3) How to bid and settle Gnars auction

- 1 carousel per month on Surfguru’s instagram about GnarsDAO:
    1) What is GnarsDAO, websites and discord
    2) Basics of creating a waller, buying ETH and purchasing a Gnar at Opensea
    3) How to bid and settle Gnars auction
- 2 Live interviews with GnarsDAO members on Surfguru instagram during the two first months
- 1 Online class about GnarsDAO at the end of the 3 months
- 30k Banner impressions per month of GnarsDAO on Surfguru’s website 
- 1 Newsletter per month to Surfguru’s users to share the instagram content to the users
- 1 Article about GnarsDAO on Surfguru and Surfhive 

*Surfguru Instagram has +37k followers and website has +300k unique users, reaching a wide audience of surfers who are interested in web3*.




![](https://i.imgur.com/wtbSKtb.jpg)



### HOW MUCH AND HOW LONG
1 ETH for the 3 months


Mahalo! 
Let's go surfing!

title: Ground Catch x Gnars Skate Tournament in the Philippines
content_summary: **tl;dr** Sponsor a Ground Catch x Gnars 2 day Tournaments with raffles of Gnars Merch & Stickers, a watch party & development of a cc0 Gnars giant skatable ⌐◨-◨ obstacle structure.
content_markdown:
**tl;dr** Sponsor a Ground Catch x Gnars 2 day Tournaments with raffles of Gnars Merch & Stickers, a watch party & development of a cc0 Gnars giant skatable ⌐◨-◨ obstacle structure.

This is Ground Catch PH! 
![](https://i.imgur.com/99VCQw0.png)

### Introduction
Whats up Gnars Fam? It's me [bossjcrypto](https://twitter.com/MemanJeff) a Founder of PinoyNouns, Community Member of Gnars, FilipiNouns, Core Team Member of InternatioNouns & other subdaos of nouns. I'm also a active prop builder, crypto enthusiast, marketer, proliferator and a community manager of a skateboard club called "[Ground Catch](https://www.facebook.com/GroundCatchTuguegarao)" composed of tons of Great Filipino Skateboard Atheletes. I’ve been in the Gnars community for about 5 months.

**WHO ARE WE?**
